definition.en: In actuality there is only a spacious present, so spacious that it cannot be explored all at once in your terms, hence your arbitrary division of it into larger rooms of past, present and future.
definition.zh: 实际上只有一个广袤的当下，它如此广阔，以至于无法用你们的术语一次性探索，因此你们武断地将其分割成过去、现在和未来这些更大的房间。

definition.en: The spacious present is always present in any work of art.
definition.zh: 广袤的当下始终存在于任何艺术作品中。

definition.en: In other words the past and the present are real to the same extent.
definition.zh: 换句话说，过去和现在在同等程度上是真实的。

definition.en: When the spacious present is understood, with its attributes of spontaneity, then the cause and effect theory will fall.
definition.zh: 当广袤的当下被理解，连同其自发性特质，那么因果理论就会瓦解。

definition.en: The intensity of an experience is their present; but in many ways... their present is of wider duration than yours.
definition.zh: 经验的强度就是它们的当下；但在许多方面……它们的当下比你们的当下具有更长的持续期。

explanation:
当下并非转瞬即逝的片刻，而是一个广阔无垠的“广袤当下”。在这个当下里，过去、现在和未来同时并存，如同一个巨大房间里的不同区域。你所谓的“时间”只是你为了便于理解，对这个整体进行的武断分割。

所有事件都存在于这个广袤当下中，它们相互关联、互相影响。你的“现在”不仅能改变未来，同样也能改变过去——当你用当下的新信念重新审视过去时，你实际上在重构它。过去并非固定不变，而是随着你当下的认知不断被重新创造。

动物的“当下”比人类更宽广，因为它们根据体验的强度而非线性时间来感知。在艺术和梦境中，广袤当下尤为明显——所有元素同时存在，相互渗透。

你的信念决定了哪些经验会从过去和未来流入你的当下。

quotes.text: I was about your establishment earlier, and Ruburt was right. There was a purpose in his misreading. Actually, subconsciously he picked up my thoughts on this occasion. He picked them up a few minutes earlier but his mind waited for a suitable occasion to transpose the word spacious in connection with the present. The spacious present is an excellent term. In actuality there is only a spacious present, so spacious that it cannot be explored all at once in your terms, hence your arbitrary division of it into larger rooms of past, present and future.
quotes.translation: 我早些时候曾提及你的建置，而鲁柏是对的。他误读是有目的的。实际上，他在潜意识中接收了我此刻的想法。他几分钟前就接收到了，但他的心智在等待一个合适的时机，将"广阔"一词与"当下"联系起来。"广阔的当下"是个绝妙的术语。事实上，只有一个广阔的当下，它如此广阔，以至于以你们的说法无法一次探索完毕，因此你们武断地将其分割成过去、现在和未来这些更大的房间。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This does not mean that they are not advanced enough to understand the reality of your time. They do not share the illusion. Almost all animals, plants, birds, insects, rocks and trees perceive according to intensities. (Long pause.)The intensity of an experience is their present; but in many ways that I will not explain to you at this point, their present is of wider duration than yours. This does not necessarily mean that they perceive more of the past and future within their present than you do, for they do not in those (underlined) terms. But in terms of quality and value fulfillment there is greater duration and the "moment," in quotes, is more intensely perceived.
quotes.translation: 这并不意味着他们不够先进，无法理解你们的时间实相。他们并不共享这种幻觉。几乎所有动物、植物、鸟类、昆虫、岩石和树木都根据强度来感知。（长停顿。）经验的强度就是他们的当下；但在许多方面，我不会在此刻向你们解释，他们的当下比你们的持续时间更广。这并不一定意味着他们在当下中比你们感知到更多的过去和未来，因为他们并不以那些（强调的）术语来感知。但在品质和价值完成方面，有更长的持续时间，而"当下"（引号内）被更强烈地感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The spacious present is always present(smile)--my pun--in any work of art. As you should know, there is a difference in the type of mobility of an objective painting, and an abstract one. The fluidity or the spacious present pervades the dream state as it pervades a painting, but the images are projected into the spacious present by the dreamer, according to his own understanding and experience.
quotes.translation: 广阔的当下始终存在于（微笑——我的双关语）任何艺术作品中。正如你们应该知道的，具象画和抽象画的流动性类型有所不同。流动性或广阔的当下弥漫于梦境状态，正如它弥漫于一幅画中，但梦者根据自身的理解和经验，将影像投射到广阔的当下中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: In other words the past and the present are real to the same extent. At times in fact the past can become more real than the present, and in such cases past actions are reacted to in the present. You take it for granted that present action can alter the future, but present actions can also alter the past.
quotes.translation: 换句话说，过去和现在在同等程度上是真实的。事实上，有时过去可以变得比现在更真实，在这种情况下，过去的行动会在现在被反应。你们理所当然地认为现在的行动可以改变未来，但现在的行动同样可以改变过去。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Time overlays are the time versions of certain events, then. These time overlays always exist. (Pause.) They may become activated, however, by certain associations made in your present, and therefore draw into your present time some glimpses either from the future or the past. So-called present time is thickened, then, by a psychological realization on deep levels of the psyche that all events are interrelated, and that the reincarnational experiences of any given individual provide a rich source of experience from which each person at least unconsciously draws.
quotes.translation: 时间覆盖层是某些事件的时间版本。这些时间覆盖层始终存在。（停顿。）然而，它们可能因你们现在所做的某些联想而被激活，从而将来自未来或过去的一瞥带入你们现在的时间。因此，所谓的现在时间被加厚了，这是通过心灵深层对以下事实的心理领悟：所有事件都是相互关联的，任何特定个体的转世经验都提供了丰富的经验来源，每个人至少潜意识地从中汲取。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Jane doesn't agree with my doubts. As always, she's been letting me put this book together the way I think best--and inevitably that way has followed how we've been trying to understand our joint long-term situation. She innocently accepts my labors as they come out. And that trust always reflects, I'm sure, Seth's own larger view of reality, as I just quoted him from Session 915. Our challenges echo throughout all of our probable realities simultaneously, and through all of them together the largest picture of Jane and myself is presented. In this probable reality we work with what we can pick up from that great whole. We keep trying to learn to ask better questions.

quotes.text: Though the past is actually quite as immediate, alive, and creative as the present is, man made certain adjustments, on several layers, that would focus definite distinctions and set past and present experience apart. While your particular kind of consciousness was developing, it began to intensify selectivity, to concentrate specifically in a small area of activity while blocking out other data. This was necessary because the particular kind of physical manipulation of corporal existence required instant physical response to immediately present stimuli.
quotes.translation: 尽管过去实际上与现在一样直接、鲜活且具有创造力，但人类在多个层面上做出了某些调整，以聚焦明确的区别，将过去和现在的经验分开。当你们特定类型的意识正在发展时，它开始强化选择性，特别专注于一个小的活动区域，同时屏蔽其他数据。这是必要的，因为肉体存在的特定物理操作需要对即时呈现的刺激做出即时的身体反应。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 686
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Now returning briefly, I would like again to mention our spacious present, in which all things have their existence. When the spacious present is understood, with its attributes of spontaneity, then the cause and effect theory will fall. The cause and effect theory being the result of continuity holds no water. Basically, the spacious present as you know does have durability, because of the existence of value fulfillment.
quotes.translation: 现在简短地回到正题，我想再次提及我们那广阔当下，万物皆在其中存在。当广阔当下及其自发性特质被理解时，因果理论便会瓦解。因果理论作为连续性的产物是站不住脚的。基本上，就你们所知，广阔当下确实具有持久性，因为价值完成的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: These probabilities are realities, regardless of which decision you make. Say, for example, that you have three choices and it is imperative that you select one. Using this state, you take the first choice. The alternative present is the moment in which you make that choice. Having made it the present is changed, and quite clearly you perceive exactly the way it is changed and what actions and events will flow from the change into the future that belongs to that particular alternate present.
quotes.translation: 这些可能性都是实相，无论你做出何种决定。举例来说，假设你有三个选择，且必须从中选一个。利用这种状态，你选择了第一个选项。替代当下就是你做出那个选择的时刻。做出选择后，当下便改变了，你显然能清楚看到它如何改变，以及哪些行动和事件将从这改变流向属于那个特定替代当下的未来。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Its "nouns" become what they signify. Its declensions are multidimensional. Its verbs and nouns can become interchangeable. In a way (underlined), the psyche is its own language. "At any given time," all of its tenses are present tense. In other words, it has multitudinous tenses, all in the present, or it has multitudinous present tenses. Within it no "word" dies or becomes archaic. This language is experience. Psychically, then, you can and you cannot say that there is a source. The very fact that you question: "Is there a God, or a Source?" shows that you misunderstand the issues.
quotes.translation: 它的"名词"变成了它们所代表的事物。它的词形变化是多维的。它的动词和名词可以互换。在某种程度上（强调），心灵本身就是它自己的语言。"在任何特定时刻"，它的所有时态都是现在时。换句话说，它拥有无数时态，全部都在当下，或者说它拥有无数个现在时态。在其中，没有"词语"会消亡或变得过时。这种语言就是经验。因此，从心灵层面来说，你既可以说也可以说没有源头。你质疑"是否有神或源头？"这一事实本身就表明你误解了问题所在。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Think of the present as a pool of experience drawn from many sources, fed, in your terms, by tributaries from both the past and the future. There are an infinite number of such tributaries (probabilities), and through your beliefs you choose from these, adjusting their currents. For example: If you constantly focus on the belief that your early background was damaging and negative, then only such experiences will flow into your present life from the past. It does no good to say, "But my life was traumatic," therefore reinforcing the belief. You must in one way or another modify that conviction, or preferably change it entirely -- or you will never escape from its effects. This does not mean "lying" to yourself; but if it seems to you that your background held no joys, accomplishments or pleasures, then you are lying to yourself now. You have concentrated upon the negative to such a degree that anything else seems invisible. (See the 644th session in Chapter Eleven.) From the present you have hypnotized yourself, viewing the past not as it was to your experience, but as it appears now in the light of your current beliefs.
quotes.translation: 将当下视为一个从众多源头汲取的经验池，按你们的说法，由来自过去和未来的支流注入。有无数这样的支流（可能性），通过你的信念，你从中选择，调整它们的流向。例如：如果你持续专注于你的早期背景是有害且负面的信念，那么只有这样的经验会从过去流入你当下的生活。说"但我的生活充满创伤"来强化这一信念是无济于事的。你必须以某种方式修改那个信念，或者最好彻底改变它——否则你永远无法摆脱它的影响。这并不意味着"欺骗"自己；但如果对你来说你的背景毫无欢乐、成就或愉悦，那么你现在就是在欺骗自己。你过于专注于负面，以至于其他一切似乎都不可见。（参见第十一章第644节。）从当下你催眠了自己，不是按照过去的实际体验来看待它，而是根据你当前信念的光照来看待它现在的样子。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This reconstruction of the past can be both fascinating and frustrating as I compare dates, session numbers, and our daily activities. Somehow, immersed in all of that minutiae of the past, I revive it so that it becomes part of the present once more -- and that coexistence then reminds me of Seth's idea of simultaneous time; perhaps, outside of dreaming, it's the best approximation I can make of the paradoxical notion that all exists at once, and that all changes together, for each time I regard one of my past moments from the present, I change both that past and the present.
quotes.translation: 当我比较日期、课程编号和我们的日常活动时，这种对过去的重构既令人着迷又令人沮丧。不知怎的，沉浸在过去的那些琐碎细节中，我重新激活了它，使它再次成为当下的一部分——而这种共存让我想起赛斯关于同时时间的理念；也许，在梦境之外，这是我能对"一切同时存在，且一切共同改变"这一矛盾概念做出的最佳近似，因为每当我从当下审视过去的某个时刻，我都同时改变了那个过去和当下。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: NOTES: SESSION 801
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: When you seemingly look backward into time, and construct a history, you do so by projecting your own prime series of events into the past as it is understood. Obviously you read the past from the present, but you also create it from the present as well. You accept certain data -- your present recognized series of events -- then use that series as a measuring stick, so to speak: It automatically rejects what does not fit. At certain levels of experience this makes little difference. All data agree. No rough spots show.
quotes.translation: 当你看似回望时间，构建一段历史时，你是通过将自己主要的事件序列投射到被理解的过去中来实现的。显然，你是从当下解读过去，但你也从当下创造过去。你接受某些数据——你当前识别的事件序列——然后用那个序列作为衡量标准，可以说：它自动排斥不匹配的内容。在经验的某些层面上，这几乎没什么区别。所有数据都一致。没有粗糙的痕迹显现。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 741
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: In your terms, the rate at which you discover the facets and realities of the spacious present becomes your camouflage time. On your plane there must be physical manipulation. This gives you also the illusion of past and future, and to you it appears that the present is a fleeting, almost ashen illusion in itself, beyond any true remembrance and beyond the reach of any but nostalgic recall. This is also caused by your camouflage system in which physical materializations appear and grow, mature and disappear.
quotes.translation: 按你们的说法，你们发现广袤当下的各个面向与实相的速度，就成了你们的伪装时间。在你们的层面上，必须有物质性的操控。这也给了你们过去与未来的幻相，对你们而言，当下本身似乎是一个稍纵即逝、几乎如灰烬般的幻相，超越任何真实的记忆，除了怀旧的追忆之外，无法触及。这也是由你们的伪装系统造成的，在该系统中，物质性的具体化显现、生长、成熟并消失。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now: In the same way you can be allied and in tune with other probabilities that do not coincide with your space-time axis. The exterior universe with its galaxies -- as you understand it, and on that level of activity -- can be encountered on certain rigid space-time coordinates. You can visit other planets only in your present (underlined). Your present may be the past or the future as far as inhabitants of a given planet are concerned. Your physical senses will only operate in their and your present.
quotes.translation: 现在：同样地，你们可以与那些不与你们时空轴重合的其他可能性协调一致。你们所理解的外部宇宙及其星系——在那个活动层面上——可以在某些固定的时空坐标上被遇见。你们只能在你们的当下（强调）访问其他行星。就某个特定行星的居民而言，你们的当下可能是他们的过去或未来。你们的物质感官只会在他们和你们的当下运作。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 712
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: An analyst might consider Augustus as schizophrenic and label him neatly, but such terms are basically meaningless. If the analyst, over a period of time, should convince Augustus that his condition in the present resulted from some specific inhibited event in the past, and if the analyst was an intuitive and understanding man, then Augustus might change his beliefs enough so that some kind of "cure" was worked. He would then conveniently remember such an event and display the expected emotions as he re-experienced it. Unfortunately in his present state, powerless as it were without Augustus Two, he might also simply call on his "alter ego" to show the good doctor that he was no one to trifle with.
quotes.translation: 一位分析师可能会将奥古斯都视为精神分裂症患者，并给他贴上整齐的标签，但这样的术语基本上毫无意义。如果分析师在一段时间内，成功说服奥古斯都，他当下的状况源于过去某个特定的压抑事件，并且如果分析师是一位直觉敏锐且善解人意的人，那么奥古斯都可能会改变他的信念，从而产生某种“治愈”。他随后会方便地记起这样的事件，并在重新体验时表现出预期的情绪。不幸的是，在他当下的状态中，没有奥古斯都二世的帮助，他可能也会简单地召唤他的“第二自我”，向那位好医生证明他可不是好惹的。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: A hundred and forty-five B.C., a hundred and forty-five A.D., a thousand years in your past and a thousand years in your present--all exist now. Therefore the past existences are present existences. You exist in other words in several guises or reincarnations, at one time within the spacious present. You simply do not recognize that the so-called past exists now as surely as the so-called future exists now.
quotes.translation: 公元前一百四十五年、公元一百四十五年、你们过去的一千年和你们当下的一千年——全都存在于当下。因此，过去的存在就是当下的存在。换句话说，你们以多种伪装或转世的形式存在，同时存在于广袤当下之中。你们只是没有认识到，所谓的过去与所谓的未来一样，都确实存在于当下。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Remember that reincarnation does not contradict the theory of the spacious present , for such lives within the spacious present are simultaneous. In dreams you journey through inner realities as actually as you walk physically through the matter of the physical world. It is true that the experiences you encounter may not be encountered by another in precisely (underline precisely) the same way, but physical experience is never the same for any two given individuals either.
quotes.translation: 记住，转世并不与广袤当下的理论相矛盾，因为在广袤当下中，这些生命是同时存在的。在梦中，你们在内在实相中旅行，其真实性不亚于你们在物质世界中行走于物质之中。诚然，你所经历的经验可能不会被另一个人以完全相同的方式（强调完全相同）经历，但物质经验对任何两个个体来说也从来不是相同的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: They represent a present unique beyond telling, alive in each consciousness, more important than you recognize. There are no real rules to be followed that will bring you into such an encounter with the present moment of reality -- only a trust in the nature of your being. And that trust is within you whether or not you recognize it, for it gives you your present experience; and no matter how your mind questions, it rides securely in the great creativity of the soul.
quotes.translation: 它们代表着一个难以言喻的独特当下，在每个意识中鲜活存在，其重要性远超你的认知。没有真正的规则可循，能让你与实相的当下时刻相遇——只有对你本性的信任。而那信任就在你之内，无论你是否认识到它，因为它赋予你当下的经验；无论你的心智如何质疑，它都安稳地乘载于灵魂的伟大创造力之中。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 733
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: I mentioned that the inhabitant of the other system with whom you made contact perceived your existence in both the future and the past. He also was aware however of your own comparative imprisonment in a limited present. For the present as you know it is very limited indeed. He realized therefore, when the incident occurred, how it would end. He can relive the incident at his leisure, and experience it as present if he so chooses.
quotes.translation: 我曾提到，你们接触过的另一系统的居民感知到你们同时存在于未来与过去。然而他也意识到你们自身被困于一个有限的当下。因为你们所认知的当下确实极为局限。因此当事件发生时，他便已明白其结局。他可以随心所欲地重温那个事件，若他选择如此，便能将其体验为当下。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Dictation then: Probabilities are an ever-present portion of your invisible psychological environment. You exist in the middle of the probable system of reality. It is not something apart from you. To some extent it is like a sea in which you have your present being. You are in it, and it is in you. Occasionally at surface levels of consciousness, you might wonder what might have happened had you made other decisions than those you have; chosen different mates, for example, or taken up residence in other portions of the country. You might wonder what would have happened had you mailed an important letter that you subsequently decided not to mail; and in such small wonderings only, have you ever questioned the nature of probabilities. But there are deep connections between yourself and all those individuals with whom you have had relationships, and with whom you were involved in deep decisions.
quotes.translation: 口述如下：可能性是你无形心理环境中永恒存在的一部分。你存在于可能性系统的中央。它并非与你分离之物。某种程度上它如同海洋，你当下的存在便在其中。你处于它之内，它也处于你之内。偶尔在意识的表层，你或许会好奇：若当初做出不同选择——比如选择不同的伴侣，或定居在国家的其他地区——会发生什么。你或许会想：若当初寄出那封后来决定不寄的重要信件，又会如何。唯有在这些微小的遐想中，你才曾质疑过可能性的本质。但你自己与所有曾建立深刻关系、参与重大抉择的人们之间，存在着深层的联结。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Exterior conditions can always be changed if you understand the principles of which I am speaking. Diseases can be eliminated, even those that seem fatal -- but only if the beliefs behind them are erased or altered enough so that their specific focusing effect upon the body is sufficiently released. The present as you think of it, and in practical working terms, is that point at which you select your physical experience from all those events that could be materialized. Your physical circumstances change automatically as your beliefs do. As your knowledge grows, so your experience becomes more fulfilling. This does not necessarily mean that it evens out in any way, or that there are not peaks and valleys. Each aspiration presupposes the admission of a lack, each challenge presupposes a barrier to be overcome. The more adventurous will often choose greater challenges, and so in their minds the contrasts between what they want to achieve and their present status can seem to be impossible.
quotes.translation: 若你理解我所阐述的原理，外在境况总能改变。疾病可以被消除，即便看似致命的疾病——但前提是背后的信念被足够地抹除或修正，使其对身体的具体聚焦效应得以充分释放。你们所认为的当下，在实际运作层面，正是你从所有可能物质化的事件中筛选出物理体验的那个点。你的物质境况会随信念的改变而自动变化。随着知识增长，你的体验也愈发丰盈。这未必意味着一切会趋于平稳，或不再有高峰与低谷。每个渴望都预设了对匮乏的承认，每个挑战都预设了有待克服的障碍。更具冒险精神者常会选择更大的挑战，因此在他们的心智中，渴望达成的目标与当下状态之间的反差可能看似难以逾越。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In greater terms, the past is definitely created from the present. In your system of reality this does not seem to be the case at all, since your senses project a forward kind of motion outward upon events. "Subatomic particles," however, appear in your present, rippling into your system's dimensions, creating their own "tracks," which scientists then try to observe. In some cases, unknowingly, your scientists are close to observing the birth of time effects within your system. (Pause.) Since your brains are composed of cells with their atoms and molecules, and since these are themselves made of certain invisible particles,2 then your memories are already structured by the biological mechanisms that make them possible in your terms. (In parentheses: After death, for example, you still possess a memory, though it does not operate through the physical organism as you understand it.)
quotes.translation: 从更宏大的视角看，过去确实由当下创造。在你们的现实系统中，这似乎完全不合常理，因为你们的感官将向前的运动投射于事件之上。然而"亚原子粒子"出现在你们的当下，涟漪般渗入你们系统的维度，创造出自身的"轨迹"，科学家们随后试图观测。在某些情况下，你们的科学家正无意间接近观测到系统内时间效应的诞生。（停顿）由于你们的大脑由细胞构成，细胞又由原子与分子组成，而这些本身由某些不可见粒子构成，那么你们的记忆已然被生物机制所结构化——这些机制使记忆在你们认知中成为可能。（括号内：例如死亡后，你仍拥有记忆，尽管它不再通过你们所理解的物理有机体运作。）
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: A mountain is composed of many layers of rock that serve, as you think of it, as its foundation. The top of the mountain represents the present to you, and the tiers of rock beneath stand for the past. The mountain itself is not any one of those rock layers that seemingly compose it, however. There is a relationship between the mountain and those strata but the term "mountain" is one that you have applied. In greater terms the mountain and all of its components exist at once, of course. You can examine the various levels of rock structure. Geologists can tell when, in terms of time, certain sedimentary deposits formed. The rocks themselves still exist in the geologists' present time, or they could not make such an examination. The mountain would not be a mountain without that "foundation." Again, however, it is not any one of those rock layers.
quotes.translation: 一座山由多层岩石构成，在你们看来，这些岩层便是其根基。山顶代表你们的当下，下方的岩层则象征过去。然而山本身并非任何一层看似构成它的岩层。山与这些地层之间存在关联，但"山"这个术语是你们赋予的。从更宏大的视角看，山及其所有组成部分当然同时存在。你们可以检视岩石结构的不同层次。地质学家能判断某些沉积物在时间上形成于何时。但这些岩石本身仍存在于地质学家的当下时间中，否则他们无法进行此类检视。没有那个"根基"，山便不成其为山。但同样，它并非任何一层岩层。

quotes.text: The serf will invariably be looking at his time through a different focus than his future self could ever do. And think of the added challenges of feeling and perception where sexual changes between present and past incarnations are involved! Eroticism--and yes, outright sexual curiosity and arousal over reversed genitalia, for instance--must enter in sometimes, although in print at least these specifics of sex in connection with reincarnation seem to be a taboo subject. By contrast, there's plenty of material in the reincarnational literature on the generalized patterns of sexual behavior, from promiscuity to repression. (I wonder whether a long-term past-life sexual fantasy could be connected to a real sexual problem or challenge in a present--or future--life.)
quotes.translation: 农奴看待自己时代的视角，永远与他未来的自我截然不同。再想想当过去与现在化身之间涉及性别转换时，情感与感知所面临的额外挑战！情欲——是的，甚至对颠倒生殖器的直白性好奇与性唤起——有时必然介入其中，尽管至少在印刷品中，这些与转世相关的性细节似乎仍是禁忌话题。相比之下，转世文献中关于性行为普遍模式（从滥交到压抑）的材料却比比皆是。（我怀疑，长期的前世性幻想是否可能与今生——或来世——真实的性问题或挑战相关联。）
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Even in God of Jane, which was published in 1981, Jane presented some relatively late material from Seth to show that he doesn't independently communicate with others. The idea that he'd done so can be inspiring, however. In Chapter 20 of her book, see Session 876 for August 27, 1979. After explaining how a couple of women (among others) had recently claimed that he had been in contact with them, Seth stated: "Now, I did not communicate with those women--but their belief in me helped each of them use certain abilities."
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 6: Genetic Heritage and Reincarnational Predilections

quotes.text: But would our time traveler ever want to give up his or her present mental and physical focus to enter completely into an earlier personality? I think not, in the overwhelming majority of cases--and perhaps never--for in those terms it would mean surrendering a portion of the whole self or entity that had, through a projection into our scheme of "present" time, attained a certain consciousness and physical form of a unique degree. Yet, on second thought I wouldn't dare rule out completely such bizarre developments. Perhaps transfers like that can and do take place within the vast arena of probable realities (which I'll also be discussing in this essay). If so, then, they would be strange only from our limited viewpoints.
quotes.translation: 但我们的时间旅行者会愿意放弃当下的心智与身体焦点，完全融入早期人格吗？我认为绝大多数情况下不会——或许永远都不会——因为从那些角度来看，这意味着放弃通过投射进入我们"当下"时间体系而获得独特意识与物质形态的部分整体自性或存有。不过转念一想，我不敢完全排除这种奇异发展的可能性。或许这类转移确实能在可能实相的广阔领域（我将在本文中讨论）中发生。若果真如此，那它们只是在我们有限的视角下显得怪异罢了。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: As Seth suggests, through even a five-minute exercise, in which we sit quietly and look about, we can become aware that the present is the point of power. In his exercise, we gently remind ourselves that we aren't at the mercy of our past beliefs unless we think we are. We have the full freedom to insert new creative goals in our point-of-power exercises. Next, we relax, to give our fresh suggestions time to begin working within us. Next, physically we make a simple gesture or act, no matter how modest, that is in line with our desires for the future. Periodically we repeat the exercise -- but easily, without pressure, confident that we're doing well. Action is thought in physical motion, Seth tells us. ...
quotes.translation: 正如赛斯所建议，通过短短五分钟的练习——静坐环顾四周——我们就能意识到当下是力量之点。在他的练习中，我们温和地提醒自己：除非我们认为自己受制于过去信念，否则我们根本不受其摆布。我们拥有完全的自由，在力量之点练习中注入新的创造性目标。接着放松，让新鲜的建议有时间在我们内在开始运作。然后身体做出一个简单的手势或动作——无论多么微小——只要符合我们对未来的渴望。定期重复这个练习——但要轻松无压力，确信自己做得很好。赛斯告诉我们，行动是思想在物质运动中的体现……
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: 1. From my dream notebook: (See my painting at end of Session 4.)

related_concepts.name_en: The point of power is in the present

quotes.text: The forward motion brings you into the future, out of the past from which it seems you are emerging. So you plot a straight course, it seems, through time, never realizing in our analogy that the wheel's circular motion allows you to transverse this ongoing road. The hub of the present, therefore, is held together by "spokes." These have nothing to do with your ideas of cause and effect at all. Instead they refer to the circular motion of your own psyche as it seems to progress in time. Each present moment of your experience is dependent upon the future as well as the past, your death as well as your birth. Your birth and your death are built in, so to speak, together, one implied in the other.
quotes.translation: 向前运动将你带入未来，脱离你似乎正在挣脱的过去。因此你似乎在时间中规划出一条直线路径，却从未在我们的类比中意识到：轮子的圆周运动让你得以穿越这条持续延伸的道路。因此当下的轮毂由"辐条"聚合而成。这些辐条与你的因果观念毫无关联。相反，它们指向你自身心灵在时间中看似前进时的圆周运动。你经验的每个当下时刻既依赖未来也依赖过去，既依赖死亡也依赖诞生。可以说，你的出生与死亡是共同构建的，彼此蕴含其中。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The moment is remembered because the emotions experienced at the time almost completely fill the psychic space, forcing all other experiences out. The stronger the emotion the more vivid the moment becomes, the more totally it is recalled. And even in future years such past instances can be experienced as vividly as any present experience. In other words, to some large extent such a strong emotion unites experience and knocks down the artificial barrier of past, present and future.
quotes.translation: 那个时刻被铭记，是因为当时经历的情感几乎完全填满了心灵空间，将所有其他经验排挤出去。情感越强烈，时刻就越鲜活，回忆就越完整。即便多年之后，这些过往实例仍能像任何当下经验一样生动地被体验。换言之，在相当程度上，这种强烈情感统一了经验，击垮了过去、现在与未来的人为屏障。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: You may desire health, but believe implicitly in your state of poor health. You may desire spiritual understanding, while thinking that you are spiritually unworthy and opaque. (Pause.) When you set your longing against a present belief there is always conflict. Your belief will generate the proper feelings and imaginative endeavors characteristic of it. If you want to be healthy and continually contrast what you want with the present conviction in your poor health, then the belief itself, set up against the desire, will cause added difficulties. In such a case you seem to want the impossible. Desire and belief are not united but apart.
quotes.translation: 你可能渴望健康，却深信自己处于糟糕的健康状态。你可能渴望灵性领悟，却认为自己灵性匮乏且迟钝。（停顿。）当你将渴望与当下信念对立时，冲突便始终存在。你的信念会生成与之相应的恰当情感与想象努力。若你想健康，却不断将渴望与当下对健康不佳的信念对比，那么信念本身与渴望对抗，反而会引发更多困难。这种情况下，你似乎渴望不可能之事。渴望与信念并未统一，而是分离的。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: (A one-minute pause at 11:21.) Learned behavior therefore alters not only present and future but also past conduct. Your power as a rational consciousness focused in the present provides you with opportunities for creativity that you are but vaguely learning to understand. As you do learn, you will automatically begin to appreciate the multidimensional nature of not only your own species but of others as well. The moment as you think of it, then, is the creative framework through which you, the nonphysical self, constantly form corporeal reality; and through that window into earthly existence you form both its future and its past.
quotes.translation: （11:21停顿一分钟。）因此习得行为不仅改变现在与未来，也改变过去行为。你作为聚焦于当下的理性意识所拥有的力量，为你提供了你仅模糊理解的创造力机遇。当你真正开始学习时，便会自然领悟到不仅自身物种，其他物种也具备的多维本质。因此，你所认为的"当下时刻"正是创造性框架——非物质的你通过它不断构建物质实相；而通过这扇通往尘世存在的窗口，你同时塑造了它的未来与过去。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: All of this happens through the window of your present. In terms of energy, again, the vitality of your entity impinging into three-dimensional reality forms a particle that is your present being. But this particle is also deflected away from the earth in a rhythmic pattern. The same happens to other portions of your self at other points in the space-time continuum, but at certain intervals you meet, so to speak. Each of your "presents" becomes charged, filled with potentiality; and your entity, itself conscious energy, is also enriched by your various experiences, by the combined and magnified power of its own "past."
quotes.translation: 这一切都通过你当下的窗口发生。从能量角度来看，你存有的生命力冲击三维实相时，会形成一个粒子，那就是你当下的存在。但这个粒子也会以某种韵律模式偏离地球。你自我的其他部分在时空连续体的其他点上也会发生同样情况，但可以说，在特定间隔中你们会相遇。你的每个"当下"都会变得充满能量、充满潜能；而你的存有本身作为有意识的能量，也因你各种经历、因它自身"过去"的累积与放大的力量而更加丰富。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: While the cells required future and past data, and used it to form from that invisible tension the body's present corporal reality, the same kind of information could be a threat then to the ego consciousness, which could be overwhelmed. Within the corporal structure, however, there are indeed messages that leap too quickly or too slowly2 from your viewpoint to allow for any physical response. In that way cellular comprehension is allowed its free flow; but the selectivity mentioned (in sessions 682-3) bypasses such information, so that it does not conflict with present sense data requiring physical action in time.
quotes.translation: 虽然细胞需要过去与未来的数据，并利用它们从那种无形张力中形成身体当下的物质实相，但这类信息对自我意识而言可能构成威胁，因为它可能被淹没。然而在身体结构内，确实存在从你视角看来跳跃过快或过慢的信息，以至于无法引发任何物理反应。这样，细胞的理解力得以自由流动；但（第682-3节中提到的）选择性会绕过这类信息，使其不与需要及时物理行动的当下感官数据产生冲突。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 686
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: I am seeing movement and shifts of power. In your present there is the immediate triangle of which I have spoken. In your present there is also a triangle symbolizing those now at the top of the structure, and there is movement there also, and a man will fall. But both of these triangles lead to a future triangle in which you will be intimately involved if you continue your bulldog tactics. Now this is sometime in the future and you will jockey from fourth to third position in the higher echelons of the company. I see you again at the right leg of the triangle, and again the man at the left leg will fall.
quotes.translation: 我看到能量的移动与转变。在你当下有我提到过的直接三角。在你当下也有一个象征结构顶端人物的三角，那里也有变动，将有一个人坠落。但这两个三角都导向一个未来三角——如果你继续采取蛮牛策略，你将深入卷入其中。这发生在未来的某个时刻，你将在公司高层从第四位跃升至第三位。我再次看到你位于三角的右端，而左端的那个人将会坠落。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: At such times I'm apt to think about ideas of reincarnation and counterparts. Right here I'm dealing with just two of Seth's larger concepts. But without dwelling upon them too heavily, I may consider the notion of my larger, nonphysical "whole self" or "entity" being made up of a number of other psychically related physical selves projected into time. For Seth, basically there is no time, only a great "spacious present" that's a manifestation of a sublime, indescribable All That Is. Our gross physical senses, and indeed our very bodies, insist upon interpreting the spacious present in linear terms, however--through the inevitable processes of birth, aging, and death--so to help us get his point here Seth advances his ideas of reincarnational selves and counterpart selves in ways we can understand sensually.
quotes.translation: 这种时候我常会思考转世与对应体的概念。这里我只涉及赛斯的两个较大概念。但不过分深究的话，我可以考虑这个观念：我那个更大的、非物质的"整体自我"或"存有"，由投射进时间的许多其他心灵相关的物质自我组成。对赛斯而言，基本上没有时间，只有一个伟大的"广袤当下"，那是神圣不可言说的"一切万有"的显化。然而我们粗重的物质感官，乃至我们的身体本身，都坚持用线性方式诠释这个广袤当下——通过出生、衰老与死亡的必然过程——所以为了帮助我们理解他的观点，赛斯以我们能感官理解的方式提出了转世自我与对应体自我的概念。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Even in God of Jane, which was published in 1981, Jane presented some relatively late material from Seth to show that he doesn't independently communicate with others. The idea that he'd done so can be inspiring, however. In Chapter 20 of her book, see Session 876 for August 27, 1979. After explaining how a couple of women (among others) had recently claimed that he had been in contact with them, Seth stated: "Now, I did not communicate with those women--but their belief in me helped each of them use certain abilities."
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 6: Genetic Heritage and Reincarnational Predilections

quotes.text: The cause and effect theory, as I have stated, is a result of your ideas of time. As long as you persist in thinking in terms of past, present and future, then the cause and effect theory is a logical and seemingly infallible result. When you develop your time theory and realize that present, past and future are merely effects and distortions caused by your own perspective, then your scientists will realize that cause and effect is a passe and antiquated theory, useful only for a short time--I hope you appreciate the pun with the word time--and should be discarded.
quotes.translation: 如我所言，因果理论是你时间观念的产物。只要你坚持用过去、现在、未来的方式思考，因果理论就是一个逻辑且看似无误的结果。当你发展出时间理论，认识到现在、过去、未来只是你自身视角造成的效应与扭曲时，你们的科学家就会意识到因果理论是过时陈旧的学说，仅适用于短暂时期——我希望你欣赏这个关于"时间"的双关语——应当被摒弃。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: When you paint the land, do so thinking in terms having to do with its past as well as present and future. Its inner development that has resulted in its present form, the energy behind the form. Remember in your painting the relationship of one object to another, not in terms of space necessarily, the interrelationship of the vitality that forms the objects; the vibrating always changing reality within, say, the skin of the apple or the orange, the quite living consciousness within the molecules that make up what seems to be the solid surface of the fruits' skin.
quotes.translation: 当你描绘大地时，要思考它的过去、现在与未来。它内在的发展如何形成当前形态，形态背后的能量。在绘画中记住物体之间的关系，不一定是空间上的，而是形成物体的生命力之间的相互关系；那存在于苹果或橘子表皮内不断振动的实相，那构成看似固体果皮表面的分子中鲜活的意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Since all is simultaneous, your present beliefs can alter your past ones, whether from this life or a "previous" one. Existences are open-ended. Now with your ideas of progressive time and the resulting beliefs in cause and effect, I realize this is difficult for you to understand. Yet within the abilities of your creaturehood, your current beliefs can change your experience; you can restructure your "reincarnational past" in the same way that you can restructure the past in this present life (as explained in sessions 657-58 in Chapter Fifteen.
quotes.translation: 既然一切皆是同时发生的，你当下的信念可以改变过去的信念，无论是来自这一生还是"前世"。存在是开放式的。以你们线性时间观念及由此产生的因果信念来看，我明白这对你们而言难以理解。然而，在你们作为生物的能力范围内，你们当下的信念可以改变你们的经验；你们可以像重组今生当下的过去那样（如第十五章第657-58节所述），重组你们的"转世过去"。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: At one time the personality's sister was a father to the present personality. Since many of the building plans involved the construction of various kinds of temples, the personality has always been interested in acquiring knowledge concerning the nature of reality. There has been little concern with commerce. There is a need on the present personality's part to understand its own nature, and to use its abilities constructively. The personality has not come to grips with itself truly, but has the inner persistence and intuitiveness to do so.
quotes.translation: 该人格的姐妹曾一度是当下人格的父亲。由于许多建造计划涉及各种庙宇的建造，该人格一直对获取关于实相本质的知识感兴趣，对商业则鲜有关注。当下人格需要理解自身的本质，并建设性地运用其能力。该人格尚未真正面对自己，但拥有内在的坚持力和直觉力去做到这一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This joining of the past and present, in that context, predisposes you to similar future events, for you have geared yourself for them. Change now quite practically alters both the past and the future. For you, because of your neurological organization, the present is obviously the only point from which past and future can be changed, or when action becomes effected.
quotes.translation: 在这种背景下，过去与当下的结合使你们倾向于类似的未来事件，因为你们已为此做好了准备。当下的改变实际上同时改变了过去和未来。对你们而言，由于神经系统的组织方式，当下显然是唯一能改变过去和未来的点，或是行动得以生效的时刻。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: When the inverted time system is understood for what it is, then the individual is in contact simultaneously with the experience gained in the so-called past, and is also able to take advantage of events which have not yet occurred within your present. This does not mean that he will be consciously aware of future events, for if you remember these events can be changed by him at any time. He is constantly making his own experience. He is constantly forming the events of the past, even as he forms the events of the present and future.
quotes.translation: 当倒转的时间系统被认清其本质时，个体便同时接触到所谓过去所获得的经验，并且能够利用尚未在你们当下发生的事件。这并不意味着他会清醒地意识到未来事件，因为请记住，这些事件随时可能被他改变。他不断创造自己的经验。他不断形成过去的事件，正如他形成当下和未来的事件一样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The entity in this case would be compared to the mind. The brain would be more or less what it is, that is, the brain of the present personality existing on a camouflaged plane. As the brain gives orders and communicates messages to the various parts of the physical body, so would the mind or entity do in like manner. The mind would contain all data having to do with past existences and intertwining purposes, problems and relationships, but it would only give such data to the brain as was necessary for its present existence.
quotes.translation: 在此情况下，存有可比作心智。大脑则或多或少保持其本质，即存在于伪装层面上的当下人格的大脑。正如大脑向身体各部位下达指令并传递信息，心智或存有也以类似方式运作。心智将包含所有与过去存在及交织的目的、问题和关系相关的数据，但只将当下存在所必需的数据传递给大脑。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: A simple tree deals with the nature of probabilities as it thrusts forward into new seeds. Computations go on constantly within it, and that communication involves an inner kind of language innocent of symbols and vowels. The tree knows its present and future history,7 in your terms, but it understands a future that is not preordained. It feels its own power in the present as it constructs that future. In deeper terms the tree's seeds also realize that there is a future there -- a variety of futures toward which they grope.
quotes.translation: 一棵简单的树在向前推进新种子时，处理着或然性的本质。其内部持续进行着计算，这种沟通涉及一种内在的语言，不含符号和元音。树知道它的当下和未来历史，以你们的说法而言，但它理解的未来并非预先注定的。它在构建那个未来时，感受到自己在当下的力量。从更深层次来说，树的种子也意识到那里有一个未来——它们所摸索的多种未来。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: That is, not only would they be aware of what seems to you to be past, present and future within your system, but they would be aware of several other systems and be able to function within them simultaneously, gaining and creating experience within all of these systems, even while maintaining overall identity. They would be conscious, for example, of themselves as, say, an entity, and simultaneously they would be aware of separate existences as individuals in various systems. This is as far as we can carry this at present.
quotes.translation: 也就是说，他们不仅会意识到你们系统内看似过去、现在和未来的事物，还会意识到其他几个系统，并能在这些系统中同时运作，在所有系统中获取和创造经验，同时保持整体身份。例如，他们会意识到自己作为一个存有，同时也会意识到自己在不同系统中作为个体的独立存在。这是目前我们能阐述的极限。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Imagine vividly what you will do tomorrow, and in detail plan a probable day that will rise naturally from your present experience, behavior, and purposes. Follow through as you did with the first part of the exercise. (Pause.) That day's reality is already anticipated by your cells. Your body has prepared for it, all of its functions precognitively projecting their own existences into it. Your "future" life exists in the same manner, and in your terms grows as much out of your present as tomorrow grows out of your today.
quotes.translation: 生动地想象你明天将做什么，详细规划一个可能的日子，让它自然地从你现在的经验、行为和目的中升起。像你做练习的第一部分那样跟进。（停顿）那天的现实已经被你的细胞预知了。你的身体已经为它做好了准备，它所有的功能都预知性地将自己的存在投射到其中。你的"未来"生命以同样的方式存在，用你们的话说，它从你的现在中生长出来，就像明天从你的今天中生长出来一样。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The uniqueness that is your own personality is to be cherished. It has (underlined) a meaning. You have no more right to crush it than you have to crush a flower. The particular purpose of your present (underlined) personality can only be met in the present circumstances, in the way that is best overall. The challenges can be met at another time and in another life, this is true, but the particular people that you can help and the particular good that you can do, can never be done in precisely (underlined) the same way.
quotes.translation: 你人格的独特性值得珍惜。它有（下划线）意义。你没有权利摧毁它，就像你没有权利摧毁一朵花一样。你当前（下划线）人格的特定目的只能在当前环境中实现，以整体最佳的方式。挑战可以在另一个时间、另一世中面对，这是真的，但你能帮助的特定人群和你能做的特定善事，永远无法以完全相同（下划线）的方式完成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In dreaming, such a dissociated state as Ruburt reached is of course the rule, only here the ability is used to form the dream images. But these dream images work for the entity as a whole and serve as a means for the various personalities to communicate. That is, in many cases for the previous incarnated personalities to correspond with the present personality. It is a means of acquainting the present personality with its past and also of reminding it of its goals, without disturbing that blatant awake ego.
quotes.translation: 在梦境中，鲁柏达到的那种分离状态当然是常态，只是在这里，这种能力被用来形成梦境影像。但这些梦境影像为整个存有服务，并作为不同人格之间沟通的手段。也就是说，在许多情况下，是前世的化身人格与当前人格进行交流。这是一种让当前人格了解其过去并提醒其目标的方式，同时不会干扰那个张扬的清醒自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This should be of benefit. Also the slow breathing habits you began to acquire with your yoga exercises will be beneficial. Giving up the smoking habit will also help you in this respect. You are strongly intuitive and very quick, but you can learn to have a more relaxed body. A fear has been developed by the present personality resulting directly from early circumstances. Ruburt is afraid that if he does not operate quickly he will be symbolically caught and crippled as is the case with his present mother.
quotes.translation: 这应该会有帮助。此外，你通过瑜伽练习开始养成的缓慢呼吸习惯也会有益。戒烟习惯在这方面也会帮助你。你直觉强烈且反应迅速，但你可以学会让身体更放松。当前人格因早期环境直接发展出了一种恐惧。鲁柏害怕如果他不能快速行动，就会像他现在的母亲那样被象征性地困住和残废。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: All of the probabilities practically possible in human development are therefore present to some extent or another in each individual. Any biological or spiritual advancement that you might imagine will of course not come from any outside agency, but from within the heritage of consciousness made flesh. Generally, those alive in this century chose a particular kind of orientation. The species chose to specialize in certain kinds of physical manipulation, to devote its energies in certain directions. Those directions have brought forth a reality unique in its own fashion. Man has not driven himself down a blind alley, in other words. He has been studying the nature of his consciousness -- using it as if it were apart from the rest of nature, and therefore seeing nature and the world in a particular light.6 That light has finally made him feel isolated, alone, and to some extent relatively powerless (intently).
quotes.translation: 因此，人类发展中所有实际可能的概率都在某种程度上存在于每个个体中。你能想象的任何生物或灵性进步当然不会来自任何外部机构，而是来自意识化为血肉的传承。一般来说，这个世纪活着的人选择了一种特定的取向。这个物种选择专注于某种物理操作，将其能量投入某些方向。这些方向产生了一种独特形式的现实。换句话说，人类并没有把自己逼入死胡同。他一直在研究自己意识的本质——将其视为与自然其他部分分离的来使用，因此以特定的视角看待自然和世界。那束光最终让他感到孤立、孤独，并在某种程度上相对无力（专注地）。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Each system, of course, brings forth its own culture, "technology," art, and science. The physical body is basically equipped to maintain itself as a healthy long-living organism far beyond your present understanding, medically speaking. The cellular comprehension8 provides all kinds of inner therapeutics that operate quite naturally. There is a physical give-and-take between the body and environment beyond that which you recognize; an inner dynamics here that escapes you, that unites the health of plants, animals, and men. In the most simple and mundane of examples, if you are living in a fairly well-balanced, healthy environment, your houseplants and your animals will also be well. You form your environment and you are a part of it. You react to it, often forgetting that relationship. Ideally, the body has the capacity to keep itself in excellent health -- but beyond that, to maintain itself at the highest levels of physical achievement. The exploits of your greatest athletes give you a hint of the body's true capacity. In your system of beliefs, however, those athletes must train and focus all of their attention in that direction, often at the expense of other portions of their own experience. But their performances show you what the body is capable of.
quotes.translation: 当然，每个系统都会衍生出自身的文化、"科技"、艺术与科学。从医学角度而言，肉体本质上具备维持自身作为健康长寿有机体的能力，远超你们当前的理解。细胞层面的认知蕴含着各种自然运作的内在疗愈机制。身体与环境之间存在超越你们认知的物质交换——一种你们尚未察觉的内在动力学，将植物、动物与人类的健康联结在一起。举个最寻常的例子：若你生活在相当平衡健康的环境中，你的室内植物与宠物也会状态良好。你们塑造环境，同时亦是环境的一部分。你们对环境的反应，往往遗忘了这层关联。理想状态下，身体有能力维持绝佳健康——不仅如此，更能将自身维持在最高层次的体能成就。顶尖运动员的壮举已向你们暗示了身体的真实潜能。然而在你们的信念体系里，这些运动员必须将所有注意力聚焦于训练方向，往往以牺牲其他体验为代价。但他们的表现向你们展示了身体的可能性。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Your now (underlined), or present moment, is a psychological platform. It seems that the universe began with an initial burst of energy of some kind (the "big bang"). Evolutionists cannot account for its cause. Many religious people believe that a god exists in a larger dimension of reality, and that he created the universe while being himself outside of it. He set it into motion. Many individuals, following either persuasion, believe that regardless of its source, the [universe]1 must run out of energy. Established science is quite certain that no energy can now be created or destroyed, but only transformed (as stated in the first law of thermodynamics). Science sees energy and matter as being basically the same thing, appearing differently under varying circumstances.
quotes.translation: 你们的"当下"（划线强调），或说当下时刻，是一个心理平台。宇宙似乎始于某种初始能量爆发（"大爆炸"）。进化论者无法解释其成因。许多宗教信徒相信，神存在于更大维度的实相中，祂在创造宇宙时自身处于宇宙之外，并启动了宇宙的运行。无论持哪种观点，许多人都认为宇宙无论其源头为何，终将耗尽能量。主流科学确信能量既不能被创造也不能被消灭，只能转化（如热力学第一定律所述）。科学视能量与物质为本质相同之物，在不同情境下呈现不同形态。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I have also discussed reincarnation in terms of environment because many schools of thought over-emphasize the effects of reincarnational existences, so that often they explain present-life circumstances as a result of rigid and uncompromising patterns determined in a "past" life. You will feel relatively incompetent to handle present physical reality, to alter your environment, to affect and change your world, if you feel that you are at the mercy of conditions over which you have no control.
quotes.translation: 我也曾从环境角度讨论过转世，因为许多思想学派过度强调转世存在的影响，以致常将今生境遇解释为"前世"刻板僵化模式的结果。若你觉得自己受制于无法掌控的条件，便会感到相对无力处理当前物质实相、改变环境、影响并改造你的世界。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It would have been quite possible for you as a race to have chosen any other "series" of neurological pulses, or messages, as the "real" ones, and to structure your experience along different lines. The biological structure and the mental consciousness together, however, chose the most comfortable sequence in which a present area of activity, brought about by neurological recognition, would be backed up by unconscious mental knowledge and other biologically invisible neurological connections.
quotes.translation: 作为人类种族，你们本可选择任何其他"系列"的神经脉冲或讯息作为"真实"讯息，并沿不同脉络构建经验。然而生物结构与意识心智共同选择了最舒适的序列——由神经认知引发的当前活动领域，将得到无意识心智知识及其他生物层面不可见的神经联结的支持。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: (Slowly:) Only because these units have their source outside of space and time is the present corporal reality a triumph of probabilities. Period. Your present image, for example, seems to be the only one possible for you, permanently yours for your lifetime at least; and what happens to it appears almost inevitable. If you become ill, say, you may wonder why, and yet once illness has happened it becomes part of the body's reality, and seems almost like an inevitable part of its experience.
quotes.translation: （缓慢地：）正因这些单元源于时空之外，当前物质实相才成为概率的胜利。句号。例如，你们当前的形相看似是唯一可能属于你的形相，至少终生永驻；而发生在它身上的事几乎显得不可避免。若你生病了，或许会追问缘由，然而一旦疾病发生，它便成为身体实相的一部分，仿佛是其经验中不可避免的片段。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 684
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: It may be another version of yourself. We will discuss ways of distinguishing between these. A man may suddenly disappear, and to be replaced by a small girl, a nonsensical development to the logical mind. Yet the girl could be the form of the man's previous or future reincarnated self. The unity, you see, is different. Basically perception of the spacious present is naturally available. It is your nervous and physical mechanism which acts as a limiting device, and also as a focusing device. By limiting many otherwise available perceptions it forces you to focus upon what you can perceive with greater intensity.
quotes.translation: 那可能是你的另一个版本。我们将讨论区分它们的方法。一个人可能突然消失，被一个小女孩取代——这对逻辑心智而言是荒谬的发展。然而这女孩可能是该男子前世或来世转世自我的形态。你看，其统一性是不同的。本质上，对广阔当下的感知是自然可及的。是你们的神经与生理机制既充当限制装置，又充当聚焦装置。通过限制许多本可获得的感知，它迫使你们以更高强度聚焦于所能感知的事物。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: What about the cycles of history? You spoke of these I believe a few days ago. What about the spacious present and your quasars? What about your spacious present and the predictions, for example, of Nostradamus? What about the spacious present and its connection with evolution? All of these questions follow naturally, and should be here answered.
quotes.translation: 历史的循环又如何？我相信你几天前曾提及这些。那广袤的当下与你的类星体又是什么关系？广袤的当下与诺查丹玛斯的预言之间有何关联？广袤的当下与进化论又如何连接？这些问题自然接踵而至，在此应当予以解答。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The most negative projection or prophecy seems to be the most practical one; when you are reading of the world's ills, you say in all honesty, and with no humor: "How can I ignore the reality, the destructive reality, of the present?" In the most practical, immediate, mundane terms, however, you and your world are in that moment naturally and physically safe, as your bodily senses immediately perceive. In the most basic of bodily terms you are not reacting to present conditions.
quotes.translation: 最负面的投射或预言似乎最显务实；当你读到世间苦难时，会毫无幽默感地真诚说道："我怎能忽视当下这毁灭性的现实？"然而从最实际、最直接、最世俗的角度看，你和你的世界在那一刻本就处于自然与物理的安全中，正如你身体感官即刻感知的那样。在最基本的身体层面，你并未对当下状况做出反应。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Your consciousness is not a thing that you possess. Your individuality is not a thing with limits. If you ask, "What is my individuality in all of this?" or, "Which 'I' am I?" then you are automatically thinking of yourself as a psychological entity with definite boundaries that must be protected at all costs. You may say, "I was born in a house on a certain street in a certain town, and no present belief to the contrary will change that fact." If, in the present, one past event can be altered within your neuronal structure, however, then basically no event is safe from such change.
quotes.translation: 你的意识并非你拥有的物件。你的个体性也非有界限之物。若你追问"这一切中我的个体性何在？"或"哪个'我'才是我？"那你便自动将自己视为必须不惜代价保护其明确边界的心理实体。你或许会说："我出生在某镇某街某栋房子里，任何当下的相反信念都无法改变这个事实。"然而，若当下某个过去事件能在你的神经元结构中被改变，那么本质上就没有任何事件能免受此类改变。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In essence you see the past can be changed. Present actions can change future events that would otherwise occur. But when this is admitted, then we must admit also that present events can alter the past, for there is no element in the past that has a different structure or composition or characteristic, that is not present in the future.
quotes.translation: 本质上你看到过去可以被改变。当下的行动能改变原本会发生的未来事件。但承认这点后，我们必须也承认当下事件能改变过去，因为过去中没有任何元素具有与未来不同的结构、组成或特性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Present and future experience of those in the room are available to me, and as real as their present experience. Therefore I must remember what they think has already happened, or not yet occurred, for to me it is one. These patterns of activity, however, are also constantly changing. I say for example that I am aware of their past and future actions and thoughts; and yet what I am aware of, actually, are ever-shifting and changing patterns, both in the future and in the past.
quotes.translation: 房间里诸位当下的未来体验对我而言同样可得，且与他们的当下体验同样真实。因此我必须记住他们自认为已发生或尚未发生之事——因为对我而言它们本为一体。然而这些活动模式也在持续变化。举例而言，我说我能感知他们过去与未来的行动和思想；但实际上我所感知的，是未来与过去中不断流转变化的模式。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: A new belief in the present, however, can cause changes in the past on a neuronal level. You must understand that basically time is simultaneous. Present beliefs can indeed alter the past. In some cases of healing, in the spontaneous disappearance of cancer, for instance, or of any other disease, certain alterations are made that affect cellular memory, genetic codes, or neuronal patterns in the past.
quotes.translation: 然而，当下某个新信念能在神经元层面引发过去的改变。你必须明白时间本质上是同时性的。当下的信念确实能改变过去。在某些疗愈案例中——例如癌症或其他疾病的自发消失——某些改变被做出，影响了过去的细胞记忆、基因编码或神经元模式。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: When in such dreams your perceptions seem exceedingly clear, you can be certain that the inner ego is operating. Now all portions of the personality, of the present personality, belong to this inner ego. It functions constantly, and yet it is always in a state of becoming. It is more than what you are at any given moment in your time. It contains, and j^, the psychological blueprint containing the full potential of the present personality within any given incarnation.
quotes.translation: 当你在这样的梦境中感知异常清晰时，可以肯定内在自我正在运作。现在，人格的所有部分——当前人格的所有部分——都属于这个内在自我。它持续运作，却始终处于"成为"的状态。它远不止你在时间中任何特定时刻所是的那个你。它包含并就是心理蓝图，其中蕴含着任何特定转世中当前人格的全部潜能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Knowing your reincarnational background, but not knowing the true nature of your present self, is useless. You cannot justify or rationalize present circumstances by saying, "This is because of something I did in a past life," for within yourself now is the ability to change negative influences. You may have brought negative influences into your life for a given reason, but the reason always has to do with understanding, and understanding removes those influences.
quotes.translation: 知道你的转世背景，却不知晓当前自我的真实本质，这是毫无用处的。你不能通过说"这是因为我在前世做了某事"来合理化或辩解当前境况，因为现在你自身就拥有改变负面影响的能力。你可能出于某个特定原因将负面影响带入生活，但这个原因始终与理解有关，而理解会消除那些影响。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I have used the phrase "moment of reflection" several times because it is another attribute peculiar to the conscious mind and, again in your terms, is largely denied to the rest of creaturehood. Without that pause -- in which man can remember past in the present, and envisage a future -- natural guilt would have no meaning. Man would not be able to recall past acts, judge them against the present situation, or imagine the future sense of guilt that might result.
quotes.translation: 我多次使用"反思时刻"这个短语，因为这是意识心智独有的另一特质，用你们的说法，这在其他生物中基本被剥夺。没有那个停顿——人类在其中能于当下回忆过去并展望未来——自然的内疚感将毫无意义。人类将无法回忆过去的行为，对照当前情境进行判断，或想象未来可能产生的内疚感。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: There are no limits to the types of projections that can occur, basically speaking, for there are no limitations to the self, and a projection is an extension of the self. Your present existence is of course a projection. Activities based upon the framework of your present existence must be initiated within a system of chemicals and physical properties which make physical existence possible.
quotes.translation: 基本上来说，投射的类型没有限制，因为自我没有限制，而投射是自我的延伸。你们当前的存在当然也是一种投射。基于当前存在框架的活动，必须在使物质存在成为可能的化学与物理属性系统内启动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: For example: It is truer to say that heredity operates from the future backward into the past, than it is to say that it operates from the past into the present. Neither statement would be precisely correct in any case, because your present is a poised balance affected as much by the probable future as the probable past.
quotes.translation: 例如：说遗传从未来向过去运作，比说它从过去向现在运作更为真实。但两种说法在任何情况下都不完全准确，因为你的当下是一个平衡点，既受可能的未来影响，也受可能的过去影响。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 684
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Now, the time in which the inner ego exists is, as you know, the spacious present. The spacious present is the basic time in which the whole self has its existence, but the various portions of that self have their experience in their own time systems, which are the results of their characteristic methods of perception.
quotes.translation: 现在，内在自我存在的时间，如你所知，是广袤的当下。广袤的当下是整体自我存在的基本时间，但该自我的各个部分在其自身的时间系统中拥有体验，这些时间系统是其特有感知方法的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: They are only available however under certain circumstances, for each of them is coded within a specific intensity range. They exist simultaneously with the present personality, but the present personality as a rule cannot pick them up, so to speak. Sometimes there is a bleed through however. Also, the chemical nature of certain emotional experiences may cause a freak electrical storm within the identity system, so that a past life may suddenly be recalled.
quotes.translation: 然而，它们只在特定条件下才可被获取，因为每个都编码在特定的强度范围内。它们与当前人格同时存在，但可以说，当前人格通常无法接收它们。不过有时会有渗透现象。此外，某些情感体验的化学性质可能在身份系统内引发异常的电暴，使得某一前世突然被忆起。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: But this is the only reality that can be granted to the present. I am speaking now in your terms only, and this point should be clearly understood, for I am simplifying conditions considerably. A change of attitude, a new association, any of innumerable other actions, will automatically set up new electromagnetic connections, and break others. Now part of this we shall explain later, for these changes obviously affect both the future and the past. But the past, again, is continually changed by you, and by every individual. For basically you see, it is not something done and finished with, as is supposed.
quotes.translation: 但这是唯一能被赋予当下的实相。我现在仅以你们的说法而言，这一点必须清楚理解，因为我正在大幅简化情况。态度的改变、新的联想、任何无数其他行动，都会自动建立新的电磁连接，并打破其他连接。这部分我们稍后会解释，因为这些变化显然同时影响未来和过去。但过去，再次强调，是被你们和每个个体持续改变的。因为从根本上说，它并非如人们所想的那样是已完成和结束的事情。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Which you? Which world? If you are lonely it is because you believe in your loneliness in this present point that you acknowledge as time. From what seems to be the past you draw only those memories that reinforce your condition, and you project those into the future. Physically, you are overwhelming your body as it responds to a state of loneliness through chemical and hormonal reactions. You are also denying your own point of action within the present.
quotes.translation: 哪个你？哪个世界？如果你感到孤独，那是因为在你承认的时间这个当下点，你相信自己的孤独。从看似是过去的地方，你只提取那些强化你状况的记忆，并将它们投射到未来。在身体层面，当你的身体通过化学和荷尔蒙反应回应孤独状态时，你正在压倒它。你也在否认自己在当下的行动点。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In our next chapter I will speak of these in some detail. For now it is sufficient to realize that specific steps, definite alterations, occur as consciousness is shifted from the exterior to the interior reality, and that these changes are not random; that consciousness leaves through a very predictable route to its many destinations. Through the ages the Speakers have taught dreamers how to manipulate in these other environments. They have taught them how to bring back information that could be used for the good of the present personality. According to the intent, present purpose, and development, an individual may be aware of these travels to varying degrees. Some have excellent recall, for example, but often misinterpret their experience because of conscious ideas.
quotes.translation: 在下一章中，我将详细讨论这些。目前只需认识到，当意识从外在实相转向内在实实时，会发生特定的步骤和明确的改变，这些改变并非随机；意识会沿着一条非常可预测的路径离开，前往它的众多目的地。历代以来，传讯者教导做梦者如何在这些其他环境中运作。他们教导他们如何带回可用于当前人格福祉的信息。根据意图、当前目的和发展程度，个体可能在不同程度上意识到这些旅程。例如，有些人有极好的回忆，但常常因意识观念而误解自己的体验。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You do not understand the communications between your selves and pets, for example, where in their own way they interpret and react to your beliefs.* They mirror your ideas, then, and so become vulnerable as they would not be in their natural circumstances. In greater terms their relationship with you is natural, of course, but their innate realization that the creature's point of power is in the present is to some degree undermined by their own receptivity and translation of your beliefs. A young kitten is treated differently than an older one. The cat responds to such conditioning. In the same way your own conclusions about age become fact in your experience. In line with them, if you could convince yourself that you were ten years younger, or ten years older, then it would be faithfully reflected in your personal environment.
quotes.translation: 例如，你不理解自己和宠物之间的沟通，它们以自己的方式解读你的信念并做出反应。*它们于是映照出你的想法，因此变得脆弱，而在自然环境中它们本不会如此。从更大层面来说，它们与你的关系当然是自然的，但它们天生认识到生物的力量点在于当下，这一认知在某种程度上被它们对你信念的接收和翻译所削弱。小猫受到的对待与老猫不同。猫会对此类条件作用做出反应。同样，你关于年龄的结论会成为你经验中的事实。与之相应，如果你能说服自己年轻十岁或年长十岁，那么这就会忠实地反映在你的个人环境中。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

related_concepts.name_en: The point of power is in the present

quotes.text: The point of all this is that these units are unpredictable, and fulfill all probabilities of consciousness. Any concepts of gods or other beings that are based upon limited ideas of personhood will ultimately be futile. You view the fantastic variety of physical life -- its animals, insects, birds, fish, man and all his works -- with hardly a qualm; yet you must understand that the nature of consciousness itself is far more varied, and you must learn to think of an inner reality that is as infinite as the exterior one. These concepts alone do alter your present consciousness, and change it in degree. The present idea of the soul, you see, is a "primitive" idea that can scarcely begin to explain the creativity or reality from which mankind's being comes. You are multipersons (intently). You exist in many times and places at once. You exist as one person, simultaneously. This does not deny the independence of the persons, but your inner reality straddles their reality, while it also serves as a psychic world in which they can grow.3
quotes.translation: 这一切的关键在于，这些单位是不可预测的，并实现意识的所有可能性。任何基于有限人格观念的神祇或其他存有的概念最终都是徒劳的。你以几乎毫无疑虑的态度看待物质生命的奇妙多样性——其动物、昆虫、鸟类、鱼类、人类及其所有作品——然而你必须明白，意识本身的本质远为多样，你必须学会思考一个与外在实相同样无限的内在实相。仅这些概念就会改变你当前的意识，并在程度上改变它。你看，当前关于灵魂的观念是一种"原始"观念，几乎无法开始解释人类存有所源自的创造力或实相。你们是多重人格（专注地）。你们同时存在于许多时间和地点。你们同时作为一个个体存在。这并不否认各个人格的独立性，但你们的内在实相跨越了它们的实相，同时它也是一个它们可以在其中成长的心灵世界。3
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 683
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The CU's, forming the structure later in its entirety, form all the atoms, molecules, cells, and organs that make up your world. Land changes and alterations of species are conditions brought about in line with overall patterns that involve all species, or land and water masses, at any given "time." There is a great organization of consciousness involved on such occasions -- sometimes creative cataclysms, in which, again from its own precognitive information, nature brings about those situations best suited to its needs. Such biological precognition is firmly based in the chromosomes and genes, and reflected in the cells. As mentioned earlier (in the 684tb session), the present corporal structure of any physical body of any kind is maintained only because of the cells' innate precognitive abilities. To the self the future, of course, is not experienced as future. It is simply one of the emerging conditions of an experienced Now (you had better capitalize that). The cells' practically felt "Now" includes, then, what you would think of as past and future, as simple conditions of Nowness. They maintain the body's structure in your poised time only by manipulating themselves in a rich medium of probabilities. There is a constant give-and-take of communication between the cell as you know it in present time, and the cell as it "was" in the past, or "will be."
quotes.translation: 形成后续整体结构的CU，构成了组成你们世界的所有原子、分子、细胞与器官。陆地的变迁与物种的演化，是在任何特定"时间"涉及所有物种或水陆块体的整体模式下产生的状况。此类事件中存在着庞大的意识组织——有时是创造性的剧变，自然再次凭借其自身的预知信息，创造出最符合自身需求的情境。这种生物预知深深植根于染色体与基因中，并在细胞中得以反映。如先前（第684节）所述，任何形态的物理身体之所以能维持当前肉身结构，完全仰赖细胞与生俱来的预知能力。对自体而言，未来当然不会被体验为未来，它只是体验中的"当下"（你最好大写）的涌现状态之一。因此，细胞实际感知的"当下"包含了你们视为过去与未来的状态，这些状态不过是"当下性"的简单面向。它们仅通过在概率的丰沛媒介中调整自身，来在你们悬置的时间中维持身体结构。在你们认知的当下时间中的细胞，与"过去"或"将来"的细胞之间，存在着持续不断的交流互动。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 690
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The thought, as an electrical reality, is not subject to the physical laws that bind the physical body. The durability of the thought as an electrical act is determined by its initial electric charge. This electric charge can propel the thought, as an electrical action, through the apparent dimensions of your physical time in such a manner that it can exist simultaneously within your past and your present. Because a thought, as electric action, may exist both within your past and your present, this is not to say that it becomes two electric actions, one existing in the past and one existing in the future. Rather the one electric action or thought is simultaneously projected, through a peculiarity of its axis, so that it appears within your field, not in two places at once, but in two times at once.
quotes.translation: 作为电性实相的思想，不受束缚物理身体的物理法则制约。思想作为电性行为的持久性，由其初始电荷决定。这种电荷能使思想作为电性行为，穿透你们物理时间的显见维度，以同时存在于你们的过去与现在的方式推进。由于思想作为电性行为可能同时存在于你们的过去与现在，这并非意味着它分裂为两个电性行为——一个存在于过去，一个存在于未来。而是说，这个单一的电性行为或思想，通过其轴线的特殊性被同时投射，使其出现在你们的场域中时，并非同时处于两个空间位置，而是同时处于两个时间点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: However, with the ego at rest the individual may allow communications and dream constructions through, past the ego barrier, in such a manner that he becomes in some ways free. If for example his present expectations are faulty, when the ego rests he may recreate a time when expectations were high. The resulting dream will then partially break the circle of poor expectations, with their shoddy physical constructions, and start such an individual along a more beneficial path. In other words, such a dream may begin to transform the physical environment through lifting inner expectation.
quotes.translation: 然而，当自我处于休憩状态时，个体可能允许通讯与梦境建构穿越自我屏障，从而在某些方面获得自由。例如，若其当前预期存在缺陷，当自我休憩时，他可能重新创造出一个预期高涨的时期。由此产生的梦境将部分打破不良预期的循环（及其拙劣的物理建构），引导该个体踏上更有利的路径。换言之，这样的梦境可能通过提升内在预期，开始转化物理环境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Each character, however, or portion of a scene, would represent in fragmented form another quite valid program [or reality, in brackets]. In the dream state, then, you are sometimes aware of too many stations. When you try to make them fit into your recognized picture of reality, they may seem chaotic. There are ways to bring the picture into focus: There are ways to tune into those other quite-natural frequencies, so that they present you with a more expansive view both of the world as you define it, and of its greater aspects. Period. The psyche is not encased, in your case (amused), within a frame too fragile to express it. Only your beliefs about the psyche and about the body limit your experience to its present degree.
quotes.translation: 然而，每个角色或场景片段，都会以碎片化形式代表另一个同样有效的程序[或实相，括号内注明]。因此在梦境状态中，你们有时会察觉到过多的频道。当试图将它们纳入你们认可的实相图景时，这些内容可能显得混乱。存在聚焦画面的方法：存在调谐至那些同样自然的频率的方式，使它们向你们呈现更广阔的视野——既包括你们所定义的世界，也包括其更宏大的面向。句号。在你们的情况中（逗趣地），心灵并非被禁锢在过于脆弱而无法表达自身的框架内。唯有你们对心灵与身体的信念，才将体验限制在当前的程度上。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Session 757 was devoted to other matters that Jane and I were interested in.)

quotes.text: When others are present there is simply more energy available. Yet again, such use of energy does not imply a depletion. I am not stealing energy from others. In actuality Ruburt uses the energy, for it is in a form which is more accessible to him than to me. There is a pooling of energy in such cases, and in such a pooling of energy telepathic communications are facilitated; for the many selves present, in pooling their energy, extend themselves.
quotes.translation: 当他人在场时，只是有更多可用的能量。然而再次强调，这种能量运用并不意味着消耗。我并非在窃取他人的能量。实际上，鲁柏在使用这些能量，因为这种形式对他而言比对我更易获取。在此类情况下存在能量的汇聚，而在这种能量汇聚中，心灵感应通讯得以增强；因为众多在场的自体通过汇聚能量，扩展了自身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Philip should read the sessions dealing particularly with the laws of the universe, that is with the inner laws of the universe, appreciating then the facts that this universe within all universes is spontaneous while having durability.
