It would be backtracking to repeat that long discussion, but as the inner universe has as its attributes spontaneity and durability, and as the spacious present is simultaneous while containing within it all pasts and all presents and all futures, and as Philip understands the meaning of expansion in terms not of time or of space but of value fulfillment, so will he intuitively then grasp that no contradiction occurs with actual reality when I say that there is no beginning and no end.
quotes.translation: 菲利普应阅读特别涉及宇宙法则（即内在宇宙法则）的章节，从而领悟这个万有宇宙中的宇宙既具自发性又具持久性的事实。重复那段冗长讨论将是倒退，但既然内在宇宙的属性是自发与持久，既然广阔当下是同时性的且包含所有过去、现在与未来，既然菲利普理解"价值完成"的扩张并非基于时间或空间维度，那么他直觉上便会领悟：当我说没有开始也没有结束时，这与实际实相并不矛盾。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now it makes no difference, basically, how you present the material, as long as it is presented; whether you let the stream flow on consecutively, one wave at a time, or whether you present it a bucket at a time, scooped up from various places. Pure, sparkling (smile) water is pure sparkling water, and a taste will lead to more when the populace is in a period of drought.
quotes.translation: 现在，无论你如何呈现这些材料，只要呈现出来，本质上并无差别；无论你是让溪流连续流淌，一次一个波浪，还是从各处舀起一桶一桶地呈现。纯净、清澈的（微笑）水就是纯净清澈的水，当民众处于干旱时期时，尝一口就会引发更多需求。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: （John at present is a salesman for Searle Drug. He lives in Williamsport, PA, but has witnessed several sessions. At the date of the 166th session he knew of no drug or pharmaceutical firms in Minneapolis. Visiting us this noon while making his rounds, John told us he had checked up on Seth. He gave us the names and addresses of two drug houses that he learned about in Minneapolis. He had not heard of them, and they are both small companies.
quotes.translation: （约翰目前是西尔制药公司的销售员。他住在宾夕法尼亚州威廉斯波特，但曾见证过几次课程。在第166次课程时，他并不知道明尼阿波利斯有任何药品或制药公司。今天中午他在巡回销售时来访，告诉我们他查证了赛斯。他给了我们两个他在明尼阿波利斯了解到的制药公司的名称和地址。他之前没听说过它们，而且这两家公司都很小。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Now: You must understand that your present is the point at which flesh and matter meet with the spirit. Therefore the present is your point of power in your current lifetime, as you think of it. If you assign greater force to the past, then you will feel ineffective and deny yourself your own energy.
quotes.translation: 现在：你必须明白，你的当下是血肉与物质遇见灵性的交汇点。因此，当下是你当前生命中力量的焦点，正如你所认为的那样。如果你赋予过去更大的力量，那么你会感到无力，并否认自己的能量。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

related_concepts.name_en: The point of power is in the present

quotes.text: The loving acknowledgement of their own uniqueness would in itself show them how to begin to use their own abilities in their own way, and to trust their present situation. The ideal is not yet materialized. It is just the essence of a direction. But that direction can only be found by using what you have in the now that you know, and by acquiescing to your own opportunities and abilities, and using those through the power of the present.
quotes.translation: 对自己独特性的充满爱意的认可，本身就会向他们展示如何开始以自己的方式运用自己的能力，并信任他们当下的处境。理想尚未具体化。它只是一个方向的本质。但那个方向只能通过运用你现在所知的当下所拥有的东西，通过默许你自己的机会和能力，并通过当下的力量来运用它们才能找到。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The other sons are present. On the childlike area of the subconscious you believe your mother mainly responsible for family difficulties. However her defense, which you recognize basically as insincere but superficially correct in this particular instance, was that your father hit her in the chest. You identified with your father, and could not permit, in this dream at any rate, an identification of this kind, since at this childish level you did not blame him and would have wished as a child, to have the power to do the same thing.
quotes.translation: 其他儿子也在场。在潜意识的孩子气层面，你相信母亲对家庭困境负有主要责任。然而，她的辩护——你基本上认为是不真诚的，但在这个特定实例中表面上正确——是你父亲打了她的胸部。你认同你的父亲，并且无法允许——至少在这个梦中——这种认同，因为在这个孩子气的层面上，你没有责怪他，而且作为孩子，你曾希望拥有做同样事情的力量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You cannot react physically in the same way to projected or imagined dangers. There seems to be no possible reaction. You are frustrated. You are meant to deal with your immediate, primary experience, and in so doing you take care of your responsibility. You are able to take action in your own experience, and therefore affect others. You do not have to be ignorant of wars in other corners of the world, or close your eyes. But if you allow those experiences to overcloud your present, valid intersection with reality, then you speak and act from a position not your own, and deny the world whatever benefits your own present version of reality might allow you to give.
quotes.translation: 你无法以同样的方式对投射或想象的危险做出身体反应。似乎没有可能的反应。你感到沮丧。你本应处理你直接的、主要的经验，这样做你就承担了你的责任。你能够在自己的经验中采取行动，从而影响他人。你不必对世界其他角落的战争无知，也不必闭上眼睛。但如果你让那些经验遮蔽你当下与现实的有效的交汇点，那么你说话和行动就会从并非你自己的立场出发，并否认世界可能从你当下版本的现实中能够给予的任何益处。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is best that we work in this manner to begin with, in his home territory. Later it will make no difference if he progresses, as I believe that he will. For the immediate present, and for the immediate present only, such tests should be conducted here. He is concerned too much about the object which your friends are using for the other test, and for now I am afraid that he will unwittingly distort this material in this respect.
quotes.translation: 最好先以这种方式在他的地盘上工作。如果他有所进步——我相信他会——那么日后在哪里进行就无关紧要了。就当前而言，且仅就当前而言，这类测试应在此处进行。他对你们朋友用于另一测试的物品过于在意，恐怕眼下他会在这方面无意中扭曲这份资料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: You must look within yourself for evidences of what you want in terms of positive experience. Examine your past with that in mind. Imagine your future from the power point of the present. In such a way at least you are not using the past to reinforce your limitations, or projecting them into the future. It is only natural to contrast what you want with what you have, and it is very easy to become discouraged in so doing, but looking for errors in the past will not help you. A correctly utilized five-minute period of time can be of great benefit, however. In this period concentrate upon the fact that the point of power is now. Feel and dwell upon the certainty that your emotional, spiritual and psychic abilities are focused through the flesh, and for five minutes only direct all of your attention toward what you want. Use visualization or verbal thought -- whatever comes most naturally to you; but for that period do not concentrate upon any lacks, just upon your desire.
quotes.translation: 你必须在内心寻找你想要的东西的证据，以积极体验为尺度。带着这个念头审视你的过去。从当下的力量点想象你的未来。这样，至少你不会用过去来强化你的局限，或将它们投射到未来。将你想要的与你拥有的进行对比是很自然的，这样做时很容易气馁，但寻找过去的错误对你没有帮助。然而，正确利用的五分钟时间可以带来巨大益处。在这段时间里，专注于力量点就在当下这个事实。感受并沉浸于这样的确定性：你的情感、灵性和通灵能力都通过肉体聚焦，并且只在这五分钟内，将你所有的注意力直接导向你想要的东西。使用可视化或言语思维——任何对你最自然的方式；但在这段时间内，不要专注于任何匮乏，只专注于你的渴望。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

related_concepts.name_en: The point of power is in the present

quotes.text: In terms of personality as you understand it, the individual chooses the abilities he or she will have, and the life challenges. In the present then each person has unlimited opportunity to draw upon the entity's energy, and the understanding and powers of all of its parts. (Long pause.) It goes without saying that any human being possesses the latent ability shown by a great artist or athlete, or statesman or philosopher. Within creaturehood there are wide ranges of abilities; these may be seldom used, but they are there as practical ideals that can be expressed within that system. In the same way, every individual possesses the abilities of its entity in latent form. These too serve as practical ideals, but in a different kind of context, for you have other centuries to play with and many existences instead of one.
quotes.translation: 就你所理解的人格而言，个体选择他或她将拥有的能力，以及生命的挑战。因此在当下，每个人都有无限的机会汲取存有的能量，以及其所有部分的理解和力量。（长停顿。）不言而喻，任何人类都拥有伟大艺术家、运动员、政治家或哲学家所展现的潜在能力。在生物性之内，存在着广泛的能力范围；这些能力可能很少被使用，但它们作为可以在该系统中表达的实践理想而存在。同样地，每个个体都以潜在形式拥有其存有的能力。这些也作为实践理想，但在不同的背景下，因为你有其他世纪可以玩味，并且有许多存在而非只有一个。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: (Slowly:) I told you once that there were pulses of activity in which you blinked off and on -- this applying even to atomic and subatomic particles.1 "You" assign as real -- present here and now -- only that activity that is your signal. "You" are not aware of the others. When people think in terms of one self, they of course identify with one body. You know that the cellular structure of it changes constantly. The body is at any given moment, however, a mass conglomeration of energy formed from that rich bank of probable activity. The body is not stable in the terms usually thought of. On deeper biological levels the cells straddle probabilities, and trigger responses. Consciousness rides upon and within the pulses mentioned earlier, and forms its own organizations of identity. Each probability -- probable only in relation to and from the standpoint of another probability -- is inviolate, however, in that it is not destroyed. Once formed, the pattern will follow its own nature.
quotes.translation: （缓慢地：）我曾告诉过你，存在着活动的脉冲，在其中你闪烁开合——这甚至适用于原子和亚原子粒子。1 “你”只将作为你信号的活动指派为真实——当下此地。“你”对其他活动毫无察觉。当人们以单一自我的概念思考时，他们当然会认同一个身体。你知道它的细胞结构不断变化。然而，身体在任何给定时刻，都是由那个丰富的可能活动库形成的能量大杂烩。身体并非通常认为的那样稳定。在更深的生物学层面上，细胞跨越可能性，并触发反应。意识骑乘在之前提到的脉冲之上和之内，并形成自己的身份组织。每个可能性——仅相对于另一个可能性的立场而言是可能的——都是不可侵犯的，因为它不会被摧毁。一旦形成，模式将遵循其自身的本性。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 681
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Give us a moment ... Selfhood overspills with great luxurious outcroppings, yet you jealously guard against such creativity. To a certain extent you do carry the knowledge of your forefathers within your [cells'] chromosomes,1 which present a pattern that is not rigid but flexible -- one that in codified fashion endows you with the subjective living experience of those who, in your terms, have gone before. As Ruburt recently suspected, some very old cultures have been aware of this.2 Period. While being independent individuals their members also identified with their ancestors to some extent, accepting them as portions of their selfhoods. This does not mean that the individual self was less, but was more aware of its own reality. A completely different kind of focus was presented, in which the ancestors were understood to contribute to the "new" experience of the living; one in which the physically focused consciousness clearly saw itself as perceiving the world for itself, but also for all of those who had gone before -- (gradually louder for emphasis:) while realizing that in those terms he or she would contribute as well as the generations past.
quotes.translation: 给我们一点时间……自我性以丰盛的涌现溢出，然而你嫉妒地防范着这种创造力。在某种程度上，你确实将祖先的知识携带在你的[细胞]染色体中，1 这呈现出一个并非僵化而是灵活的模式——一个以编码方式赋予你那些，用你的话说，已逝者主观生活体验的模式。正如鲁柏最近怀疑的那样，一些非常古老的文化已经意识到这一点。2 句号。虽然作为独立个体，他们的成员也在某种程度上认同他们的祖先，将他们接受为自我性的部分。这并不意味着个体自我更少，而是更意识到自己的实相。呈现了一种完全不同的焦点，其中祖先被理解为对“新”的活着体验有所贡献；一个焦点，其中物理聚焦的意识清楚地看到自己为自己感知世界，但也为所有已逝者感知世界——（逐渐提高音量以强调：）同时意识到，用那些话说，他或她也将像过去的世代一样做出贡献。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 731
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Past associations merge with present reality and form a pattern. Mentally, a part of you actually starts out upon each street -- a projected mental image. Period. As you stand there, then, in this case two such projected images go out onto streets Three and Four. To some extent these images experience "what will happen" if you yourself take one direction or the other. That information is returned to you instantaneously, and you make your decision accordingly. Say you choose Street Four. Physically you begin to walk in that direction. Street Four becomes your physical reality. You accept that experience in your prime sequence of events. You have, however, already sent out an energized mental image of yourself into Street Three, and you cannot withdraw that energy.
quotes.translation: 过去的联想与当下的现实融合，形成一个模式。在心理上，你的一部分实际上踏上了每条街道——一个投射的心理图像。句号。当你站在那里时，在这种情况下，两个这样的投射图像分别进入三号街和四号街。在某种程度上，这些图像体验了如果你自己选择其中一个方向“将会发生什么”。这些信息瞬间返回给你，你据此做出决定。假设你选择了四号街。你在物理上开始朝那个方向走。四号街成为你的物理现实。你在你的主要事件序列中接受那个体验。然而，你已经将你自己的一个充满能量的心理图像发送到三号街，并且你无法撤回那股能量。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 741
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Again, I do not mean to deny the validity of that experience, but to point out its specialized nature. By its nature, however, that precise specialization and tuning of consciousness in to space and time largely precludes other less-specialized encounters with realities. Dreams often present you with what seems to be an ambiguity, an opaqueness, since they lack the immediate impact of psychological activity with space and time. From your viewpoint it seems often that dreams are not events, or that they happen but do not happen. The lack of normal time and space intersections means that you cannot share your dreams with others in the way that you can share waking events. Nor can you remember dream events -- or so it seems -- as you do your normal conscious experience. In actual fact you remember consciously only certain highlighted events of your lives, and ordinary details of your days vanish as dreams seem to.
quotes.translation: 我并非要否认那种经验的有效性，而是要指出其特殊性。然而，意识对时空的这种精确专注与调谐，本质上会大大排除其他较不专门化的现实接触。梦境常常呈现给你看似模糊不清、晦涩难懂的内容，因为它们缺乏心理活动在时空中的直接冲击力。从你的视角来看，梦境往往不像事件，或者它们发生了却又像没发生。缺乏正常时空的交汇点意味着你无法像分享清醒事件那样与他人分享梦境。你似乎也无法像记住正常意识经验那样记住梦境事件。事实上，你只能有意识地记住生活中某些突出事件，而日常的琐碎细节就像梦境一样消逝了。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: "I did briefly give him a message (on October 23, 1981): Attend to what is before you, for it is there for a reason. In each person's life, and in your own, at each and every point of your existence, the solutions to your problems, or the means of achieving those solutions, are always as apparent--or rather as present--within your days as is any given problem itself. What I mean is quite simple: The solutions already exist in your lives. You may not have put them together yet, or organized them in the necessary ways. The solutions in Ruburt's case lie in all of those areas with which you are normally concerned--the mail, the sessions, the psychic abilities. When you attend to what is there with the proper magical attitude of mind, then the altered organizations can take place.
quotes.translation: "我确实简短地给了他一条讯息（1981年10月23日）：关注你眼前的事物，因为它出现在那里自有其缘由。在每个人的生命中，在你自己的生命中，在你存在的每一个时刻，你问题的解决方案，或达成这些方案的方法，总是像任何给定的问题本身一样显而易见——或者更确切地说，一样当下存在。我的意思很简单：解决方案已经存在于你的生活中。你可能尚未将它们整合起来，或以必要的方式组织它们。在鲁柏的情况中，解决方案存在于你通常关注的所有领域——邮件、课程、灵性能力。当你以适当的魔法心态关注眼前的事物时，重组就能发生。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: 7. In Chapter 2 of Dreams, in Volume 1, see Note 1 for Session 885, which we held on October 24, 1979. Through a series of misunderstandings, the people at Ankh-Hermes had published an abridged translation of Seth Speaks without having permission for the cutting from Jane and me. We still feel regret that the company had to go to all of that extra expense in order to publish a second edition of the book. I also wrote that "all concerned must wait for at least another year before a full-length version of Seth Speaks will be published in the Dutch language." Actually, almost two years passed before we received our copies of the new edition.

quotes.text: The part that translates inner data sifts it down through the subconscious, which is a barrier and also a threshold to the present personality as it operates on the camouflage plane. I have mentioned many times how vitality changes as it approaches and forms various planes. I have said that the topmost part of the subconscious contains personal memories. That beneath these are racial memories and so forth. Things are simply not layered in the way I speak of them. But continuing with the necessary analogy, on the other side of （or beneath to you） the racial memories, you no longer exist within your plane, and look out upon another with the face of this other self-conscious part of you. This part receives inner data, is in contact with the entity, to some greater degree than you are in contact with your dreams, and actually directs all the important functions that you think are either automatically controlled, or unconsciously controlled.
quotes.translation: 翻译内在数据的那部分会将其筛选通过潜意识，而潜意识既是屏障，也是通往当前人格的门槛——当人格在伪装层运作时。我曾多次提到生命力在接近并形成各个层面时如何变化。我曾说过，潜意识的最上层包含个人记忆。其下是种族记忆等等。事物并非如我所说的那样层层堆叠。但继续用必要的类比来说，在种族记忆的另一侧（或对你而言在其下方），你不再存在于你的层面中，而是以你内在另一个自我意识部分的面貌向外注视另一个层面。这部分接收内在数据，与存有保持联系——其程度比你与梦境的联系更深入——并实际指导所有你认为要么自动控制、要么无意识控制的重要功能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The material in these last sessions will be basic for further discussions. We are going much deeper into the meaning of reality, and the aspects of reality. Our present procedure is working out very well, and it is enabling me to discuss matters that were too complicated for our earlier method. Before we close I want you to understand that your experiments in psychological time add to your mobility and subconscious manipulation within the electrical universe. And all psychic experience must have reality here, that is, within the electrical system. There is no psychic experience which does not have such electric reality. Your psychological experiments give you familiar ground there to walk upon, to travel on; grounds of reference and even of safety.
quotes.translation: 最后这几节课的材料将成为进一步讨论的基础。我们将更深入地探讨现实的意义和现实的各个面向。我们目前的程序运作得非常好，这使我能够讨论那些对早期方法来说过于复杂的问题。在结束之前，我希望你们明白，你们在心理时间中的实验增加了你们在电性宇宙中的机动性和潜意识操控能力。所有灵性经验都必须在此具有现实性，也就是说，在电性系统内。没有任何灵性经验不具有这样的电性现实。你们的心理实验为你们提供了在那里行走、旅行的熟悉场地；提供了参照系，甚至安全的场地。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now I have told you that you may legitimately visit not only the past, present and future as it existed, or will exist in physical terms; but you may also visit realities which never existed in physical terms. In our earliest sessions I emphasized that the intensity regulated the duration of an experience. Now, many events that were only imagined and never took place, physically speaking, many such events still exist. They are simply not a part of your definition of reality. You may therefore visit a museum which was planned in the 16th century, but never built. Such a museum has a reality as real, you see, as the house in which you live. Ordinarily you only perceive physical reality. In projections you may visit other realities such as these also--which you may be tempted to call imaginary, but they are not.
quotes.translation: 现在，我告诉过你们，你们不仅可以合法地探访过去、现在和未来——无论是物理上存在过的还是将要存在的——还可以探访那些从未在物理上存在过的现实。在我们早期的课程中，我强调强度调节了经验的持续时间。现在，许多只在想象中发生而从未在物理上发生的事件，许多这样的事件仍然存在。它们只是不属于你们对现实的定义。因此，你们可以探访一座在16世纪规划但从未建造的博物馆。这样的博物馆具有与你们居住的房子一样真实的现实。通常你们只感知物理现实。在投射中，你们也可以探访其他这样的现实——你们可能会倾向于称之为想象，但它们并非如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Now. As I have told you, there is duration of a kind. What would correspond, in any case, to your idea of duration within the spacious present ; it is a matter of intensities however. Now the entity is in itself composed of such intensities. Simply for the sake of analogy, imagine the image, a humanoid one, of an entity giant-sized, spread out anywhere in your physical universe. And if the image were projected against a midnight sky, within its apparent boundaries then you would see a multitude of planets and stars. Let these represent moment points. On one hand they are a part of the entity, as your cells are a portion of your body. On the other hand the entity's consciousness can travel through these. They are doorways within his own psychological makeup, into experiences.
quotes.translation: 现在。正如我告诉过你们的，存在某种持续性。在任何情况下，与你们在广阔当下中的持续性概念相对应的，是强度的问题。然而，存有本身由这样的强度构成。仅为了类比，想象一个存有的形象——类人形态，巨人尺寸，散布在你们物理宇宙的任何地方。如果这个形象投射在午夜的天空中，在其明显的边界内，你们会看到众多行星和恒星。让这些代表瞬间点。一方面，它们是存有的一部分，就像你们的细胞是你们身体的一部分。另一方面，存有的意识可以穿行其中。它们是他自身心理构成中的门户，通往各种经验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Individual life, or the life of the present individual, could be legitimately compared to the dream of an entity. While the individual suffers and enjoys his given number of years, these years are but a flash to the entity. The entity is concerned with these years in the same manner that you are concerned with your dreams. As you give inner purpose and organization to your dreams, and as you obtain insight and satisfaction from your dreams though they involve only a part of your life, so the entity to some extent directs and gives purpose and organization to his personalities during their existence. And so does the entity obtain insights and satisfactions from his existing personalities, although no one takes up all of his own attentions.
quotes.translation: 个体生命，或当下个体的生命，可以合理地比作一个存有（entity）的梦境。当个体在既定的岁月中受苦或享乐时，这些岁月对存有而言不过是一闪而过。存有关注这些岁月的方式，就像你关注自己的梦境一样。正如你赋予梦境内在的目的与组织，并从中获得洞见与满足——尽管梦境只涉及你生命的一部分——存有也在某种程度上引导、赋予其人格（personalities）在存在期间的目的与组织。同样，存有也从其存在的人格中获得洞见与满足，尽管没有一个人格能占据它全部的关注。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: They were responsible for the birth of agriculture, as well as industry, the rise and fall of nations, the "glory" that was Rome, and Rome's destruction. (Pause.) Your present technological advances can almost be dated from the [invention of] the printing press, to Edison's inventions, which were flashes of intuition, dream-inspired. But if what I am telling you is true, then it is obvious that when I say that your physical world originated in the world of dreams, I must mean something far different from the usual definition of dream reality. Again, I could choose another term, but I want to emphasize each person's intimate contact with that other reality that does occur in what you think of as the state of dreaming (all very intently).
quotes.translation: 它们（指梦境）负责了农业与工业的诞生、国家的兴衰、罗马的“荣耀”以及罗马的覆灭。（停顿。）你们当前的技术进步几乎可以追溯到印刷术的发明，再到爱迪生的发明——那些是直觉的闪现、受梦境启发的。但如果我告诉你们的这些是真的，那么显然，当我说你们的物质世界起源于梦境世界时，我指的一定与通常对梦境实相的定义截然不同。再次强调，我可以选择另一个术语，但我想强调每个人与那个其他实相的亲密接触——这种接触确实发生在你们所谓的梦境状态中（非常专注地说）。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is far more important that you understand this than that you become overly concerned with labyrinthian "past reasons," for you can get so lost in a negative approach that you forget that these beliefs can be changed in the present. For various reasons, you hold beliefs that you can alter at any time. Many individuals die young, for example, because they believe so strongly that old age represents a degradation of the spirit and an insult to the body. They do not want to live under the conditions as they believe them to be. Some quite frankly prefer to die in what others would consider to be the most dire circumstances -- swept away by the raging waves of an ocean, or crushed in an earthquake, or battered by the winds of a hurricane.
quotes.translation: 理解这一点远比过度纠结于迷宫般的“过去原因”重要得多，因为你们可能会陷入消极的探究方式，以至于忘记这些信念可以在当下被改变。出于各种原因，你们持有一些随时可以改变的信念。例如，许多人英年早逝，是因为他们强烈相信老年是精神的退化与对身体的侮辱。他们不愿活在自己认为的那种条件下。有些人相当坦率地宁愿死在他人眼中最可怕的境况中——被汹涌的海浪卷走，或在地震中被压碎，或被飓风的风暴击打。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The knowledge of probabilities4 brings forth present time and reality. Voices speak through the genes and chromosomes that connect the future and the past in a balance that you call the present form. The history of the private psyche and the mass experience of the species, again, resides in each individual. The archaeology of the past and the future alike is alive within the layers of consciousness that compose your being.
quotes.translation: 对或然性（probabilities）的认知带来了当下时间与实相。声音通过基因与染色体说话，它们将未来与过去连接在一种平衡中，你们称之为当下的形态。私密心灵的历史与物种的集体经验，同样存在于每个个体之中。过去与未来的考古学都活生生地存在于构成你们存有的意识层次之中。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 727
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Clairvoyance exists and is possible because of its basis within the spacious present, and this is not known because man will not accept the available data. Clairvoyance exists because matter and energy are one and the same thing. There is clairvoyance within the organs of the physical body itself, because the organs of the body are not, quote, "just" matter, but energy which has composed itself into matter. Such inner data continually and automatically is accepted by every other portion of the human framework except by the outer ego. Even this outer ego, however, acts all unknowingly often on the basis of such information, which it will not admit it has received; and often such action saves it from dire circumstances.
quotes.translation: 千里眼（clairvoyance）存在且可能，是因为它基于广袤的当下（spacious present），而这一点不为人知，是因为人类不愿接受可用的数据。千里眼存在，是因为物质与能量是同一回事。在物质身体本身的器官中也存在千里眼，因为身体的器官并非“只是”物质，而是能量将自己组合成了物质。这种内在数据持续且自动地被人类框架的每一部分所接受，除了外在自我（outer ego）。然而，即使是这个外在自我，也常常在不知不觉中依据这类它不承认已接收的信息行事；而这类行动往往使它免于可怕的境况。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Ruburt knew that Helper could be sent out to others, to their advantage, and in that regard the form stood for the great power of natural, positive desire and thought patterns. (To me:) You have the same kind of "form." These represent the greater source-selves out of which your present persons spring. I told you that you possessed far more knowledge about your own lives, and the lives of others, than you were intellectually aware of.2 You act on that knowledge, for one thing, when you are born physically, when you grow. The squirrel acts on that kind of knowledge when it buries nuts--as you saw, again, on a recent TV program--and the squirrel's greater knowledge includes the knowledge of its species as well.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏知道，“帮手”（Helper）可以被派往他人那里，对他们有利，而在那方面，这个形态代表了自然、积极欲望与思维模式的巨大力量。（对我说：）你们也有同样的“形态”。这些代表了更大的源头自我（source-selves），你们当下的人格从中涌现。我告诉过你们，你们对自己生命及他人生命所拥有的知识，远比你们理智上意识到的要多。² 你们依据那知识行事——例如，当你们物质地出生、成长时。松鼠在埋坚果时也依据那种知识行事——正如你们最近在电视节目上看到的——而松鼠的更大知识还包括其物种的知识。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: So you look back through the historical past. All of the counterparts alive as contemporaries then form, together, a musical composition in what you think of as a present; and once that multidimensional song is struck then its past ripples out behind it, so to speak, and its future sings "ahead." But the song is being created from its beginning and its end simultaneously. In this case, however, it is as if each note has its own consciousness and is free to change its portion of the melody. Yet all are in the same overall composition, in "time," so that time itself serves as the scale (gesturing) in which the [musical] number is written -- chosen as a matter of organization, focus, and framework.
quotes.translation: 因此你回顾历史过往。所有同时代活着的对应人物共同构成了一首乐曲，存在于你所认为的"当下"；一旦那首多维度的歌曲被奏响，可以说它的过去涟漪般向后扩散，而它的未来则在"前方"歌唱。但这首歌是从起点与终点同时被创造的。在此情况下，仿佛每个音符都拥有自己的意识，并自由改变其旋律片段。然而所有音符都处于同一整体乐章中，在"时间"里——时间本身充当了谱写这首[音乐]数字的音阶（手势示意）——作为组织、焦点与框架的选择。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 735
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Your present methods will simply bring you pat, manufactured results and answers. They will satisfy neither the intellect nor the soul. Since your universe springs from an inner one, and since that inner one pervades each nook and cranny of your own existence, you must look where you have not before -- into the reality of your own minds and emotions. You must look to the natural universe that you know. You must look with your intuitions and creative instincts at the creatures about you, seeing them not as other species with certain habits, not as inferior properties of the earth, to be dissected, but as living examples of the nature of the universe, in constant being and transformation.
quotes.translation: 你们当前的方法只会带来刻板、预设的结果与答案。它们既无法满足理智，也无法满足灵魂。既然你们的宇宙源于内在宇宙，而内在宇宙又渗透于你们存在的每个角落，你们必须看向从未探索之处——进入自身心智与情感的真实。你们必须审视所知的自然宇宙。你们必须运用直觉与创造本能观察周遭生灵，不再视其为具有特定习性的异类物种，或可被解剖的地球低级财产，而是视其为宇宙本质的鲜活范例——处于持续存在与转化之中。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In terms of probabilities, therefore, you choose certain acts, unconsciously transform these into physical events or objects, and then perceive them. But those unchosen events also go out from you and are projected into these other forms. Now the behavior of atoms and molecules is involved here, for again these are only present within your universe during certain stages. Their activity is perceived only during the range of particular vibratory rhythms. When your scientists examine them for example, they do not examine the nature, say, of an atom. They only explore the characteristics of an atom as it acts or shows itself within your system. Its greater reality completely escapes them.
quotes.translation: 因此就或然性而言，你们选择某些行动，无意识地将之转化为物理事件或物体，继而感知它们。但那些未被选择的事件同样从你们身上发散，投射至这些其他形态中。此处涉及原子与分子的行为，因为它们同样只在特定阶段存在于你们的宇宙中。其活动仅在特定振动节奏的范围内被感知。例如当你们的科学家研究原子时，他们并未探究原子的本质，而只探索原子在你们系统内运作或显现的特性。其更宏大的真实完全逃过了他们的认知。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In waking life you perceive only certain portions of events that fall within your space-time continuum. In dreams you may have a greater glimpse. You may for example see in the past, present and future, objects that in your time will take up any given space. Often such a dream will be considered meaningless because at your "fact level," past, present and future objects cannot appear at once in the same space.
quotes.translation: 在清醒生活中，你们仅能感知落在时空连续统内的部分事件。在梦境中，你们可能获得更广阔的瞥见。例如你们可能看见过去、现在与未来的物体——这些物体在你们的时间中将占据任何给定空间。这类梦境常被视为无意义，因为在你们的"事实层面"，过去、现在与未来的物体无法同时出现在同一空间。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The past exists as a series of electromagnetic connections, held in the physical brain on the one hand, but it also consists of the same sort of realities retained in the nonphysical mind. These electromagnetic connections can be changed. The present exists as a series of electromagnetic connections in both the brain and the mind, and this is the only reality which you are justified in giving to your present.
quotes.translation: 过去作为一系列电磁连接而存在，一方面存储于物质大脑中，但同时也由非实体心智保留的同类实相构成。这些电磁连接可以被改变。当下作为大脑与心智中的一系列电磁连接而存在，这是你们唯一有理由赋予当下的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Such a consciousness is at a state of being in which its reality generates more energy and power than it can physically express in its brilliant intersection with physical reality. The "sparks" generated by each instant of its existence cause additional experiences, perceptions, that will not fit in the known moment of the present -- for by then in your terms that present has already vanished into the past.
quotes.translation: 此类意识处于一种存在状态，其真实产生的能量与力量远超其与物质实相璀璨交汇时所能物理表达的程度。其存在每一瞬间产生的"火花"引发额外经验与感知，这些无法被纳入已知的当下时刻——因为在你们的时间概念中，那个当下早已消逝为过去。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now there are some who resist the new existence, even though they chose it, as long as possible. To some extent they must be present at birth, but they can still escape any full identification with the born infant. They hover within and about the form, but half reluctantly. There are many reasons for such behavior. Some personalities simply prefer in-between-life existence and are much more concerned with the theoretical solving of problems than the practical application necessarily involved. Others have discovered that physical existence does not meet their needs as well as they thought it would, and they will progress much better in other fields of reality and existence.
quotes.translation: 有些人即便选择了新的存在，也会尽可能长久地抗拒它。他们必须在某种程度上参与出生过程，但仍可逃避与新生婴儿的完全认同。他们徘徊在形体之内与周围，却带着半心半意的态度。这种行为有多种原因。有些人格单纯偏好中间生命状态，更关注问题的理论解决而非必然涉及的实际应用。另一些人则发现物质存在并未如预期般满足其需求，他们在其他实相与存在领域将进展得更顺利。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: When children dream, they utilize these inner senses as adults do, and then through dreaming they learn to translate such material into the precise framework of the exterior senses. Children's games are always "in the present" -- that is, they are immediately experienced, though the play events may involve the future or the past. The phrase "once upon a time" is strongly evocative and moving, even to adults, because children play with time in a way that adults have forgotten. If you want to sense the motion of your psyche, it is perhaps easiest to imagine a situation either in the past or the future, for this automatically moves your mental sense-perceptions in a new way.
quotes.translation: 孩童做梦时，会像成人一样运用这些内在感官，并通过梦境学习将此类材料转化为外在感官的精确框架。孩童的游戏始终"存在于当下"——即它们被即时体验，尽管游戏事件可能涉及未来或过去。"很久很久以前"这个短语具有强烈的唤起力与感染力，甚至对成人亦然，因为孩童以成人已遗忘的方式玩弄时间。若想感知自身心灵的运动，或许最容易的方法是想象过去或未来的情境，因为这会自动以全新方式调动你的心智感官知觉。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The mind will be found to be closely allied with the spacious present. The mind's capabilities, if studied, would lead man into a realization of these other fields of actuality of which I have spoken. The mind deals with intangibles, but it does not deal with unrealities. Again, the validity of an actuality is not to be determined by its appearance within matter alone. The ingredients of matter are first of all intangible ingredients, and the study of the mind and a study of the processes by which the mind creates its dream images could lead to a basic understanding of the manner in which man subconsciously produces the physical images of his own material universe.
quotes.translation: 心智将被发现与广袤当下紧密相连。若加以研究，心智的能力将引导人类认识到我所提及的这些其他实相领域。心智处理无形之物，但绝不处理虚幻之物。再次强调，实相的有效性不能仅凭其在物质中的显现来判定。物质的成分首先是无形的成分，而对心智的研究，以及心智创造梦境意象过程的研究，可引导人们基本理解人类潜意识如何产生自身物质宇宙的物理影像。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I now suggest your break, and I do myself indeed enjoy your pleasant summer evening. I would like to make it plain here, however, that on a surface psychological level, the personality plunges into activity, and it is for the present this portion of the personality with whom we must deal. Nevertheless, beneath there is a denial of involvement, and a strong desire for permanency, both of which are repressed, and the stronger the efforts put forth by the ego to repress these tendencies, then these tendencies will explode with inadequate stimuli. There will be an over action on the part of the ego to compensate for the refusal to accept involvement on deeper levels.
quotes.translation: 现在我建议你们休息，我确实很享受你们这宜人的夏夜。不过我想在此说明，在表面心理层面，人格会投入活动，而我们必须处理的正是人格的这一当下部分。然而在表层之下，存在着对投入的否认与对永恒性的强烈渴望，这两者都被压抑着。自我越努力压抑这些倾向，这些倾向就越会在不当刺激下爆发。自我将产生过度反应，以补偿拒绝在更深层次接受投入的行为。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: That which was is constantly taken into what you call the present. The ego may choose to use or not use various reactions. It may reject various reactions as a part of the past, for it is the ego alone who is concerned with past, present and future. The ego's denial of a reaction however does not cause the reaction to disappear from within the personality, at least as part of possible pattern reaction.
quotes.translation: 过往的一切不断被纳入你们所谓的当下。自我可以选择使用或不使用各种反应。它可能将某些反应视为过去的一部分而加以拒绝，因为唯有自我才关心过去、现在与未来。然而，自我对反应的否认并不会使该反应从人格中消失——至少作为可能模式反应的一部分不会消失。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The private psyche, the part of you that you do not recognize, is aware of those patterns even as it is aware of private physical biological patterns about which it forms your image. Certain leanings, inclinations, and probabilities are present then in your biological structure, to be triggered or not according to your purposes and intents. You may personally have the ability to be a fine athlete, for example. Yet your inclinations and intents may carry you in a different direction, so that the necessary triggers are not activated. Each individual is gifted in a variety of ways. His or her own desires and beliefs activate certain abilities and ignore others.
quotes.translation: 私密心灵——你尚未认知的那部分自我——知晓这些模式，正如它知晓构成你形象的私密生理生物模式。某些倾向、偏好与可能性因此存在于你的生物结构中，根据你的目的与意图决定是否被触发。例如，你个人可能具备成为优秀运动员的能力，但你的倾向与意图可能将你引向不同方向，以致必要的触发器未被激活。每个人都以多种方式被赋予天赋，其自身的欲望与信念会激活某些能力而忽略其他。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You must perceive what you do of reality through your physical senses, but your physical senses distort reality. They present reality to you in their own way. The physical senses can only perceive reality a little bit at a time, and so it seems to you that one moment exists, and is gone forever, and the next moment comes, and like the one before it disappears. But everything in the universe exists at one time, simultaneously, and the first words ever spoken still ring throughout the universe; and in your terms the last words ever spoken have been said time and time again, for there is no ending and no beginning. It is only your perception that is limited.
quotes.translation: 你必须透过肉体感官来感知你所认知的现实，但肉体感官扭曲了现实。它们以自己的方式向你呈现现实。肉体感官一次只能感知现实的一小部分，因此对你而言，一个瞬间存在后便永远消失，下一个瞬间到来，又像前一个一样消逝。但宇宙中的一切同时存在，最初的话语至今仍在宇宙中回响；而用你们的话说，最后的话语已被反复诉说，因为既无终点也无起点。受限的只是你们的感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (And once again, as she'd done for the session of last December 28, she wanted tonight's material to be presented as part of regular Session 393. I was glad to do it--and note that Jane's class sessions usually are in marked contrast to those we hold for ourselves, for books or whatever in the future. As would be expected of a gathering, class sessions were full of energy and repartee and questions and serious thinking both with and without Seth.

quotes.text: We are dealing here principally, and in the main, with the essence of action, and essentially all apparent divisions are arbitrary for the sake of explanation. The moment point is in itself arbitrary, an artificial division. As we have said, the moment point for you is actually composed of the amount of action which you are capable of assimilating within your present framework, for the moment point is indeed a portion of the spacious present.
quotes.translation: 我们在此主要探讨行动的本质，本质上所有明显的划分都是为了解释而人为设定的。瞬间点本身是任意的，是一种人为的分割。如我们所说，对你们而言的瞬间点实际上由你们在当前框架内能够吸收的行动量所构成，因为瞬间点确实是广阔当下的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I am explaining this for now in terms of past, present, and future. You can only understand some concepts when they are given in that fashion. Taking that for granted, then, you are each born with the conscious knowledge of what has come before. Your brain is far from an empty slate, waiting for the first imprint of experience; it is already equipped with complete "equations," telling you who you are and where you have come from. Nor do you wipe that slate clean, symbolically speaking, before you write your life upon it. Instead, you draw upon what has gone before: the experiences of your ancestors, back -- in your terms now -- through time immemorial.
quotes.translation: 我现在用过去、现在和未来的术语来解释。有些概念只有以这种方式呈现时你们才能理解。以此为前提，那么你们每个人生来就带着对过往经历的有意识认知。你们的大脑远非等待经验首次烙印的空白石板；它已配备完整的"方程式"，告诉你你是谁、你从何处来。象征性地说，你们也并非在书写人生之前将石板擦净。相反，你们汲取过往：祖先的经验，用你们的时间概念来说，可追溯至远古。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: （" I believe your brother Loren is one present. The number 17, a date in July which will be significant to him, or his close family--not necessarily to him, you see." We did not ask for this data; it came through spontaneously. We saw one reason why Seth could have chosen to insert it here in the envelope data, and Seth confirms our speculation Later. Our idea was that Seth sought to use the idea of a relative connection with the object. Ruth Gridley, listed on page 3 of the object as one of the Art Shop's new management, is my first cousin; Loren of course is my brother. But we still think the Loren data is separate in the main from the envelope data.
quotes.translation: （"我相信你兄弟洛伦是其中一位在场者。数字17，七月的某个日期，对他或他的直系亲属有重要意义——不一定对他本人，你明白。"我们并未要求这些数据；它是自发出现的。我们看出赛斯选择将其插入信封数据的一个原因，赛斯后来证实了我们的推测。我们的想法是，赛斯试图利用与物品相关的亲属关系。物品第3页列出的露丝·格里德利是艺术商店新管理层之一，她是我的表姐；洛伦当然是我兄弟。但我们仍认为洛伦数据与信封数据大体上是分开的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: "In these side pockets, memory, so-called, is not so structured. Its ever-present living elements are apparent; and its growth. Its material is ever-fresh. Here the past still happens. Usually we experience it through neurological connections; that's when it seems vivid or alive, but actually it's that way all the time. Past motion and acts still go on, not recurring -- it's hard to explain -- but those past actions are still exploring other probabilities, while our nervous structure focuses us in the one (physical) probable reality we've chosen. To us those other actions seem terminated ... but that's only because usually we can't follow them.
quotes.translation: "在这些侧袋中，所谓的记忆结构并不如此刻板。其永恒鲜活的元素显而易见；其成长亦然。其材料永远新鲜。在此，过去仍在发生。通常我们通过神经连接体验它；那时它显得生动或鲜活，但实际上它始终如此。过去的运动和行为仍在继续，并非重复——这很难解释——但那些过去的行为仍在探索其他可能性，而我们的神经结构将我们聚焦于我们选择的那个（物质）可能现实。对我们而言，那些其他行为似乎已经终止……但这只是因为通常我们无法追踪它们。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 685)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: This book had no chapters [in order] to further disrupt your accepted notions of what a book should be. There are different kinds of organizations present, however, and in any given section of the book, several levels of consciousness are appealed to at once. (Intently:) The threads of the work are interwoven so that various portions of your consciousness are sent out, so to speak, on separate journeys of thought and imagination. Yet these side trips are also related. They intertwine, not only through the psychic organization that I have given to "Unknown" Reality, but because of the great uniting nature within the consciousness of each reader.
quotes.translation: 这本书没有章节（按顺序），以进一步打破你们对书籍应有样貌的既定观念。然而，书中存在不同形式的组织，在任何特定章节中，都同时诉诸多个意识层次。（专注地：）作品的线索交织在一起，可以说，你们意识的各个部分被派往思想与想象的不同旅程。但这些侧翼之旅也相互关联。它们交织在一起，不仅通过我赋予《未知》现实的心理组织，更因每位读者意识中伟大的统一本质。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 743
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Understand that awareness is the criteria, however. There is no law limiting the number of psychological structures available to you, but because of your present development, and because of this alone, you are hampered. Experience or lack of it on various fields has not yet been possible, so practically speaking you have a limited number of basic psychological structures to deal with; and your perception, clear psychological understanding, intuitive comprehension of, and manipulation and psychological constructions of these basic structures, will determine the validity of your material constructions that will then form your environment.
quotes.translation: 然而，请理解觉知才是关键。并没有任何法则限制你可用的心理结构数量，但因为你目前的发展阶段——仅此而已——你受到了限制。你在各个领域的经验或经验不足尚未成为可能，所以实际上，你只能处理有限数量的基本心理结构；而你对这些基本结构的感知、清晰的心理理解、直觉领悟、操控及心理建构，将决定你物质建构的有效性，这些建构随后会形成你的环境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: While many of your expectations are formed in childhood, no switch is really stuck in one position, and it is your prerogative to channel your emotional energy into whatever pattern for action you desire. It is extremely important, if difficult, to probe and to discover exactly what your present expectations are. Not your desires but your expectations, for you will only construct physically that environment which you believe capable of construction. It has been said that oftentimes men's expectations are too high for their abilities, but indeed expectations form abilities: and if expectations were higher, so would abilities flourish.
quotes.translation: 虽然你的许多期望形成于童年，但没有任何开关真的卡在一个位置上，你有权将你的情感能量引导到你渴望的任何行动模式中。尽管困难，但探查并确切发现你目前的期望是什么，这一点极为重要。不是你的欲望，而是你的期望，因为你只会实际建构出你相信能够建构的环境。常有人说，人们的期望往往超出他们的能力，但事实上，期望塑造能力：如果期望更高，能力也会随之蓬勃发展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The experience of your species involves a certain kind of consciousness development, highly vital. (Pause.) This necessitated a certain kind of specialization, a certain "long-term" identification with form. Cellular structure maintains brilliant effectiveness in the body's present reality, but knows itself free of it. Man's particular kind of consciousness fiercely identified with the body. This was a necessity to focus energy toward physical manipulation. To some important extent the same applies to the animals. The cell might gladly "die," but the specifically oriented man-and-animal consciousness would not so willingly let go.
quotes.translation: 你们物种的经验涉及一种特定类型的意识发展，充满活力。（停顿。）这需要一种特定的专门化，一种与形态的“长期”认同。细胞结构在身体目前的实相中保持着卓越的效能，但知道自身可以脱离它。人类特有的意识强烈地与身体认同。这是将能量聚焦于物质操控的必要条件。在某种程度上，动物也是如此。细胞可能乐于“死去”，但特定导向的人类与动物意识却不会如此轻易放手。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 688
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Your Olympics,2 on television, present you with evidence of the great capacity of the young human body. The contrast between the activity of those athletes, however, and the activity of the normal young person is drastic. (Pause.) You believe that the greatest training and discipline must be used to bring about such activity--but that seemingly extraordinary physical ability simply represents the inherent capacities of the human body. In those cases, the athletes through training are finally able to give a glimpse of the body's spontaneous abilities. The training is necessary because it is believed necessary (all with emphasis).
quotes.translation: 你们的奥运会，在电视上呈现给你们年轻人体能巨大的证据。然而，这些运动员的活动与普通年轻人的活动之间的对比是巨大的。（停顿。）你们相信，必须通过最严格的训练和纪律才能实现这样的活动——但那种看似非凡的身体能力，仅仅代表了人类身体固有的潜能。在这些案例中，运动员通过训练，最终得以一窥身体的自发能力。训练之所以必要，是因为它被相信是必要的（全部强调）。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Four months ago I wrote in Note 1 for Session 885 that through a series of misunderstandings the people at Ankh-Hermes, a publishing company in Holland, had violated their contract with Prentice-Hall by issuing a condensed translation of Seth Speaks. Our editor at Prentice-Hall, Tam Mossman, insisted that Ankh-Hermes publish another, full-length edition of Jane's book in the Dutch language. Now Tam has just forwarded to us correspondence showing that Ankh-Hermes will do this--the new publishing date for Seth Spreekt is still uncertain, however.

quotes.text: This puts present world events in an entirely different perspective. Men act, then, in relationship to events that have, historically speaking, not yet occurred -- but those events happening, say, in the future, in certain terms cast their shadows back into the present, or illuminate the past according to the events' characteristics. There is always more going on than ordinary sense data show.
quotes.translation: 这使目前的世界事件呈现出完全不同的视角。那么，人类的行为是与那些从历史角度来说尚未发生的事件相关联的——但那些事件，比如说，发生在未来，在某种程度上将其阴影投射回现在，或根据事件的特征照亮过去。总是有比普通感官数据所显示的更多的事情在发生。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: For much more Seth material on the counterpart concept, see Session 732 and Appendix 25 in Volume II of The "Unknown" Reality (Published by Amber-Allen Publishing, Inc., San Rafael, CA).

quotes.text: When I speak of levels of the subconscious, I do so only for simplicity's sake, since there is after all no top or bottom to the mind, but only a present point of focus from which viewpoints may be taken, and new perspectives formed. It is theoretically possible, for example, to change the focus, to delve downward as it were two lives back, and look upward from that perspective to the present.
quotes.translation: 当我谈到潜意识的层次时，只是为了简便起见，因为毕竟心灵没有顶部或底部，只有一个当前的焦点，从这个焦点可以采取各种视角，并形成新的观点。例如，理论上可以改变焦点，向下深入，仿佛回到两世之前，并从那个视角向上看向现在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: On all other-than-normally conscious levels, however, you deal very effectively with probabilities. The cells maintain their integrity by choosing one probability above the others. The present hub of the wheel, therefore, is but one prominent present, operationally valid. Cause and effect as you think of them appear only because of the motion, the relative motion, of the wheel in our analogy.
quotes.translation: 然而，在所有非正常意识层面上，你确实非常有效地处理着或然性。细胞通过选择一种或然性而非其他来维持其完整性。因此，轮毂的当下只是一个突出的当下，在操作上有效。你所以为的因果只因为轮子的运动——我们比喻中的相对运动——才显现出来。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The thoughts would not be perceived if they were present, you see. If a certain intensity is reached here however, a peak of intensity, then you could perceive the spacious present as it exists within your native system. You could, from this peak, theoretically look into the other system, but you would not understand what you perceived. You would not have the proper root assumptions, you see.
quotes.translation: 你看，如果思想存在，它们就不会被感知。然而，如果这里达到某种强度——一个强度的峰值——那么你就能感知到存在于你原生系统内的广阔当下。从这个峰值，理论上你可以窥见其他系统，但你会无法理解你所感知到的东西。你看，你没有适当的基本假设。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The girl will not be involved in an airplane accident. The boy is using daydreams concerning Australia to avoid facing present problems. There will be a return to Australia, but not for some time. (Long pause) Ruburt is bothered by traffic this evening, and it interferes. I do not want to attempt information on the friends in California until conditions are better. There is however uneasiness, as you know, in the family, and the boy operates in such a manner that he picks up the inner feelings of the others, and is left to handle them as best he can. The mother is more important in the family group than our friends realize.
quotes.translation: 这个女孩不会卷入飞机事故。这个男孩正在利用关于澳大利亚的白日梦来逃避面对当下的问题。他会重返澳大利亚，但不会是近期。（长停顿）鲁柏今晚被交通问题困扰，这干扰了传讯。在条件改善之前，我不想尝试提供关于加州朋友的信息。然而，如你所知，家庭中存在不安，这个男孩以某种方式运作，他接收他人内在的感受，并被迫尽其所能处理这些感受。母亲在家庭群体中的重要性超出了我们朋友的认识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: In this session is material that will indeed allow Ruburt to get out of the present situation, but we will continue the discussion at our next session. I have given you some such material before, as I intend to give you shortly. With your own recent experiences, however, the material will be more meaningful and significant now, so that you can indeed put it this time to better use, and I will also be somewhat more specific. I will also go into any questions you want regarding your later dreams or their implications. It is good to be back with you again. End of session, and a fond and magical good evening to you both.
quotes.translation: 本次课程中的资料确实能让鲁柏摆脱当前处境，但我们将在下次课程中继续讨论。我之前给过你们一些这样的资料，正如我很快会再给你们的。不过，结合你们近期的经历，这些资料现在会更有意义和重要性，这样你们这次确实能更好地运用它，我也会更具体一些。我还会深入探讨你们想知道的关于后来梦境或其含义的任何问题。很高兴再次与你们相聚。课程结束，祝你们俩一个深情而神奇的晚安。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In the beginning there was instead, once more, a divine psychological gestalt--and by that I mean a being whose reality escapes the definition of the word "being," since it is the source from which all being emerges. That being exists in a psychological dimension (long pause), a spacious present, in which everything that was or is or will be (in your terms) is kept in immediate attention, poised in a divine context that is characterized (long pause, eyes closed) by such a brilliant concentration that the grandest and the lowliest, the largest and the smallest, are equally held in a multiloving constant focus.
quotes.translation: 起初，再次存在着一个神圣的心理完形——我指的是一个其现实超越了"存在"一词定义的存有，因为它是所有存在涌现的源头。那个存有存在于一个心理维度（长停顿），一个广阔当下，其中一切过去、现在或未来（按你们的说法）的事物都被保持在即时的关注中，悬置于一个神圣的脉络里，其特征是（长停顿，闭眼）如此辉煌的专注，以至于最伟大与最卑微、最庞大与最渺小，都被平等地保持在一种多重爱的恒定焦点中。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: "The insight that flashed into my consciousness was that human beings haven't changed either, really, that our more complicated mental processes only make it seem that we have. Coupled with this is the idea that magic, as we call it, reflects a basic part of our natural mental equipment and abilities, but that our present course of action, our focusing upon the material and the intellectual -- the 'reasonable' portions of our psyche -- has created artificial divisions, in which magic seems quite 'unreasonable' or unreal. Actually, our need for magic is a very real, vital, and integral portion of our psyches.
quotes.translation: "闪入我意识的洞见是：人类其实也未曾改变，我们更复杂的心理过程只是让我们看起来改变了。与此相伴的是，我们所谓的魔法反映了我们自然心智装备和能力的基本部分，但我们当前的行为方式——专注于物质和智性，即我们心灵中'理性'的部分——造成了人为的分割，使得魔法显得相当'不合理'或不真实。实际上，我们对魔法的需求是我们心灵中非常真实、充满活力且不可或缺的部分。"
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth speaks in Session 826, held for Mass Events on March 8, 1978:

quotes.text: Give us a moment ... Other focuses of consciousness besides your own have different concepts of time, and are actually more biologically correct, in that they have greater knowledge of both cellular and spiritual realities. There is nothing "wrong" with your present habitual kind of consciousness, any more than there is anything wrong with speaking only one language. There is within you, however, the impetus to explore, to expand, to create, and that will automatically lead you to explore inner lands of consciousness; as, in your terms, it has led you to explore the other countries of the physical world.
quotes.translation: 请稍等片刻……除了你们自己的意识之外，其他意识焦点对时间有不同的概念，实际上更符合生物学真相，因为它们对细胞实相和灵性实相都有更深刻的认识。你们目前习惯性的意识状态本身并无"错误"，就像只说一种语言也并无不妥。然而，你们内在存在着探索、扩展和创造的驱动力，这自然会引导你们探索意识的内在领域；用你们的话来说，就像它曾引导你们探索物质世界的其他国家一样。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 723
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Rest or sleep cures -- very extended sleep periods -- have been helpful for therapy in some cases, not because extended sleep is in itself beneficial, but because so many toxins had built up that such extended periods were required. Learning processes are definitely hampered through your present habits, for there are certain periods when consciousness is attuned to learning, and yet you try to force learning during unrecognized minimal periods. Creative and psychic abilities are thrust into the background simply because of this artificial division. Dualities result that affect all of your activities.
quotes.translation: 休息或睡眠疗法——非常延长的睡眠期——在某些案例中对治疗有帮助，并非因为延长睡眠本身有益，而是因为累积了太多毒素，需要如此长的睡眠期来清除。你们目前的习惯确实阻碍了学习过程，因为存在某些意识特别适合学习的时段，而你们却试图在未被识别的低效时段强行学习。创造力和通灵能力被推到幕后，仅仅是因为这种人为的划分。由此产生的二元性影响了你们所有的活动。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Your main point of contention is brought about by the emotional barriers that are caused by the difference in terms. It is as if you choose to work for a day in the slums. It would be ridiculous for you to choose to do this, and then say to yourself, "Why did I choose to work in the slums? I would prefer to work on Fifth Avenue." You know the reason, and your entire identity knows the reason. You hide it from the present self simply to insure the fact that the present reality is not a pretended one.
quotes.translation: 你们主要的争议点源于术语差异造成的情感障碍。这就像你选择在贫民窟工作一天，然后对自己说："我为什么选择在贫民窟工作？我宁愿在第五大道工作。"你知道原因，你的整个本体也知道原因。你向当前自我隐瞒这个原因，只是为了确保当前实相不是虚假的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: All of your present experience was drawn from probable reality. During your life, any event must come through your creaturehood, with the built-in time recognition that is so largely a part of your neurological structure; so usually there is a lag, a lapse in time, during which your beliefs cause material actualization. When you try to change your convictions in order to change your experience, you also have to first stop the momentum that you have already built up, so to speak. You are changing the messages while the body is used to reacting smoothly, unquestioningly, to a certain set of beliefs.
quotes.translation: 你们当前的所有经验都源自可能性实相。在你们的一生中，任何事件都必须通过你们的生物性来经历，而内置的时间识别很大程度上是你们神经结构的一部分；因此通常存在一个时间差、一个时间间隔，在此期间你们的信念导致物质具体化。当你们试图改变信念以改变经验时，可以说，你们还必须首先停止已经建立起来的动量。你们正在改变信息，而身体却习惯于对某一套信念做出顺畅、不加质疑的反应。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You perform habitually in certain manners as a result of your beliefs. Now if you willfully change some of those habits then you are also getting the message across. The initiative must come from you, and in the present. In a very real manner of speaking, this means changing your viewpoint, that particular perspective with which you view your past and present and imagine your future.
quotes.translation: 由于你们的信念，你们习惯性地以某些方式行事。现在，如果你们有意改变其中一些习惯，那么你们也在传达这个信息。主动权必须来自你们，而且是在当下。从非常真实的意义上说，这意味着改变你们的观点，即你们看待过去和现在、想象未来的那种特定视角。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Many so-called cases of possession can be laid to this alone. The dominant personality can be likened on your plane to the dominant entity. Please understand that I am using an analogy here. As the personality on your plane actually changes, expands and grows according to its potentialities, as it presents at various times varied images to the world, such as--if you'll excuse me for using clichés--a smiling face, a sorrowful face, but is still basically the same personality, so on another level does the entity present at various times a varied appearance and speak in a different voice. As the smiling and the sorrowful face also express and expand the personality, so too do the various reincarnated personalities express and expand the entity as a whole.
quotes.translation: 许多所谓的附身案例完全可以归因于此。在你们的层面上，主导人格可以比作主导存有。请理解我在这里使用类比。正如你们层面的人格根据其潜能实际变化、扩展和成长，在不同时期向世界呈现不同的形象——比如，请原谅我用陈词滥调——一张笑脸、一张悲伤的脸，但本质上仍是同一个人格；同样，在另一个层面上，存有在不同时期呈现不同的面貌，用不同的声音说话。正如笑脸和悲伤的脸也表达和扩展了人格，各种转世人格也表达和扩展了作为整体的存有。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: No man or woman consciously knows for sure which day will be the last for him or her in this particular life, that each calls the present one. Mortality with its birth and death is the framework in which the soul, for now, is expressed in flesh. Birth and death contain between them the earthly experience that you perceive as happening within a given period of time, through various seasons, and involving unique perceptions within areas of space -- encountered with other human beings, all to one extent or another sharing with you events caused by the intersection of the self and time and space.
quotes.translation: 没有任何人确切知道此生哪一天会是自己的最后一日，每个人都称之为"当下"。生死所体现的必朽性，正是灵魂此刻借肉身展现的框架。生死之间所包含的尘世经验，你感知为在特定时间段内发生，历经四季更迭，涉及空间领域中的独特感知——与其他人类相遇，他们都在某种程度上与你共享着由自我、时间与空间交汇所引发的事件。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Earlier I mentioned several times that we must reach a point at which you are able to see around the corner of seemingly contradictory material,21 and this is one of those occasions. (Long pause.) Time overlays present you with a picture in which you have free will--yet each event that you choose will have its own time version. Now those time versions may be entirely different one from the others, and while you certainly initiate your own time version, in terms of usual understanding there is no true place or time in which that version can be said to actually originate (again with emphasis).
quotes.translation: 先前我多次提及，我们必须达到一个能让你看清看似矛盾材料拐角处的境地，而此刻正是这样的时刻之一。（长停顿）时间叠加为你呈现一幅画面：你拥有自由意志——然而你所选择的每个事件都会有其自身的时间版本。这些时间版本可能彼此截然不同，虽然你确实启动了自身的时间版本，但按通常理解，并没有一个真正的地点或时间可以说这个版本实际起源于那里（再次强调）。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Jane doesn't agree with my doubts. As always, she's been letting me put this book together the way I think best--and inevitably that way has followed how we've been trying to understand our joint long-term situation. She innocently accepts my labors as they come out. And that trust always reflects, I'm sure, Seth's own larger view of reality, as I just quoted him from Session 915. Our challenges echo throughout all of our probable realities simultaneously, and through all of them together the largest picture of Jane and myself is presented. In this probable reality we work with what we can pick up from that great whole. We keep trying to learn to ask better questions.

quotes.text: All of your physical, mental and spiritual abilities are focused together, then, in the brilliant concentration of "present" experience. You are not at the mercy of the past, or of previous convictions, unless you believe that you are. If you fully comprehend your power in the present, you will realize that action at that point also alters the past, its beliefs and your reactions.
quotes.translation: 你所有生理、心理与灵性能力，都聚焦于"当下"经验的璀璨凝聚中。你并非受制于过去或先前的信念，除非你相信自己受制于它们。若你完全领悟自己在当下的力量，便会明白在那一点上的行动同样能改变过去、其信念及你的反应。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: There are many variations, in fact, that would be better than your present system. Ideally, sleeping five hours at a time, you gain the maximum benefit, and anything else over this time is not nearly as helpful. Those who require more sleep would then take, say, a two-hour nap. For others a four-hour block sleep session and two naps would be highly beneficial. With suggestion properly given, the body can recuperate in half the time now given to sleep. In any case it is much more bracing and efficient to have the physical body active rather than inactive for, say, eight to ten hours.
quotes.translation: 事实上存在许多变体，都比你们当前的系统更佳。理想状态下，每次睡眠五小时能获得最大效益，超出此时间的睡眠帮助甚微。需要更多睡眠者则可补个两小时午睡。对其他人而言，四小时整段睡眠加两次小憩将极为有益。若给予适当暗示，身体能在当前睡眠时间的一半内恢复。无论如何，让身体保持八到十小时活跃而非静止状态，要振奋得多且高效得多。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In other words, he enjoys the practice, whether or not he knows it. When for fairly long periods there are no witnesses to sessions, then both Ruburt and myself do indeed lean toward unscheduled sessions when informed friends of yours are present. On the other hand when several sessions in a row, regular sessions, are witnessed, then of course I grow impatient because I am anxious to get back to our own material, which is stressed when we are alone.
quotes.translation: 换言之，无论他是否知晓，他都享受这种实践。当长时间没有见证者参与课程时，鲁柏与我确实倾向于在你们知情友人出席时进行非定期课程。反之，当连续数场定期课程都有见证者时，我自然变得不耐烦，因为我急于回归我们独处时着重探讨的专属材料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Your own environment includes far more than you may have supposed. Earlier I referred to your environment in terms of the daily physical existence and surroundings with which you are currently connected. In actuality, you are aware of very little of your larger, more extensive environment. Consider your present self as an actor in a play; hardly a new analogy, but a suitable one. The scene is set in the twentieth century. You create the props, the settings, the themes; in fact you write, produce, and act in the entire production -- you and every other individual who takes part.
quotes.translation: 你们自身环境所包含的远比你想象的丰富。先前我以你当前关联的日常物质存在与周遭环境来指称你的环境。实际上，你对自身更广阔、更深远的环境所知甚少。将你当下的自我视为戏剧中的演员——这并非新颖的比喻，但颇为贴切。场景设定在二十世纪。你创造道具、布景与主题；事实上，整场演出由你编写、制作并主演——你与参与其中的每个个体皆是如此。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: "Some mountain climbers, when asked why they climb a certain peak, respond: 'Because the mountain is there to be climbed'--so the natural approach, the magical approach, is to be used because it exists, and because it represents an open doorway into a world of reality that is always present, always at the base of your cultures and experience. Theoretically at least, the magical approach should be used because it represents the most harmonious method of life (underlined). It is a way of living that automatically enhances all of your abilities and accelerates your comprehensions.
quotes.translation: 有些登山者被问及为何攀登某座山峰时回答："因为山就在那里待攀登"——因此自然之道、神奇之道之所以该被运用，正因为它存在，因为它代表着一扇通往实相世界的敞开之门，这世界始终存在，始终是你们文化与经验的基础。至少在理论上，神奇之道应该被运用，因为它代表着最和谐的生活方式（划线强调）。这是一种能自动增强你所有能力、加速你理解力的生活方式。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: 5. It was inevitable that Jane's images would remind me of the note I'd written well over two months ago, on re-creating the past, or updating it, through nostalgia. In Chapter 11 of Dreams, see Note 8 for Session 936. Her images led me to search out the collection of battered black-and-white snapshots of her that somehow, some way, she'd managed to save from her early childhood. Along with scraps of her youthful poetry, the pictures are the only physical remnants she possesses of her first years, and studying them anew I realized just how valuable they really are. I talked of having them copied and enlarged by a professional photographer; I speculated about eventually having some of them reproduced in a book. That idea may have to wait, however: For some years Jane hasn't cared to be photographed--or have pictures of herself shown, no matter when they had been taken.

quotes.text: An archaeologist or a geologist examining "old" rock strata will find dead fossils, just as from your viewpoint you will discover "dead" past lives as you look "downward" through your psyche. You will seem to view finished reincarnational existences, even as from his present the geologist will discover only inanimate fossils embedded in rock. Those fossils are still alive, however. The geologist is simply not tuned in to their life area. So reincarnational lives are still occurring, but they are a part of your being. They are not you, and you are not your reincarnational past.
quotes.translation: 考古学家或地质学家检视"古老"岩层时会发现死化石，正如从你们的角度，当你们"向下"审视自己的心灵时，会发现"已死"的前世。你们似乎会看到已完成的转世存在，就像地质学家从当下视角只会发现嵌在岩石中的无生命化石。然而那些化石仍然活着。地质学家只是没有调频到它们的生命领域。所以转世生命仍在发生，但它们是你存在的一部分。它们不是你，你也不是你的转世过去。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 727
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: A nation which pursues this course is like one individual who primarily follows a strictly "objective, male," externally oriented path in terms of your Western understanding. Certain values have been stressed in your country, particularly in the recent present. These attributes were pursued at the expense of others for individual reasons and those en masse. The rest of the world agreed to such actions, however, and various portions of it took entirely different courses, so that in your experience global society would show a kaleidoscope of varying focuses and their results.
quotes.translation: 一个走这条路的国家，就像按照西方理解主要遵循严格"客观、男性化"外向路径的个人。在你们国家，某些价值观被强调，尤其在最近的当下。这些特质因个人及集体原因被追求，却牺牲了其他特质。然而世界其他部分也同意此类行为，并各自采取了完全不同的路径，因此在你们的经验中，全球社会会展现出万花筒般不同的焦点及其结果。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: "The viruses and infections were of course present. They always are. They are themselves fragments, struggling small fragments without intention of harm. You have general immunity, believe it or not, to all such viruses and infections. Ideally, you can inhabit a plane with them without fear. It is only when you give tacit agreement that harm is inflicted upon you by these fragments. To some degree, lesser, dependent lives such as household pets are dependent upon your psychic strength. They have their own, it is true, but unknowingly you reinforce their energy and health.
quotes.translation: "病毒和感染当然存在。它们始终存在。它们本身就是碎片，挣扎的小碎片，并无伤害意图。信不信由你，你们对所有此类病毒和感染都有普遍免疫力。理想情况下，你们可以与它们共处同一层面而无需恐惧。只有当你们默许时，这些碎片才会对你们造成伤害。在某种程度上，较低等、依赖性的生命如家养宠物，依赖于你们的心灵力量。它们确实有自己的力量，但你们在不知不觉中强化了它们的能量和健康。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: To do this, rely upon your immediate sense data, not secondary experience as described. That primary sense data, while pinpointed in the present, providing you with the necessary stance in time, still can open up to you the timelessness from which all time emerges, can bring you intuitive intimations, hinting at the true nature of the ever-present coming-to-be of the universe.
quotes.translation: 要做到这一点，依赖你们的直接感官数据，而非所描述的次级经验。那首要的感官数据，虽然定位于当下，为你们提供必要的时间立足点，仍能向你们开启所有时间从中涌现的无时间性，能带给你们直觉的暗示，暗示宇宙永恒当下生成的真实本质。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You cannot probe into the one system without affecting the others. It is basically meaningless to consider the personality as separate from the simultaneous actions of which it is composed. The personality, as you know, has also a reality within the dream universe. It should be obvious that in a most basic and practical manner the personality however is not involved with physical time to any degree. Only a part of the personality, the ego, is so involved. It is obvious of course that the personality system will react to stimuli that seem, to the ego, to be far divorced in time. That is, the personality may react to a stimuli in the present that occurred originally twenty years ago, to the ego's understanding of time.
quotes.translation: 你无法探究一个系统而不影响其他系统。将人格视为与其所组成的同步行动分离，基本上毫无意义。如你所知，人格在梦宇宙中也有其实相。显然，在最基本且实际的方式中，人格无论如何都不涉及物理时间。只有人格的一部分——自我——才如此涉及。当然，人格系统会对那些在自我看来时间上相距甚远的刺激做出反应。也就是说，人格可能会在当下对二十年前发生的刺激做出反应，而这是自我对时间的理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is not [so much] that such developments are beyond man's capacity as it is that they involve manipulations impossible to make for all practical purposes, from his present standpoint. He could theoretically move to a better vantage point in the twinkling of an eye, relatively speaking, but for now we must largely use analogies. Those analogies may lead you or Ruburt, or a few others, to a more advantageous vantage point, so that certain leaps become possible--but those leaps, you see, are not just leaps of intellect but of will and intuition alike, fused and focused.
quotes.translation: 这些发展并非超出人类能力范围，而是涉及从当前立场出发实际无法实现的操作。理论上他能在眨眼间移动到更有利的观察点——相对而言——但目前我们主要得借助类比。这些类比或许能引导你、鲁柏或少数人抵达更有利的观察点，使某些飞跃成为可能——但你要明白，这些飞跃不仅是智性的飞跃，更是意志与直觉融合聚焦的飞跃。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json
