quotes.text: The relatively insignificant example of probable events and their interaction just given (in the last session) provides a few important clues to the nature of probabilities in general. An organization is definitely present, but it is not the kind of order you are used to recognizing. This small private experience is repeated endlessly with different variations in all areas of daily living -- that is, probable events constantly interact, and (intently) through their interaction you end up with one recognized series of episodes that you accept, called physical reality.
quotes.translation: 刚才（上一节）给出的关于可能事件及其互动的相对微不足道的例子，为理解概率的本质提供了几个重要线索。其中确实存在某种组织性，但这并非你们习惯认知的那种秩序。这种微小的私人体验在日常生活的各个领域以不同变体不断重复——也就是说，可能事件持续互动，（专注地）通过这种互动最终形成你们所接受的那条被认可的事件序列，即所谓的物质实相。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 694
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: You will need perhaps to reread your material on the spacious present, since our explanation here will be necessarily in terms of sequence of events, when as you know in the spacious present events are actually simultaneous. When the personality withdraws itself from the physical image therefore, in a sort of slow motion of actual simultaneous happenings, this is what occurs.
quotes.translation: 你们或许需要重读关于"广袤当下"的资料，因为在此处的解释必然涉及事件序列——而你们知道在广袤当下中事件实际上是同时发生的。因此当人格脱离物质形象时，在某种实际同时发生事件的慢动作中，就会发生以下情况。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It understands, for example, that clairvoyant material is a part of the personality's overall characteristics, so it is not afraid of perceiving it -- and it is able to separate such information confusion from present physical sense perception. Orderliness, then, is one of its main characteristics. When it is given only one world view, and only one group of assumptions, its orderly nature causes it to throw out all information that does not fit. It is almost forced to make an orderly picture, say like a jigsaw puzzle picture, while being denied half of the pieces.
quotes.translation: 例如它明白千里眼资料是人格整体特征的一部分，因此不惧怕感知它——并能将此类信息混乱与当前的物质感官知觉区分开来。秩序性是其核心特征之一。当它只被赋予单一世界观和单一假设体系时，其有序本性会迫使它抛弃所有不匹配的信息。它几乎被迫构建有序图景——就像拼图游戏——却被剥夺了一半的拼块。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth speaks in Session 826, held for Mass Events on March 8, 1978:

quotes.text: Before the beginning of the universe, we will postulate the existence of an omnipotent, creative source. (Pause.) We will hope to show that this divine subjectivity is as present in the world of your experience as it was before the beginning of the universe. Again, I refer to this original subjectivity as All That Is. I am making an attempt to verbalize concepts that almost defy the edges of the intellect, unless that intellect is thoroughly reinforced by the intuition's strength. So you will need to use your mind and your own intuitions as you read this book.
quotes.translation: 在宇宙诞生之前，我们假设存在一个全能的创造性源头。（停顿）我们希望证明，这种神圣主体性在你们经验世界中的存在，与宇宙诞生前同样真实。我再次将这种原初主体性称为"一切万有"。我正在尝试将几乎超越智性边界的概念语言化——除非智性得到直觉力量的彻底强化。因此你们在阅读本书时需要同时运用心智与直觉。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You may consider past, present and future then as a single-line delineation of experience in your terms, the line however continuing indefinitely. Other personality structures from other dimensions could theoretically then observe it from an infinity of viewpoints. However there is far more than this. The single line is merely the surface thread along which you seem to travel. It is all of you that you perceive, so when you envision other dimensions you are forced to think in terms of observers far above the thread, looking down at it from any given viewpoint.
quotes.translation: 你们可以将过去、现在与未来视为一条线性经验描绘——以你们的说法——这条线无限延伸。理论上其他维度的其他人格结构可以从无限视角观察它。然而事实远不止于此。这条单线只是你们看似沿其移动的表层线索。这是你们所感知的全部自我，因此当你们想象其他维度时，不得不设想位于线索上方的观察者从任意视角俯视它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In daily practical experience, try to concentrate for a while upon seemingly subordinate abilities, ones that you think of as latent. If you do so consistently, using your imagination and will, then those abilities will become prominent in your present. The current beliefs will reprogram and alter past experience. It is not simply that past, forgotten, unconsciously perceived events will be put together in a new way and organized under a new heading, but that in that past (now not perceivable), the entire bodily response to seemingly past events will change.
quotes.translation: 在日常实际经验中，试着暂时专注于那些看似次要的能力，那些你认为尚未发挥的能力。如果你持续这样做，运用你的想象力和意志，那么这些能力将在你的当下变得显著。当前的信念会重新编程并改变过去的经验。这不仅仅是说过去那些被遗忘、未被感知的事件会以新的方式组合，并在新的标题下被组织起来，而是说在那个过去（现在无法感知的过去）中，整个身体对看似过去的事件的反应将会改变。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You are responsible for your thoughts. However your spontaneous thoughts are not nearly as destructive as he imagines, and in over inhibiting them, he also inhibits purely spontaneous, joyful thoughts. Psycho cybernetics helps him not to brood, not to worry in advance, and set up negative reactions. This is important. But honest reactions within the present are legitimate.
quotes.translation: 你要为自己的思想负责。然而，你的自发思想并不像他想象的那样具有破坏性，而过度抑制它们，也会抑制纯粹自发、喜悦的思想。心理控制论帮助他不沉溺于忧虑，不预先担忧，也不建立负面反应。这很重要。但在当下诚实的反应是合理的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Your present existence, however, is highly related to those other levels of selfhood. Now what happens at the top of the mountain affects all that goes on below, and so everything that you do affects those other realms of selfhood, and there is an interchange that occurs constantly. Physical conditions may be quite different in the valley, in the foothills of the mountain, and at its top. The very climate and vegetation may vary considerably, and yet all life and vegetation within the area are interrelated. Each layer of life that composes the mountain --
quotes.translation: 然而，你当下的存在与自我那些其他层面高度相关。山顶上发生的事会影响山下的一切，因此你所做的每件事都会影响自我的那些其他领域，并且存在着持续不断的交流。山谷、山麓和山顶的物理条件可能大不相同。气候和植被也可能差异很大，然而该区域内的所有生命和植被都是相互关联的。构成这座山的每一层生命——
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 727
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: I have not touched upon some of these subjects before, since I wanted to present them in that larger context of man's origins and historic appearance as a species. I also wanted to make certain points, stressing the importance of dreams as they impinge upon and help form cultural environments. Dreams also sometimes help in showing the pathways that can be taken to advantage by an individual, or by a group of individuals, and therefore help clarify the ways in which free will might most advantageously be directed. So I hope to cover all of these subjects.
quotes.translation: 我之前没有触及这些主题中的某些部分，因为我想在人类起源和作为一个物种的历史出现这个更大的背景下呈现它们。我还想强调某些要点，强调梦的重要性，因为它们冲击并帮助形成文化环境。梦有时也有助于展示个体或群体可以有利地采取的路径，从而帮助澄清自由意志可能最有利地被引导的方式。所以我希望涵盖所有这些主题。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now. Often clairvoyant information will appear to be wrong. In some cases this is because a different probable event has been chosen by a self for physical materialization. I have access to the field of probabilities and you do not--egotistically, you do not. I have access to your so-called past. I can view your present. To me your past, present and future merge into one.
quotes.translation: 现在。通常，千里眼的信息看起来会是错误的。在某些情况下，这是因为自我选择了不同的可能事件来实现物质化。我能接触到概率场，而你不能——从自我角度来说，你不能。我能接触到你们所谓的过去。我能看到你们的当下。对我来说，你们的过去、现在和未来融为一体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: It is interesting to note also that these personalities did alternate, and all were in existence at once, so to speak, even though only one was dominant at a given time. In the same way all so-called past personalities are present in your now, but not dominant. Obviously also any future reincarnations are present for those who have other lives still to live in your terms.
quotes.translation: 同样有趣的是，这些人格确实交替存在，而且可以说，它们同时存在，尽管在特定时间只有一个占主导地位。同样，所有所谓的过去人格都存在于你的当下，但并不占主导地位。显然，任何未来的转世也存在于当下，对于那些在你看来还有另一些生命要活的人来说。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The topmost layer of the subconscious contains predominantly present associations, but in these are mixed and interwoven associations which have their origin elsewhere. These may be called self-unifying associations, since merely by their presence in the uppermost layers of the subconscious they provide a unifying sense of psychic continuity; of which however the ego is not aware. For one thing, there are basic similarities between an individual's personality in various existences, so that quite naturally many associations of the same nature will arise.
quotes.translation: 潜意识的最表层主要包含当下的联想，但这些联想中混杂交织着源自其他层面的联想。这些可称为自我统一性联想，仅凭它们存在于潜意识最表层这一事实，就提供了心理连续性的统一感——然而自我对此毫无察觉。原因之一在于，个体在不同存在中的人格具有基本相似性，因此相同性质的联想自然会大量涌现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Because you are obsessed with the idea of time as past, present and future, you are forced to think of reincarnations as strung out one before the other, and indeed we speak of past lives simply because you are used to the time sequence concept. What you have of course, loosely speaking, is something like the developments narrated in The Three Faces of Eve. You have various dominant egos, all part of an inner identity, dominant in various existences. To make the concept understandable to you it is convenient to speak of past and future reincarnations.
quotes.translation: 由于你们执迷于将时间划分为过去、现在与未来，便被迫认为转世是前后相继的序列。事实上我们谈论"前世"仅仅是因为你们习惯了时间序列的概念。粗略而言，你们实际经历的情况类似于《三面夏娃》中描述的发展过程——你们拥有多个主导性自我，它们都是内在身份的一部分，在不同存在中轮流主导。为了让你们理解这个概念，用"前世"与"来世"的说法最为便利。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Because of its nature ego does not want to adjust. It wants adjustments to be made to it. Because ego is another manifestation of action, it is of course impossible for its aims to be realized. For all its attempts at stability and control, ego itself constantly changes. ego most of all resents and fights against time as you know it, yet ego is to a large extent responsible for your conception of time. Basically, ego fears both the past and the present. It fears the past because it has already lost control of the past. It fears the future because it is not yet in control of it. It seeks continuity of identity, yet it is forced to realize that the "I" of today is hardly the "I" of thirty years ago.
quotes.translation: 因其本质，自我不愿调整自身，它要求万物向它调整。由于自我是行动的另一显化形式，其目标自然永远无法实现。尽管自我竭力追求稳定与控制，它本身却在持续变化。自我最憎恨并抗拒你们所认知的时间，然而你们的时间概念很大程度上正是由自我造就的。本质上，自我既恐惧过去也恐惧现在——恐惧过去是因为它已失去对过去的掌控，恐惧未来是因为它尚未掌控未来。它寻求身份的连续性，却被迫意识到今日之"我"与三十年前之"我"早已判若两人。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The spacious present does not contradict the existence of durability, but durability does not imply the existence of a future as you conceive it. Now this may appear contradictory, but later I hope that you will understand this more clearly. The spacious present, while existing spontaneously, while happening simultaneously, still contains within it qualities of duration.
quotes.translation: 广袤当下并不否定持续性的存在，但持续性并不意味存在你们所理解的未来。这看似矛盾，但日后我希望你们能更清晰地理解这点。广袤当下虽自发存在、同步发生，却仍在其内部蕴含着持续性的特质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Such thoughts are like, now (underline "like, now"), electrical patterns that form their own magnets. (Long pause.) The ability to conceptualize is present in the fetus, and the fetus does conceptualize. The precise orientation of that conceptualizing, and the precise orientation of the thinking patterns, wait for certain physical triggers received from the parents and the environment after birth, but the processes of conceptualization and of thought are already established. This establishment takes place in genetic dreams (again, all intently).
quotes.translation: 这类思想如同（强调"如同"）形成自身磁场的电性模式。（长停顿）胎儿已具备概念化能力，并且确实在进行概念化。这种概念化的精确取向，以及思维模式的精确取向，需要等待出生后从父母和环境接收的特定物理触发，但概念化与思维的过程早已建立。这种建立发生在基因梦境中（再次强调，语气专注）。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Here in Dreams Seth uses the uncertainty principle as an analogy (and an excellent one), meaning that as the positions and motions of elementary particles, say, cannot be simultaneously measured precisely, so our genetic qualities and their motions can not always be specifically determined. In Dreams he's already said (in Session 909) that the human species has an "amazing interplay between genetic preciseness and genetic freedom," and (in Session 910) that "your genetic structure reacts to each thought that you have, to the state of your emotions, to your psychological climate." Choices and probabilities apply. Thus do we avoid genetic rigidity.

quotes.text: I tell you this, and at the same time remind you that your present personality is never lost. Now another word for the soul is entity. You see it is not a simple matter of giving you a definition of a soul or entity, for even to have a glimpse in logical terms you would have to understand it in spiritual, psychic, and electromagnetic terms, and understand the basic nature of consciousness and action as well. But you can intuitively discover the nature of the soul or entity, and in many ways intuitive knowledge is superior to any other kind.
quotes.translation: 我告诉你们这些，同时提醒你们：你们当前的人格永远不会消失。灵魂的另一个称谓是"存有"。你们看，定义灵魂或存有绝非简单之事，因为即使要从逻辑角度略窥其貌，你们也必须从灵性、心理和电磁层面理解它，同时理解意识与行动的基本本质。但你们可以凭直觉发现灵魂或存有的本质，而在许多方面，直觉知识都优于其他任何知识。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In larger terms there are other entire lives, which for you are forgotten essentially as yesterday is. These too, however, are a secondary series of activities, riding beneath your present primary concern. They are as unconsciously a part of your present, and as connected with it, as yesterday is.
quotes.translation: 从更宏观的角度来看，存在着其他完整的人生，它们之于你就像昨天一样已被遗忘。然而，这些人生也是次要的活动系列，潜藏在你当前主要关注之下。它们如同昨天一样，无意识地成为你当下的一部分，并与当下紧密相连。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: You see however he felt that he was learning maturity by ignoring the subconscious. This is at the base of these problems. He mistrusted the most reliable portion of his present personality. He automatically rejected the sweaters as giving warmth on a subconscious basis. Even then, however, the subconscious would not be forced too far, and a good deal of the time the sweaters sat in his drawer. They were not his style, they were his mother's style and in wearing them he felt further alarm that he was being cast in her world, so to speak.
quotes.translation: 然而，你看到他觉得自己通过忽视潜意识而学会了成熟。这正是这些问题的根源。他不信任自己当前人格中最可靠的部分。他自动拒绝穿毛衣，认为它们是在潜意识层面提供温暖。即便如此，潜意识也不会被过分强迫，大部分时间里毛衣都躺在他的抽屉里。那不是他的风格，而是他母亲的风格，穿上它们时，他进一步感到恐慌，仿佛被抛入了她的世界。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It is impossible for you to examine an atom, a cell, or anything else except in your now. Period. Because your sense experience follows a time pattern that you can understand, then you take it for granted that a cell, for example, is the result of its past, and that its present condition arises from the past.4 The fetus grows into an adult, not because it is programmed from the past, but because it is to some extent precognitively aware of its probabilities, and from the "future" then imprints this information into the past structure.
quotes.translation: 你不可能在除了"当下"之外的任何时刻审视一个原子、一个细胞或任何其他事物。句号。因为你的感官体验遵循着你能理解的时间模式，所以你理所当然地认为，例如，一个细胞是其过去的结果，其当前状态源于过去。胎儿成长为成人，并非因为它是从过去编程而来，而是因为它在一定程度上预知性地意识到自己的可能性，并从"未来"将这些信息印记到过去的结构中。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Yet you may be straddling rime in such an instance, perceiving, say, the room as it existed in the 1700 s, and the street as it exists in your present. These elements may appear side by side. The car may disappear before your eyes, to be replaced by an animal, or the whole street may suddenly turn into a field. This is how dreams work, you may think. This cannot be a legitimate projection anywhere. Yet you may be suddenly perceiving the street, and the field that existed before it, and the images may be transposed tine upon the other.
quotes.translation: 然而，在这样的情况下，你可能正跨越时间，例如，同时感知到1700年代存在的房间和你当前存在的街道。这些元素可能并排出现。汽车可能在你眼前消失，被一只动物取代，或者整条街道突然变成一片田野。你可能会想，这就是梦的运作方式。这不可能在任何地方是合法的投射。然而，你可能突然同时感知到街道和它之前存在的田野，这些影像可能相互叠加。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The male-female, female-male orientation is not nearly as separate as it appears to be in your present experience. It is not nearly as tied to psychological characteristics as you suppose. Nor is it inherently focused in the particular age period in which it now shows itself. Puberty arrives, so to speak, but the time of its arrival varies according to the needs of the species, its conditions and beliefs. You are an individual for life. You operate as a reproducing individual, generally speaking, for only a portion of that time.
quotes.translation: 男性-女性、女性-男性的取向并不像在你当前经验中看起来那样分离。它并不像你假设的那样与心理特征紧密相连。它也不是天生聚焦于它现在显现的特定年龄阶段。可以说，青春期到来了，但其到来的时间根据物种的需求、条件和信念而变化。你终其一生都是一个个体。一般来说，你作为繁殖个体的运作只占其中一部分时间。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: One more point. The ulcer for example has reality upon many levels, and must be dealt with in a like manner, for it is not enough to handle it even from the viewpoint of the present ego; for indeed causes are involved of which the present ego must necessarily be mainly ignorant. The inner self however has at its command all these reasoning's, and all these causes.
quotes.translation: 还有一点。例如，溃疡在许多层面上具有现实性，必须以类似的方式处理，因为即使从当前自我的角度来处理也是不够的；确实涉及到的原因中，当前自我必然主要无知。然而，内在自我掌握着所有这些推理和所有这些原因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The past is obviously built into words in terms of time. When you speak a given word you may not know the history of its changes through the years, yet you speak it perfectly. You seldom realize that the present state of your language, whatever it is, will for others someday seem to be an archaic version. In whatever terms, again, you think of yourselves as being at the top of the mountain. In your terms, language presupposes a particular kind of development of mind, and when you think of language you tie the two together.
quotes.translation: 过去显然已嵌入语言的时间维度中。当你说出某个词语时，或许并不知晓它历经岁月变迁的历史，却能完美地念出它。你很少意识到，无论你此刻使用的语言处于何种状态，在他人眼中终将成为古旧版本。同样地，无论以何种方式，你总将自己视为立于山巅的存在。就你的认知而言，语言预设了心智的特定发展，当你思考语言时，便将两者紧密相连。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This is certainly contradictory. Fantasy left you cold. I say this icily. Intellectually you would have no part in it, yet your imagination spun its fantastic web despite the fact that you believed in neither fantasy or web. Your artwork showed promise from the beginning. Your imagination was rich and varied. But you so feared your present mother's sense of exaggeration, that led often to sheer though unwitting lies and dishonesty, that you denied the capacity of the imagination lest it also lead you into ways of deceit.
quotes.translation: 这显然自相矛盾。幻想曾令你无动于衷。我冰冷地陈述此事。理智上你拒绝参与其中，然而你的想象力却编织出奇幻之网——尽管你既不相信幻想也不相信这张网。你的艺术创作从一开始就显露潜力，你的想象力丰富而多变。但你如此恐惧现世母亲那种夸张的倾向——这常导致纯粹却无意识的谎言与不诚实——以至于你否定了想象力的能力，唯恐它也将你引入欺骗之途。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Now we may possibly develop into a newer gestalt, for I cannot see all portions--underline all portions--of the spacious present. There are still veils before my eyes. This is a part of the present I do not perceive. If so, it will be one in which identities are completely retained, and there is no question of a dominancy, but of a smooth-working organization.
quotes.translation: 此刻我们或许能发展出新的完形，因为我无法看清广袤当下的所有部分——请强调"所有部分"。我眼前仍有帷幕。这是我未能感知的当下之域。若真如此，那将是一个完全保留身份认同的领域，不存在主导权的问题，而是运作流畅的组织形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: When the pulsation is weak you call it past, when it is strongest you name it present, and the one that seems to you not yet as strong as present, you name future. For you make the divisions yourselves, and in such a manner have made the framework and all the possibilities, potentials and limitations inherent within a system set up with a divided time system.
quotes.translation: 当脉动微弱时你称之为过去，当其最为强烈时你命名为当下，而那个在你看来尚未如当下般强烈的，你称之为未来。因为你们自行划分了这些界限，并以此方式构建了框架，以及所有可能性、潜能与局限——这些皆内在于一个以分裂时间系统为基础的结构中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: "The 'proper' question to ask is not: 'Can I enter that land?' The land is here, where you are, and it always has been. The methods, the ways, the beliefs, the modes of travel to a destination create the destination itself. (A one-minute pause.) It is impossible for you to operate without beliefs in your present mode of existence (another minute), 'for beyond' those glittering packages of beliefs, however, there exists the vast reservoir of sensation itself, the land that does indeed exist 'beyond beliefs.'
quotes.translation: "恰当的问题并非：'我能进入那片土地吗？' 那片土地就在此处，在你所在之处，它始终存在。通往目的地的路径、方式、信念与旅行模式，本身便创造了目的地。（停顿一分钟）在你当前的存在模式中，你不可能不依赖信念而运作（又一分钟），然而，超越那些闪闪发光的信念包裹，存在着浩瀚的感知本身之库藏——那片确实存在于'信念之外'的土地。"
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: 5. It was inevitable that Jane's images would remind me of the note I'd written well over two months ago, on re-creating the past, or updating it, through nostalgia. In Chapter 11 of Dreams, see Note 8 for Session 936. Her images led me to search out the collection of battered black-and-white snapshots of her that somehow, some way, she'd managed to save from her early childhood. Along with scraps of her youthful poetry, the pictures are the only physical remnants she possesses of her first years, and studying them anew I realized just how valuable they really are. I talked of having them copied and enlarged by a professional photographer; I speculated about eventually having some of them reproduced in a book. That idea may have to wait, however: For some years Jane hasn't cared to be photographed--or have pictures of herself shown, no matter when they had been taken.

quotes.text: You will accept your present position, whatever it is, as being a part of that direction, and realize that from it can come all the creative elements that you need. Being yourself and trusting in your own integrity, you will automatically help others. It does little good to repeat a suggestion such as, "I am a worthy person. I trust myself and my integrity," if at the same time you are afraid of your own emotions and become upset whenever you catch yourself in what you think of as a negative frame of mind.
quotes.translation: 你将接纳自己当下的处境——无论它是什么——作为那个方向的一部分，并认识到从中能生发你所需的一切创造性元素。做真实的自己，信任自身的完整性，你自然会帮助他人。若你同时畏惧自己的情绪，每当察觉自己陷入所谓负面心境便惊慌失措，那么重复"我是个有价值的人，我信任自己与我的完整性"这样的暗示便收效甚微。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The individual body is what it is because it exists in the context of others like it. By this I mean that a given present body presupposes a biological past of like creatures. It presupposes contemporaries. If, for example, one adult human being were perceived by an alien from another world, certain facts would be apparent. Even though such an alien came upon a lone member of your species in otherwise uninhabited land, the alien could make certain assumptions from the individual's appearance and behavior.
quotes.translation: 个体身体之所以是其所是，是因为它存在于同类身体的情境中。我的意思是，一个给定的当下身体预设了一个同类生物的生物学过去。它预设了同时代的存在。例如，如果来自另一个世界的外星人感知到一个成年人类，某些事实就会显而易见。即使这样的外星人在无人居住的土地上遇到你们物种的孤独个体，它也能从个体的外表和行为中做出某些假设。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

9:44 P.M. MONDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: Each species is involved in a cooperative venture, upon which ultimately all earthly existence rests. You project your present beliefs backward into history, and you misinterpret many of the conditions that you observe in the natural world. This cooperation that I speak of is based on love, and that love has a biological as well as a spiritual basis. Your beliefs, for example, cause you to deny the existence of emotions in animals, and any instances of love among them are assigned to "blind" instinct.
quotes.translation: 每个物种都参与一项合作事业，最终所有地球上的存在都依赖于它。你们将当下的信念投射回历史，并误解了在自然界中观察到的许多条件。我所说的这种合作基于爱，这种爱既有生物学基础，也有灵性基础。例如，你们的信念导致你们否认动物中存在情感，而它们之间的任何爱意实例都被归因于"盲目的"本能。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now. I have just told you that one thought must terminate before another thought can appear. Although this might sound as if I am speaking in terms of continuity, I am not. The action of our imaginary sphere upon and within itself is simultaneous, and in all directions. All actions occur basically within the spacious present, but all action cannot be aware of itself except as it attempts further action, i.e., materializations.
quotes.translation: 现在。我刚才告诉你们，一个念头必须终止，另一个念头才能出现。虽然这听起来好像我在谈论连续性，但我并非如此。我们想象的球体在其自身内部和作用于自身的行动是同时的，并且向所有方向展开。所有行动基本上都发生在广袤的当下之内，但所有行动只有在尝试进一步行动（即物质化）时才能意识到自身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: On cellular levels the body has a picture not only of its own present condition, but of all those aspects of the physical environment that affect its own condition. In its own codified fashion it is not only aware of local weather conditions, for example, but of all those world patterns of weather upon which the local area is dependent. It then prepares itself ahead of time to meet whatever challenges of adjustment will be necessary. It weighs probabilities; it reacts to pressures of various kinds.
quotes.translation: 在细胞层面上，身体不仅拥有自身当下状况的图景，还拥有影响其状况的所有物理环境方面的图景。例如，以它自身编码的方式，它不仅意识到当地的天气状况，还意识到当地所依赖的所有世界天气模式。然后它提前做好准备，以应对任何必要的调整挑战。它权衡可能性；它对各种压力做出反应。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The personal subconscious and the ego are indeed equal partners in the formation of any given present personality. Ruburt's results are evidence that his training is bearing fruit. Once such a relationship is set up between the ego and the subconscious, then communication in general between the two will always improve. The subconscious, even the personal subconscious, is much freer from the moment point than is the ego, and it can inform the ego of important developments which can be of great help.
quotes.translation: 个人潜意识与自我在形成任何给定的当下人格时确实是平等的伙伴。鲁柏的结果证明他的训练正在结出果实。一旦自我和潜意识之间建立了这样的关系，两者之间的总体沟通将始终得到改善。潜意识，即使是个人潜意识，也比自我更不受当下时刻点的束缚，它可以告知自我重要的发展，这些发展可能大有帮助。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: （As far as I know, no such change is contemplated at Artistic Card Co. I have heard no talk or even rumors to this effect. Our department was recently moved but there has been no change in personnel. But as stated there have been many changes lately, and there could be more. My boss has held his present position for about fifteen years. Offhand I cannot think of how he could advance within the firm, unless he moved into the selling end of it. He is presently art director, and a member of the board.
quotes.translation: （据我所知，艺术卡片公司没有考虑这样的变动。我没有听到任何讨论甚至谣言。我们部门最近被搬迁，但人员没有变化。但如前所述，最近发生了许多变化，可能还会有更多变化。我的老板担任他目前的职位大约十五年了。我一时想不出他如何在公司内晋升，除非他进入销售端。他目前是艺术总监，也是董事会成员。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The abilities, strengths and variants that you may want to actualize are already latent, in your terms, and at your disposal. Suppose that you are unhealthy and desire health. If you understand the nature of probabilities, you will not need to pretend to ignore your present situation. You will recognize it instead as a probable reality that you have physically materialized. Taking that for granted, you will then begin the process necessary to bring a different probability into physical experience.
quotes.translation: 你们可能想要实现的那些能力、力量与变体，早已以你们的时间术语而言，潜伏在你们之内，并供你们随意取用。假设你身体不健康而渴望健康。如果你了解或然性的本质，你就不必假装忽视你目前的状况。你反而会将其视为一个你已经具体物质化的或然实相。在视其为理所当然后，你便会开始必要的过程，将另一种或然性带入物质经验中。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This experience will be most beneficial. It will enable your present personalities to operate in a much more enjoyable esthetic, psychic and practically efficient manner. As you realize, I have little to do with the personal layer of Ruburt's subconscious. It is merely something through which I pass. I have explained through which layer of the subconscious I come, but my origin has nothing to do with any portion of Ruburt's subconscious, not even those vast areas beneath the personal subconscious.
quotes.translation: 这种经验将极为有益。它能使你们目前的人格以更令人愉悦的审美、心灵及实际有效的方式运作。如你所知，我与鲁柏的个人潜意识层面几乎无关。那只是我经过的某种媒介。我已解释过我是通过潜意识的哪个层面而来，但我的起源与鲁柏潜意识的任何部分都无关，甚至与个人潜意识之下那些广大的区域也无关。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Whenever circumstances tend to revitalize such a charged emotion, that particular now will be re-created. The emotion will once again rush into the psychic space which is formed by elements in the personality's psychological environment. The immediate emotion of any moment, therefore, forms the framework of your present time within the waking state. As the emotion diminishes it takes up less of your psychic space, fills up less of your inner environment, and you seem to yourself to recede from it.
quotes.translation: 每当环境倾向于使这种充满能量的情感重新活跃时，那个特定的当下就会被重新创造。那情感会再次涌入由人格心理环境中的元素所形成的心灵空间。因此，任何一刻的直接情感，在清醒状态下构成了你们当下时间的框架。随着情感减弱，它占据你心灵空间的部分减少，填满你内在环境的部分也减少，你便觉得自己在远离它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I mention this again in the middle of our present discussion so that you do not feel lost, or negated, or insignificant. There are obviously an infinite number of gradations in the types and kinds of forms of which we have been speaking. That energy which is projected from our "superself," that spark of intense identity that resulted in your physical birth, that unique impetus, in the one way has many similarities to the old concept of the soul -- except that it contains only a part of the story.
quotes.translation: 在我们目前的讨论中，我再次提及这一点，以免你感到迷失、被否定或微不足道。显然，我们一直在谈论的那些形态与种类，存在着无限多的等级。从我们的"超我"投射出的那股能量，那导致你物质出生的强烈身份火花，那独特的推动力，在某种方式上与灵魂的古老概念有许多相似之处——只是它只包含了故事的一部分。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The anima, therefore, is an important safeguard, preventing the male from over-identifying with whatever cultural male characteristics have been imposed upon him through present background, environment, and education. The anima serves not only as a personal but as a mass-civilizing influence, mellowing strongly aggressive tendencies and serving also as a bridge both in communicating with women in a family relationship, and in communication also as it is applied through the arts and verbalization.
quotes.translation: 因此，阿尼玛是一项重要的保障，防止男性过度认同那些通过当前背景、环境与教育强加于他的任何文化男性特质。阿尼玛不仅作为个人影响，也作为大众文明化的影响力，缓和强烈的攻击倾向，并作为桥梁，既用于家庭关系中与女性的沟通，也用于通过艺术与言语表达所进行的沟通。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: （John Bradley has witnessed the following sessions: 37, 54, 63, 70, 95, 135, and 166, the present one. In most of these Seth has dealt with John 's connection with Searle to at least some degree, making the type of predictions he makes in this session. To sort out the rather complicated pattern of these predictions would require a study of the above sessions. To date John has agreed with their content, but most of them are of such long range that little has yet developed against which to check.）
quotes.translation: （约翰·布拉德利曾见证以下课程：第37、54、63、70、95、135节，以及目前的第166节。在大多数这些课程中，赛斯至少在一定程度上处理了约翰与西尔的关系，并做出了他在本课程中所做的那种预测。要理清这些预测相当复杂的模式，需要研究上述课程。迄今为止，约翰同意它们的内容，但其中大多数是长期性的，因此尚未有太多可对照验证的发展。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The fabric of the present self is interwoven with these reincarnational "pasts," and from them the present self draws unconsciously from its own bank of personality characteristics, activities, and insights. Often past-life memories come to the surface but are not recognized as such, since they appear in fantasy form, or are projected into art creations.
quotes.translation: 当下自体的结构交织着这些转世的"过去"，并从自身的人格特质、活动与洞见库中无意识地汲取养分。前世记忆常浮出表面却未被辨识，因其以幻想形式显现，或投射于艺术创作中。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is fortunate that his most creative periods come in late spring and through into autumn. Have him read this and tell him I said to put it in practice. Your present life is like a book that you are writing. You write it. Your ideas are the words and the chapters. Intelligent use of the imagination, focused use as suggested in Psycho cybernetics and other such methods, provide excellent training. They straighten out the first draft (humorously) so that you do not have to do so many revisions.
quotes.translation: 所幸他最富创造力的时期始于晚春延续至秋季。让他阅读此段并转告我的建议：付诸实践。你当下的生命如同正在书写的书籍，由你执笔。你的意念即是字句与篇章。善用想象力，如《心理控制论》等著作建议的聚焦运用，能提供绝佳训练。它们（幽默地）理顺初稿，使你无需反复修订。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: He simply adds some of his energy to that present in the animal, mixing this vitality with the animal's own. This does not mean that all animals are fragments in this manner, however. Animals, as any pet owner knows, have their own personalities and characteristics, and individual ways of perceiving the reality available to them. Some gobble experience. Their consciousness can be immeasurably quickened by contact with friendly humans, and emotional involvement with life is strongly developed.
quotes.translation: 他只是将部分能量注入动物体内，与动物自身生命力交融。但这并非意味着所有动物皆为此类碎片。正如任何宠物主人所知，动物拥有独特人格特质，以及感知其可及实相的个体化方式。有些动物狼吞虎咽地体验生命。通过与友善人类的接触，它们的意识能被极大加速，与生命的情感联结也得以深化。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now the image analogy is in some respects distortive, but good enough for our present purposes. For as you think of the matter of your cells as only matter, then it is hard to follow our analogy. But when you realize that your own body cells are much more than physical, contain their own capsule comprehension , then you will see that they could, at least theoretically, operate in such a manner if you could throw your own consciousness into them, and perceive their seemingly alien experience.
quotes.translation: 这个意象类比在某些层面存在扭曲，但足以满足我们当前目的。当你仅将细胞物质视为物质时，便难以遵循此类比。但当你意识到自身细胞远非物质存在，且内含胶囊式认知时，便会明白：若能将意识注入其中，理论上它们便能以这种方式运作，感知其看似陌生的经验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now the time sequence, while followed physically by your animals, is psychologically experienced far differently. They are much freer. Your past, present and future does not concern them. They also have memory of the past and future, but always experienced within the context of the present; and this is quite at variance with your own experience.
quotes.translation: 时间序列虽在物质层面被动物遵循，心理体验却大相径庭。它们更为自由。你的过去、现在与未来与它们无关。它们也拥有过去与未来的记忆，却始终在当下的脉络中体验——这与你的经验截然不同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Such developments would mean the releasing and availability of added energy into your field, that would have endless possibilities in all directions. Ideas and concepts are nonphysical actualities that attract unaligned energy, direct and concentrate it. The dream world exists more closely in that spacious present of which the inner self is so aware. It is not as involved with camouflage constructions as your own universe, and its actions are somewhat limited within its own framework.
quotes.translation: 此类发展意味着额外能量释放并进入你的场域，将产生全方位的无限可能。意念与概念是非物质的实相，能吸引未定向的能量，引导并凝聚之。梦境世界更贴近内在自我深知的广袤当下。它不像你的宇宙那般涉入伪装建构，其行动在自身框架内也稍受限制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: What you consider death has no more basic reality than has your idea of time and space. Death really represents a blind spot in your present ability to perceive energy transformation, and even value fulfillment. Death merely represents the termination of your own perception, that is, the termination of your understanding. Your ability here amounts to a complete dwindling of comprehension. Your senses are not equipped to perceive the transformation of energy from one form to another.
quotes.translation: 你们所谓的死亡，其基本实相并不比你们对时间与空间的观念更真实。死亡实际上代表你们目前感知能量转化与价值完成的能力中的盲点。死亡仅代表你们自身感知的终止，即你们理解的终结。你们在此的能力相当于理解的完全萎缩。你们的感官并不具备感知能量从一种形式转化为另一种形式的能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: You must remember that you dwell always in a natural framework -- which means that your thoughts themselves are as natural, say, as the locks of your hair. In what may seem to you to be an odd analogy I will compare your thoughts with viruses,* for they are alive, always present, responsive, and possess their own kind of mobility. Physically speaking at least, thoughts are chemically propelled, and they travel through the universal body as viruses travel through your temporal form.
quotes.translation: 你们必须记住，你们始终栖身于一个自然的架构中——这意味着你们的思想本身就像你们的发丝一样自然。用一个在你们看来或许古怪的比喻，我将把你们的思想与病毒相比较*，因为它们是有生命的、始终存在、具有回应性，并拥有自己独特的流动性。至少从物理层面来说，思想是经由化学作用驱动的，它们穿越宇宙之体，如同病毒穿越你们的时间性形体。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Your home station1 does not simply present programming for you to view. Instead you help create the program, of course, even while you are part of it. On any given afternoon certain elements of experience will be "given," roughly sketched in. There are certain cues to set the stage, colon: It may be a snowy, humid, or dry and sunny day, for instance; the location may be city or town. Yet within that loose framework you create the program of the day according to your own world view.
quotes.translation: 你们的主站1并非仅仅提供节目供你们观看。相反，你们协助创造节目，当然，即使你们是节目的一部分。在任何特定的下午，某些经验元素将被"给定"，粗略勾勒出轮廓。有些线索用以设定场景，例如：可能是下雪天、潮湿天，或干燥晴朗的日子；地点可能是城市或小镇。然而在那个松散的架构内，你们根据自身世界观创造当天的节目。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 723
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: You (smile) with your peculiar interests, can (underline) roam quite freely, art galleries and museums, in either the past, present and future, in those terms, and a sufficient impetus will help you do so. In other words, if you tie your psychic endeavors with your love of art there will be no difficulties. Simply the knowledge that the psychic endeavors will help your creativity should be a sufficient impetus.
quotes.translation: 你们（微笑）带着独特的兴趣，可以（强调）相当自由地漫游于美术馆与博物馆，在过去、现在与未来之间——以那些术语而言——而足够的动力将帮助你们做到这一点。换言之，如果你们将心灵探索与对艺术的热爱相结合，就不会有任何困难。仅仅知道心灵探索将有助于你们的创造力，就应成为足够的动力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: They also underestimate dream events, for many associations in your present are the result of events which have occurred in the dream state. The mind is hardly shut off when you dream. It continues to use its associative processes. Therefore any given personal association may originate from a dream event as well as from a past waking event.
quotes.translation: 他们也低估了梦境事件，因为你们当下许多联想都是梦境中发生事件的结果。当你们做梦时，心智并未关闭。它继续运用其联想过程。因此，任何特定的个人联想都可能源自梦境事件，如同源自过去清醒时的事件。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: As the present life of any individual rises from hidden dimensions beyond those easily accessible in physical terms, and as it draws its energy and power to act from unconscious sources, so does the present physical universe as you know it rise from other dimensions. So does it have its source, and derive its energy from deeper realities.
quotes.translation: 正如任何个体的当下生命，从那些在物质层面不易触及的隐藏维度中升起，并从无意识源头汲取行动的能量与力量；同样地，你们所知的当下物质宇宙也从其他维度升起。它同样有其源头，并从更深的实相中汲取能量。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: And so in the present circumstance the overcrowded conditions will still be further accelerated, until a new synthesis is formed--and it will be. The psychic activity engendered will finally form the basis for a greater understanding. It will be quite obvious that telepathic thoughts travel quicker than good news or faster than a pestilence. Man will be so shoved together that the impact will literally explode into a new level of consciousness, a new development in those terms.
quotes.translation: 因此，在当前情况下，过度拥挤的状况将进一步加速，直到形成新的综合——而它终将形成。由此产生的灵性活动最终将为更深刻的理解奠定基础。显而易见，心电感应思想的传播速度比好消息更快，比瘟疫更迅疾。人类将被如此紧密地挤压在一起，以至于这种冲击将实际爆发为意识的新层次，就那些术语而言，这是一种新发展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: That is the analogy. In actuality the mind is but a which looks out for the personality on the camouflage plane. Your guardian angel legends and such refer to this part of the entity, which is the mind and which is attached to the present personality during this particular existence. The mind helps to keep the personality from going too far astray. I use the term personality to include the whole person. I use it to express the entirety manifested in physical form, in one life.
quotes.translation: 这就是类比。实际上，心智只是那个在伪装层上为人格守望的部分。你们的守护天使传说之类，指的就是存有这个部分，即心智，它在这次特定存在期间与当前人格相连。心智帮助防止人格过分偏离正轨。我用"人格"一词来指代整个个体。我用它来表达在物质形态中、在一生中显现的整体性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: There is no cause and effect in the terms in which you understand the words. Nor is there a succession of moments that follow one after the other; and without a succession of moments following one after the other you can see that the idea of cause and effect becomes meaningless. An action of the present in your terms cannot be based or caused by an action in the past, and neither action can be the cause of a future action in a basic reality where neither past nor future exist.
quotes.translation: 在你们理解这些词语的层面上，并不存在因果。也不存在一个接一个连续的时刻；而没有连续的时刻相继，你们就能看出因果概念变得毫无意义。在你们术语中的"当下"行动，不能基于或由过去的行动引起，而在过去与未来都不存在的根本实相中，任何行动都不能成为未来行动的原因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: ("Connection with MG." Again we are not sure. No one with those initials for instance was present on the evening the object was shown about. A possible reference: M for Marilyn Wilbur, wife of the young Don Wilbur shown on the object; and G for the Gallaghers. The Wilburs and Gallaghers being present that Friday night, November 25,1966.
quotes.translation: （"与MG的联系。"我们仍不确定。例如，在展示该物体的那个晚上，没有任何首字母为MG的人在場。可能的指涉：M代表玛丽莲·威尔伯，即出现在物体上的年轻唐·威尔伯的妻子；G代表加拉格尔一家。威尔伯夫妇和加拉格尔一家出席了1966年11月25日那个星期五的晚上。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: At this level many abilities may be used, and the present moment can be experienced in many different fashions, using as a basis the physical data with which you are already familiar. In your normal state you see the body. In A-l your consciousness can enter the body of another, and heal it. You can in the same manner perceive the state of your own physical image. You can, according to your abilities, manipulate matter from the inside consciously, with lucidity and alertness.
quotes.translation: 在这个层次上，许多能力都可以被运用，当下时刻可以以多种不同方式被体验，以你们已经熟悉的物质资料为基础。在正常状态下，你们看到身体。在A-1状态中，你的意识可以进入他人的身体并治愈它。你同样可以感知自己物质形象的状态。根据你的能力，你可以有意识地、清晰而警觉地从内部操控物质。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: So-called harmful viruses are ever-present within the body. You are very rarely vulnerable to any but a small percentage, though you carry within you traces of the most deadly of them all of the time. Viruses themselves undergo transformations completely unsuspected by medical men. If one virus disappears and another is found, it is never suspected that the first may have changed into the second; and yet through certain alterations of quite natural character such is the case.
quotes.translation: 所谓的有害病毒始终存在于体内。你们很少容易受到其中任何病毒的攻击，除了极小一部分，尽管你们体内始终携带着最致命病毒中的微量痕迹。病毒本身会经历医学界完全未曾料想的转化。如果一种病毒消失而另一种被发现，人们从未怀疑前者可能已转变为后者；然而，通过某些完全自然性质的改变，情况正是如此。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: (The phone stopped ringing -- at last.) As contemporaries, counterparts choose a particular time framework. The time format alone makes certain focuses clear, that in your terms could not be made in another context. What you learn in your present about industry -- "progress" -- and the equitable sharing of the earth's products, could only be learned in a context in which industrialism was experienced as going too far, where technology was seen and known as a growing jeopardy.
quotes.translation: （电话终于不再响了。）作为同时代人，对应者会选择特定的时间框架。仅时间格式本身就能让某些重点变得清晰，这些重点在你们的说法中无法在其他背景下呈现。你们在当下关于工业——"进步"——以及地球产品公平分配所学到的东西，只有在工业主义被体验为过度发展、科技被视为日益增长的威胁的背景下才能学到。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 735
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: There simply is no time as you think of it, only a present in which all things occur. There are miracles of condensed information within the cells themselves that scientists cannot perceive, for they exist outside of the scope of physical instruments. In its own way, cellular comprehension includes a vast recognition of probabilities in your terms, and works with flashing manipulations in which these probabilities are contended with and responded to -- and therefore altered.
quotes.translation: 根本没有你们所认为的时间，只有一切事物发生的当下。细胞内部存在着科学家无法感知的浓缩信息奇迹，因为它们存在于物理仪器的范围之外。以它自己的方式，细胞理解包含了用你们的话说对可能性的广泛认知，并以闪电般的操作运作，在这些操作中这些可能性被应对和回应——从而被改变。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: All of this can be avoided through the realization that your point of power is in the present, as stated earlier (in the 657th session in Chapter Fifteen). Not only do you operate within your own personal beliefs, of course, but within a mass system to which you subscribe to one degree or another. Within that organization medical insurance becomes a necessity for most of you, so I am not suggesting that you drop it. Nevertheless, let us look more closely at the situation.
quotes.translation: 通过认识到你的力量点就在当下（如第十五章第657节所述），所有这些都可以避免。当然，你不仅在你个人的信念体系内运作，也在你或多或少认同的大众体系内运作。在那个组织内，医疗保险对你们大多数人来说成为必需品，所以我并不是建议你放弃它。不过，让我们更仔细地审视这个情况。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

related_concepts.name_en: The point of power is in the present

quotes.text: Some controls are still present. These struggle desperately to distort the past data, clothing it in all sorts of idea camouflages and fantasy. In this case insanity is actually a protective mechanism, in that the personality will face almost complete disorientation rather than confront truths in its past that bring up problems it cannot solve. At the same time such a personality will not let go, either, and will not change course. The dilemma is therefore a dire crisis.
quotes.translation: 某些控制仍然存在。它们拼命挣扎着扭曲过去的数据，用各种观念伪装和幻想来包装它。在这种情况下，精神错乱实际上是一种保护机制，因为人格宁愿面对几乎完全的迷失方向，也不愿面对其过去中那些带来无法解决问题的真相。同时，这样的人格也不会放手，也不会改变方向。因此，困境是一场可怕的危机。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The present personality cannot travel to the complete entity, again because of these very real laws; that is, while caught in or under the influence of the field of your plane, the personality cannot travel to the entity. The personality can and should be aware of the whole self of which it is a part, and that part of the whole self which the ego ignores, is the one part which can enter into the field influence of the entity, though it cannot travel to the entity itself.
quotes.translation: 当下的人格无法旅行到完整的本体，再次因为这些非常真实的法则；也就是说，当被困在或受你们层面场域的影响时，人格无法旅行到本体。人格能够也应该意识到它作为一部分的整个自己，而自我忽略的那部分整个自己，正是能够进入本体场域影响的那部分，尽管它无法旅行到本体本身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You can perceive the moment's reality as it exists for your intestine, or your hand; and experience, with practice, the present inner peace and commotion that exist simultaneously within your physical body. This brings a great appreciation and wonder, a sense of unity with the living corporeal material of which you are physically composed. With practice you can become as intuitively aware of your internal physical environment, as [of] your external physical environment.
quotes.translation: 你可以感知到那一刻的现实，就像它存在于你的肠道或你的手中一样；通过练习，你可以体验到同时存在于你身体内的当下内在平静与骚动。这会带来极大的欣赏和惊奇，一种与你身体构成的活生生的物质材料合一的感觉。通过练习，你可以像对外部物理环境一样直觉地意识到你的内部物理环境。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: If the impetus on your parts is not that strong, or if fear operates, if Ruburt is afraid for example, of being put to a "test", in quotes, then of course the proper stimulus is not present. The best time to get information is when it is mentioned initially. This does not mean that further information cannot be given. It is simply not as easy to obtain. Ruburt's own change of attitude will be of great benefit to us from here on however, and such incidents will diminish.
quotes.translation: 如果你们这边的动力不够强，或者恐惧在起作用——例如，如果鲁柏害怕被置于"考验"（引号内）之下——那么适当的刺激当然就不存在。获取信息的最佳时机是它最初被提及的时候。这并不意味着无法提供进一步的信息，只是不那么容易获取。不过，从今以后鲁柏自身态度的改变将对我们大有裨益，此类事件也会减少。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: （About the subconscious: According to Freud the subconscious is often held to blame for present ego difficulties. This is not so in many cases--the real trouble being that the present ego did not assimilate the subconscious experience. Seth has discussed Freud and Jung to some extent, in the 83rd and 119th sessions, among others.
quotes.translation: （关于潜意识：根据弗洛伊德的理论，潜意识常被归咎于当前自我的困境。但在许多情况下并非如此——真正的问题在于当前自我没有吸收潜意识经验。赛斯在第83节和第119节等课程中，对弗洛伊德和荣格进行了一定程度的讨论。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There may or may not be disorientation on your part, according to your beliefs and development. Now I do not necessarily mean intellectual development. The intellect should go hand in hand with the emotions and intuitions, but if it pulls against these too strongly, difficulties can arise when the newly freed consciousness seizes upon its ideas about reality after death, rather than facing the particular reality in which it finds itself. It can deny feeling, in other words, and even attempt to argue itself out of its present independence from the body.
quotes.translation: 根据你们的信念和发展程度，你们可能会或不会感到迷失方向。现在我并不一定指智力发展。智力应与情感和直觉齐头并进，但如果它过于强烈地对抗这些，当新获解放的意识抓住死后现实的观念，而非面对它发现自己所处的特定现实时，困难就可能出现。换句话说，它可以否认感受，甚至试图通过争辩来摆脱当前独立于肉体的状态。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Reality is not limited. There is no past, present and future. These only appear to those who exist within three-dimensional reality. Since I am no longer within it, I can perceive what you do not see. But there is a part of you that is not imprisoned within three-dimensional reality, and that part of you knows that there is no time, that there is only an eternal now; and that part of you that knows is the whole self, the inner personality that knows all of your lives.
quotes.translation: 实相不受限制。没有过去、现在和未来。这些只对存在于三维实相中的人显现。既然我不再处于其中，我能感知你们看不见的东西。但你们有一部分并不被囚禁在三维实相中，那一部分知道没有时间，只有永恒的当下；知道这一点的部分是整体自己，是知晓你们所有生命的内在人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (And once again, as she'd done for the session of last December 28, she wanted tonight's material to be presented as part of regular Session 393. I was glad to do it--and note that Jane's class sessions usually are in marked contrast to those we hold for ourselves, for books or whatever in the future. As would be expected of a gathering, class sessions were full of energy and repartee and questions and serious thinking both with and without Seth.

quotes.text: The form was generally a figure. The pyramid for example could have been a robe, though no robe was present. The lights were my thoughts (Pause), in their electromagnetic form. Yet the form of the pyramid represented in other areas the three of us. The form had its own meaning therefore. The form did not disappear when he awakened. He simply switched to physical sight mechanisms that did not perceive it. The freedom of his dream activity will now return. (Long pause.)
quotes.translation: 形态通常是一个形象。例如金字塔本可以是一件袍子，尽管当时并没有袍子存在。那些光是我的思想（停顿），以它们的电磁形式存在。然而金字塔的形态在其他领域代表了我们三人。因此形态有其自身意义。当他醒来时，形态并未消失。他只是切换到了无法感知它的物质视觉机制。他梦活动的自由现在将恢复。（长停顿。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You have been taught that you are at the mercy of previous events, so your idea of looking for the source of personal difficulty is to examine the past, but -- to find what you did wrong there, or what mistakes occurred there, or what inadequate interpretations were made there! Again, regardless of what you have been taught, the point of power is in the present; and again, your present beliefs will be used to structure your recollections.
quotes.translation: 你们一直被教导说，你们受制于过去的事件，所以你们寻找个人困难根源的想法就是检视过去——但那是为了找出你们在那里做错了什么，或那里发生了什么错误，或那里做出了什么不充分的诠释！再次强调，无论你们被教导了什么，力量之点就在当下；而且，你们当下的信念将被用来构建你们的回忆。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

related_concepts.name_en: The point of power is in the present

quotes.text: This is the year 1979, and the idea of time and of dates seems to be indelibly mixed into [everyone's] psychology. You can remember last year, and to some extent recall the past years of your lives. It appears to you that your present consciousness wanders backward into the past, until finally you can remember no longer--and on a conscious level, at least, you must take the very event of your birth under secondhanded evidence. Few people have conscious memory of it.
quotes.translation: 现在是1979年，时间与日期的概念似乎已深深烙印在每个人的心理中。你能记得去年，也能在一定程度上回忆起过往岁月。对你而言，当下的意识仿佛能回溯过去，直到再也记不清——至少在意识层面，你必须依赖间接证据来确认自己的出生事件。很少有人能清醒地记得它。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Even in our discussions we use the terms past, present and future, but I have told you that your future can influence your past, and that the spacious present is the only time reality.
quotes.translation: 即便在我们的讨论中，我们也使用过去、现在和未来这些术语，但我曾告诉过你，你的未来可以影响你的过去，而广袤的当下才是唯一的时间实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The physical body is formed about its electrical counterpart, yet they are both intertwined in completely different dimensions. All the knowledge gained by the present ego is retained in electrical form, as is all experience so retained. The camouflage material will be discarded as a physical gestalt, as far as the individual is concerned. The matter of the physical body will simply be used in other gestalts, in the manner that I have explained in earlier sessions.
quotes.translation: 物质身体围绕其电性对应体而形成，然而两者却交织在完全不同的维度中。当下自我获得的所有知识都以电性形式保留，所有经验也是如此。就个体而言，伪装物质将作为物质完形被舍弃。身体物质将仅用于其他完形，正如我在早期课程中解释过的那样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: First of all, to me the term "unconscious" is a poor one, barely hinting at an actual open psychic system, with deep intertwining roots uniting all kinds of consciousness; a network in which we are all connected. Our individuality rises out of it, but also helps form it. This source contains past, present, and future information; only the ego experiencing time as we know it. I also believe that this open system contains other kinds of consciousness beside our own.
quotes.translation: 首先，对我而言，“无意识”这个术语很糟糕，它几乎无法暗示一个实际开放的心灵系统——这个系统有着深深交织的根系，连接着各种意识；一个我们彼此相连的网络。我们的个体性从中升起，同时也帮助塑造它。这个源头包含过去、现在和未来的信息；只有自我才像我们所知的那样体验时间。我也相信，这个开放系统除了我们的意识之外，还包含其他类型的意识。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth began dictating the book in our next Session 511, January 21, 1970, and finished it in Session 591, August 11, 1971. The intervening sessions did not all involve book dictation, however. Some were devoted to personal matters, some given for specific people who needed help, and some were in answer to philosophical questions not connected with the book. I also took several "little vacations." Despite such layoffs, Seth always picked right up, precisely where he left off dictation.

quotes.text: Again past, present and future are definite realities only to the ego. Memory to the ego presupposes the existence of a past that no longer exists within physical reality. When I say that the dreaming self has memory, therefore, of its dream experiences, I mean that it scans its present existence. It is a simultaneous self.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，过去、现在和未来只是对自我而言的明确实相。对自我而言，记忆预设了一个在物质实相中已不复存在的过去。因此，当我说做梦的自我记得其梦境体验时，我的意思是它正在扫描其当下的存在。它是一个同时性的自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Previous ego patterns can still operate under various circumstances. Ruburt was often a male, and he sometimes attempts to manhandle the feminine aspects of his present personality, to inflict upon it literally qualities that go against its grain. Force, logic over intuition, for example, or intellect over psychic awareness . The psychic abilities in his case are, among other things, aided by that balance of characteristics, and these should not be tampered with.
quotes.translation: 先前的自我模式仍可在各种情况下运作。鲁柏曾多次是男性，他有时会试图粗暴对待他当前人格中的女性面向，强行赋予它与其本质相悖的特质。例如，用力量压制直觉，或用理智压制心灵觉知。在他的案例中，心灵能力尤其得益于这种特质的平衡，这些不应被篡改。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I am not speaking here of gods, but of psychological structures different from the ones you know. They cannot directly perceive or experience your reality in their "present" form of organization. In a manner of speaking they are in the background, from which the foreground of your experience emerges. They appear in your dreams in various ways. They are like the cloth from which you are cut. They are forces which have no need of names except for your convenience.
quotes.translation: 我在此并非谈论神祇，而是指与你们所知不同的心理结构。它们无法以其"当下"的组织形态直接感知或体验你们的实相。可以说，它们处于背景之中，而你们经验的显景由此涌现。它们以各种方式出现在你们的梦境里。它们如同裁制你们的布料，是无需命名（除非为方便起见）的力量。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I will go into this more deeply. Needless to say these problems have to do with you not at all, really, but with your present parents' particular distorted way of looking at the outside world. It is basically inadequate and harmful to them, and when you judge yourself not against your own healthier ideas, but against their unhealthy attitudes, you are inadvertently judging yourself harshly.
quotes.translation: 我将更深入探讨这点。毋庸置疑，这些问题其实与你们毫无关联，而是关乎你们现世父母看待外在世界的特定扭曲方式。这种认知本质上对他们既不足取又有害——当你们不以自身更健康的观念，反以他们不健康的态度来评判自己时，便在不经意间对自己施加了严苛的审判。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This is the reason for the results of some experiments being conducted abroad, in which accelerated learning takes place, when under hypnosis or otherwise a present individual is convinced that he or she is, for example, a great painter, or a linguist. The present belief activates "latent" abilities within each person.*
quotes.translation: 这正是某些国外实验成果的成因：在催眠或其他状态下，当某个当下个体被说服相信自己（例如）是位伟大画家或语言学家时，加速学习便得以发生。当下的信念激活了每个人内在的"潜在"能力。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You are in no danger however as long as you pursue your present course, but you are in peril as soon as you change it. You will find that these loose predictions will come to pass. You understand that free will always operates, this being a foregone conclusion. I also am practical in my way. And speaking of practicality, you would find it most beneficial even in dealing with your precious camouflage patterns if you would develop the use of your inner senses.
quotes.translation: 只要你们坚持当前道路便无危险，但一旦改变方向就会陷入险境。你们会发现这些宽松的预言终将应验。你们明白自由意志始终运作，这是不言而喻的结论。我自有务实的作风。说到务实，若你们能发展内在感官的运用，即便在处理珍视的伪装模式时，也会发现其裨益无穷。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Many writers of historical pieces, for example, are writing out of direct experience with those times. Such instances represent an excellent working rapport between the present self and the unconscious, which brings these memories to the surface in such a way that current life is enriched. More often than not, true awareness of the situation often becomes almost conscious, and just beneath awareness the individual knows the source of his authentic material.
quotes.translation: 例如许多历史题材的作家，实则是在书写对那个时代的直接经验。这类案例展现了当下自我与潜意识之间卓越的工作默契——这种默契将这些记忆浮现至表层，使当前生命得以丰盈。通常而言，对情境的真实觉知往往近乎意识层面，个体在意识边缘便知晓其真实素材的来源。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The whole self is obviously the sum of these characteristics, and more. After the final incarnation, the physical, sexual type of creativity is simply no longer needed. You do not need to reproduce physically, in other words. In simple terms the whole self contains male and female characteristics, finely tuned together, blended so that true identity can then arise -- for it cannot, when one group of characteristics must be emphasized over the other group, as it must be during your present physical existence.
quotes.translation: 整体自我显然是这些特质的集合，且不止于此。在最终转世之后，肉体与性别的创造力形式便不再需要。换言之，你们无需再进行物质层面的繁衍。简而言之，整体自我包含精心调和、交融一体的男性与女性特质——唯有如此，真实身份方能显现；因为在你们当前的物质存在中，当某一组特质必须被强调时，真实身份便无法彰显。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In actuality you see, these separate existences occur simultaneously. It is only the ego who makes the time distinction. The various existences are not perceivable by you, or rather they are not perceivable to the ego. In a basic manner, as you know, the past, present and future exist at once in the spacious present.
quotes.translation: 事实上，这些分离的存在是同时发生的。只有自我才做时间上的区分。你们无法感知这些不同的存在，或者说自我无法感知它们。从根本上说，如你所知，过去、现在和未来同时存在于广袤的现在中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: This does not mean that every one in your present acquaintanceship has been known to you, and it certainly does not imply a boring record played over and over again, for each encounter is a new one in its own way. Remembering what I said about families, realize also that towns and villages may also be composed of the past inhabitants of other such towns and villages, transposed with new experiences and backgrounds, as the group tries different experiments.
quotes.translation: 这并不意味着你认识现在相识的每一个人，当然也不意味着像一张无聊的唱片反复播放，因为每一次相遇本身都是崭新的。记住我关于家庭的说法，也要认识到城镇和村庄可能由其他类似城镇和村庄的过去居民组成，他们带着新的经验和背景被重新组合，如同群体在进行不同的实验。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: But though you met both the present Dick and Loren, neither of you knew what your relationship would be in this life. You intended a brother lifelong relationship with the man who is, instead, your father. Hence he passes you by, the bicycle being a symbol of youth. That is, because you imagined that he would be a contemporary in age, you saw him on a bicycle, a child's method of transportation, but because he was born earlier the vehicle carries him past.
quotes.translation: 但尽管你同时遇到了现在的迪克和洛伦，你们俩都不知道这一生的关系会如何。你原本打算与那个实际上是你父亲的男人建立一生的兄弟关系。因此他与你擦肩而过，自行车象征着青春。也就是说，因为你想象他会是同龄人，你看到他骑着自行车——一种孩子的交通工具——但由于他出生得更早，这辆车载着他驶过了你。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Action is not affected by time as you know it. Action also takes place within the spacious present. You may, however, only perceive parts of action in your time breakdown. Ideally, psychological time experiences will allow you to perceive action more clearly and directly. The ego attempts to control action by standing apart from it. Any such division is arbitrary, and in no way affects the nature of action itself. All that changes is your perception of it.
quotes.translation: 行动不受你所知的时间影响。行动也发生在广袤的现在中。然而，在你的时间分解中，你可能只感知到行动的一部分。理想情况下，心理时间的体验会让你更清晰、更直接地感知行动。自我试图通过置身事外来控制行动。任何这样的划分都是武断的，绝不会影响行动本身的本质。改变的只是你对它的感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There is a truth behind your cause and effect theory but it is far from what you imagine, and has nothing to do with continuity. This may be difficult at this point to imagine, but a durability such as that of the spacious present has nothing to do with your idea of continuity in terms of a present, past and future.
quotes.translation: 你的因果理论背后有一个真相，但它远非你所想象的那样，与连续性毫无关系。在这一点上可能难以想象，但像广袤的现在这样的持久性，与你们关于现在、过去和未来的连续性概念毫无关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Through the anima and the animus, so-called, present personalities are able to draw upon the knowledge and intuitions and background that was derived from past existences as the opposite sex. On some occasions, for example, the woman may go overboard and exaggerate female characteristics, in which case the animus or male within comes to her aid, bringing through dream experiences an onrush of knowledge that will result in compensating malelike reactions.
quotes.translation: 通过所谓的阿尼玛和阿尼姆斯，现在的人格能够汲取来自过去作为异性存在时获得的知识、直觉和背景。例如，在某些情况下，女性可能会过度表现并夸大女性特征，这时她内在的阿尼姆斯或男性部分会来帮助她，通过梦境体验带来一股知识洪流，从而产生补偿性的类似男性的反应。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: We have in the past discussed in full the manner in which physical matter is formed. We have also discussed the ego, and our friend would do well to read the sessions dealing with the ego, and the ego's relationship to action. For one of the basic reasons for the difficulty lies in the fact that the ego of the present personality does strongly attempt to stand apart from action. It attempts to force action, and to fight action which it does not initiate.
quotes.translation: 我们过去已充分讨论过物质实相的形成方式，也讨论过自我，我们的朋友最好重读那些探讨自我及其与行动关系的章节。因为造成困境的根本原因之一，在于当前人格的自我确实强烈试图脱离行动。它试图强迫行动，并反抗非其发起的行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I told you that we do not experience your time sequence. We travel through various intensities. Our work, development, and experience all takes place within what I term the "moment point." Here, within the moment point, the smallest thought is brought to fruition, the slightest possibility explored, the probabilities thoroughly examined, the least or the most forceful feeling entertained. It is difficult to explain this clearly, and yet the moment point is the framework within which we have our psychological experience. Within it, simultaneous actions follow "freely" through associative patterns. For example, pretend that I think of you, Joseph. In so doing I immediately experience -- and fully -- your past, present, and future (in your terms), and all of those strong or determining emotions and motivations that have ruled you. I can travel through those experiences with you, if I choose. We can follow a consciousness through all of its forms, for example, and in your terms, within the flicker of an eye.
quotes.translation: 我曾告诉过你们，我们并不体验你们的时间序列。我们穿越各种强度。我们的工作、发展与体验都发生在我所称的"瞬间点"之内。在此处，在瞬间点内，最微小的念头得以实现，最细微的可能性被探索，概率被彻底检视，最微弱或最强烈的情感被容纳。要清晰解释这点很困难，但瞬间点正是我们进行心理体验的框架。在其中，同步行动通过联想模式"自由"展开。例如，假设我想起你，约瑟夫。如此做时，我立即——且完整地——体验你的过去、现在和未来（以你们的说法），以及所有支配过你的强烈或决定性情绪与动机。若我选择，便能与你一同穿越那些体验。例如，我们可以跟随一个意识穿越其所有形态，在你们的时间概念里，这只需眨眼瞬间。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Your own physical environment appears as it does to you because of your own psychological structure. If you gained your sense of personal continuity through associative processes primarily, rather than as a result of the familiarity of self moving through time, then you would experience physical reality in an entirely different fashion. Objects from past and present could be perceived at once, their presence justified through associative connections. Say that your father throughout his lifetime has eight favorite chairs. If your perceptive mechanisms were primarily set up as a result of intuitive association rather than time sequence, then you would perceive all of these chairs at one time; or seeing one, you would be aware of the others. So environment is not a separate thing in itself, but the result of perceptive patterns, and these are determined by psychological structure.
quotes.translation: 你们自身的物质环境之所以呈现为这般模样，是因为你们自身的心理结构。若你们主要通过联想过程而非通过自我穿越时间的熟悉感来获得个人连续性，那么你们将以全然不同的方式体验物质实相。过去与现在的物体可被同时感知，其存在通过联想关联得以合理化。假设你父亲一生拥有八把心爱的椅子。若你的感知机制主要建立在直觉联想而非时间序列上，那么你将同时感知所有这些椅子；或看见一把时，便意识到其他椅子。因此环境本身并非独立之物，而是感知模式的结果，这些模式由心理结构决定。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The reasons given for such subjugations matter little in the long run, for the reasons change with the times and with your culture. You are not under a sentence placed upon you for original sin, by any childhood events, or by past-life experience. Your life, for example, may be far less fulfilling than you think you would prefer. You may be less when you would be more, but you are not under a pall placed upon your psyche, either by original sin, Freud's infancy syndromes, or past-life influences. I will try to explain the past-life influences a bit more clearly here. They affect you as any experience does. Time is not closed, however -- it is open. One life is not buried in the past, disconnected from the present self and any future self as well.
quotes.translation: 从长远来看，为这类屈从所给出的理由并不重要，因为理由会随时代与文化而改变。你们并非因原罪、任何童年事件或前世经历而背负判决。例如，你的生活可能远不如你自认为理想的那样圆满。你可能本应更丰盛却反而更匮乏，但你的心灵并未被原罪、弗洛伊德的婴儿期综合征或前世影响所笼罩。在此我将更清晰地解释前世影响。它们如同任何经历般影响你。然而时间并非封闭——它是开放的。一世生命并非埋藏于过去，与当前自我及任何未来自我割裂。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There were countless other events that happened to you on different afternoons at the same hour, both before and after that one. The cells within your hand contain within themselves memories your conscious mind would be dazzled to behold. Yet remember that the cells in your twenty-seven-year-old hand are in no physical way the same cells that experienced any of those events. In some underground of sensation, however, the buried evidences of stimuli and reaction experienced during those numberless "past" afternoons still exist. Some of those memories will certainly be played back, to affect what you think of as your current experience at twenty-seven. Your conscious thoughts and habits regulate which of them will intermix into the maelstrom of the present.
