First of all, the self that you are is ever-changing and never static. There is an inner self in the terms of those definitions, but that inner self, which is the source of your present being, speaks through your impulses. They provide in-built spiritual and biological impetuses toward your most ideal development (underlined). You must trust the self that you are, now.
quotes.translation: 有些通信者写道：“我意识到自己太自我中心了。”有许多灵性提升的学派教导你“摆脱冲动和欲望的杂乱”，推开你现有的自我，以寻找一个更伟大的理想化版本。首先，你现有的自我是不断变化的，从不是静止的。按照那些定义，存在一个内在自我，但那个内在自我——你当前存在的源头——通过你的冲动来说话。它们为你最理想的发展提供了内在的灵性与生物性驱动力（下划线强调）。你必须信任你此刻所是的自我。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 872, AUGUST 8, 1979
9:15 P.M. WEDNESDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: I have told you that all consciousnesses exist in the spacious present, which is spontaneous while also durable. Then it is no contradiction to say that entities existed before the birth of your planet, though in your time it seems that new ones are being brought to consciousness.
quotes.translation: 我曾告诉过你们，所有意识都存在于广袤的当下，它既是自发的，又是持久的。因此，说实体在你们星球诞生之前就已存在，这并不矛盾——尽管在你们的时间观念里，似乎有新的实体正在被带入意识中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now, in one sense, all selves are projections of the whole or that which is. New universes such as your own constantly come into existence. Systems and planes far different develop and in turn form other systems. Infinity has meaning only in subjective and psychic terms. The physical brain cannot contain the idea of infinity. The concept will not fit into three dimensional terms. The whole self, the inner self moves within the concept of infinity as you move within physical reality through space. Infinity contains all that will ever be known, and, of course, all that will ever be known is known within the spacious present .
quotes.translation: 现在，从某种意义上说，所有自我都是整体或"存在本身"的投射。像你们这样的新宇宙不断诞生。截然不同的系统和层面发展出来，又反过来形成其他系统。无限只有在主观和心灵层面才有意义。物质大脑无法容纳无限的概念，这个概念无法被纳入三维术语。整体自我、内在自我在无限的概念中移动，就像你们在物质实相中穿越空间一样。无限包含所有将被知晓的一切，当然，所有将被知晓的一切都在广袤的当下中被知晓。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It is a period of great activity, telepathic communication, an overcrowding physically, but forces great new developments and a new synthesis, and this is your present situation. (Humorously:) It is not difficult for neighbors to understand each other when they live 50 miles apart. When you become overcrowded in severe circumstances, you must learn to understand your neighbor or lose Your mind. You are forced to relate.
quotes.translation: 这是一个充满巨大活动、心灵感应沟通、物质上过度拥挤的时期，但这也迫使伟大的新发展与新综合出现——这就是你们目前的处境。（幽默地：）当邻居相距五十英里时，彼此理解并不困难。但当你们在严峻环境中变得过度拥挤时，就必须学会理解邻居，否则就会失去理智。你们被迫建立关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It is vital that you understand this inward and outward thrust of "time," however, and realize that from this flows the consecutive appearance of the moment. The thrusting gives dimensions to time that so far you have not even begun to realize. Again, you live on the surface of the moments, with no understanding of the unrecognized and unofficial realities that lie beneath. All of this, once more, is tied in with your accepted neurological recognition of certain messages over others, your mental prejudice that effectively blinds you to other quite valid biological communications that are indeed present all of the "time".
quotes.translation: 然而，理解"时间"这种向内与向外的推力至关重要，要认识到由此产生了片刻的连续显现。这种推力赋予了时间维度，而你们至今甚至尚未开始意识到这些维度。再次强调，你们活在片刻的表面，对底下那些未被承认、非官方的实相一无所知。这一切，又再次与你们神经系统对某些讯息的选择性认可、以及有效蒙蔽你们接受其他确实始终"存在"的有效生物沟通的心智偏见紧密相连。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 688
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The unknown reality: Much of that reality is unknown simply because your beliefs close you off from your own knowledge. The reaches of your own consciousness are not limited. Because you accept the idea of a straight-line movement of time, you cannot see before or after what you think of as your birth or death,* yet your greater consciousness is quite aware of such experience. Ideally it is possible not only to remember "past" lives, but to plan future ones now. In greater terms, all such lives happen at once. Your present neurological structure makes this seem impossible, yet your inner consciousness is not so impeded.
quotes.translation: 未知的实相：其中大部分之所以未知，仅仅是因为你们的信念将你们与自身知识隔绝。你们意识的疆界并不受限。由于你们接受时间直线运动的观念，便无法看见所谓出生或死亡之前或之后的事物——然而你们更伟大的意识对此类经验了如指掌。理想情况下，不仅可能记住"过去"世，甚至现在就能规划未来世。从更宏大的角度来看，所有这类生命同时发生。你们当前的神经结构使这看似不可能，但内在意识并未受此阻碍。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 708
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Intellectual truth alone will not make you free, though it is certainly a necessary preliminary. If this were the case your walls would fall away, since intellectually you understand their rather dubious nature. Since feeling is so often the cohesive with which mind builds, it is feeling itself which must be changed if you would find freedom from your particular plane of existence at your particular time. That is, to some extent a change in feeling will allow you to see variants. Since feeling is a cohesive, to change it completely would hardly be of any advantage since your world of present existence would fall apart.
quotes.translation: 仅凭智性真理无法使你们自由，尽管这无疑是必要的先决条件。倘若如此，你们的围墙就会倒塌——因为智性上你们已理解其颇为可疑的本质。既然感受常是心智构建的粘合剂，若要在特定时间从特定存在层面获得自由，就必须改变感受本身。也就是说，在一定程度上，感受的改变能让你们看见变体。由于感受是粘合剂，完全改变它几乎毫无益处——因为你们当前的存在世界会分崩离析。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You often excel in situations that utterly escape you at a physical level. These accomplishments still operate through the focus of your present, since you are physically aware of but one line of probable events, so the meaning of many dream events escapes you. But in dreams you often do work quite as valid as any performed in the day, and in the dream state you meet and interact with your own reincarnational selves.
quotes.translation: 你往往在完全无法从物质层面理解的情境中表现出色。这些成就仍然通过你当下的焦点运作，因为你只能从物质层面意识到一条可能事件线，所以许多梦境事件的意义对你而言是隐晦的。但在梦境中，你常常完成与白天任何行为同样有效的工作，并在梦境状态中与你自己的转世自我相遇互动。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: A strong suicidal base frequently exists here. The knowledge is present that the "old self" did not make it -- so what assurance does the so-called new self have? (Pause.) Again, the body is a living sculpture. You are in it and you form it, and it is to all intents and purposes you while you are physical. You must identify your material being with it. Otherwise you will feel alienated from your biological identity.
quotes.translation: 此处常存在强烈的自杀倾向基础。已知的事实是"旧自我"未能成功——那么所谓的"新自我"又有什么保障呢？（停顿）再次强调，身体是一座活生生的雕塑。你身处其中并塑造它，在你具有肉身期间，它实际上就是你。你必须将你的物质存在与它认同。否则你会感到与自己的生物身份疏离。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: When you consider ideas as mental and apart from nature, then you feel separated from nature itself. When you imagine a life after death as unnatural or supernatural then you feel divorced, cut off and bewildered. You must try to understand that there are different kinds of nature within Nature -- and a capital for the last one. Your physical life -- your human nature -- is, in your terms, dependent upon a time when you were not. You must realize that not being in that connotation is quite as natural as physical being. Your existence before and after death is as much a normal phenomenon as your present life.
quotes.translation: 当你将思想视为纯粹心智产物而与自然分离时，你便感到与自然本身割裂。当你将死后生命视为非自然或超自然时，你便感到疏离、隔绝与困惑。你必须理解：在自然之内存在着不同种类的自然——最后一个词请用大写。你的物质生命——你的人性——用你的说法，依赖于一个你尚未存在的时刻。你必须认识到，在那个语境中"不存在"与物质存在同样自然。你生前与死后的存在，与你现在的生活一样是正常现象。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: I have wanted to cover this because I can prove the existence of this dream world to you, and its continuity, always within the spacious present. You must understand psychological reality, psychological time, psychological experience, and the dream existence before you can learn to utilize many abilities, since in all the mentioned aspects, you use your abilities, that is your inner senses, on a subconscious level.
quotes.translation: 我一直想涵盖这个主题，因为我能向你证明这个梦境世界的存在及其连续性——始终处于广袤当下之中。你必须理解心理实相、心理时间、心理体验以及梦境存在，才能学会运用许多能力，因为在所有提及的方面，你都在潜意识层面运用你的能力，即你的内在感官。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I also said that new entities were being formed, but in the framework of the spacious present all this is spontaneous. The contradiction seems a contradiction only on your terms. On my terms there is none. For practical purposes you may say, in truth on your own terms, that entities simply have had time to develop further personalities. But I want it understood that this is true only within your own time framework.
quotes.translation: 我还说过新实体正在形成，但在广袤当下的架构中，这一切都是自发发生的。这种矛盾只在你的认知框架下才显得矛盾。在我的认知框架下则毫无矛盾。为实用目的，你可以用你自己的说法如实说：实体只是有足够时间发展出更多人格面向。但我希望你们明白，这仅在你自己的时间框架内成立。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: (Regarding the data on page 260: John said Seth's description of an Andy Gump type fits a salesman in his company named John Winslow and that JW was present at the Rochester meeting three weeks ago, during which time the transformation took place in the features of John's district supervisor. Winslow is about 55, with brownish hair that is now graying. It is cut short and is circular in shape, with no widow's peak.
quotes.translation: （关于第260页的资料：约翰说赛斯描述的安迪·冈普类型，符合他公司里一位名叫约翰·温斯洛的销售员，且JW三周前出席了罗切斯特会议，当时约翰的区域主管的面容发生了转变。温斯洛约55岁，棕色头发现已花白，剪得很短呈圆形，没有美人尖。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Try to experience all of your present sense data as fully as you can. This tones your entire physical and psychic organism, bringing all of your perceptions together so that your awareness opens fully. Body and mind operate together. You experience an immediate sense of power because your abilities are directed to the fullest of their capacities. In a physical moment you can act directly on the spot, so to speak.
quotes.translation: 尽可能充分地体验你所有的当下感官资料。这会调谐你整个身体与心灵的组织，将所有感知统合起来，使你的意识完全敞开。身体与心智协同运作。你会立即感受到一种力量感，因为你的能力被导向了其最充分的发挥。可以说，在物理的瞬间，你能当场直接行动。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Each particular "station" of consciousness perceives in a different kind of reality, and as mentioned earlier (in Session 711, for instance), you usually tune in to your home station most of the time. If you turn your focus only slightly away, the world appears differently; and if that slightly altered focus were the predominant one, then that is how the world would seem to be. Each aspect of the psyche perceives the reality upon which it is focused, and that reality is also the materialization of a particular state of the psyche projected outward. You can learn to encounter other realities by altering your position within your own psyche.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: It is unfortunately true that the dominant present ego can be degraded on your plane to an amazing degree, through for example brainwashing and so forth. However this situation, while bad enough, is not as dire as you might think. When you are considering the human personality as a thing of this time only and destroyed by death, then its disintegration for any reason seems truly a tragic thing. And it is tragic.
quotes.translation: 不幸的是，在你们的层面上，主导性的当下自我可以被贬低到惊人的程度，例如通过洗脑等手段。然而，这种情况虽然糟糕，却并不像你想象的那么可怕。当你将人类人格视为仅存在于这个时代、且被死亡所毁灭的东西时，那么它因任何原因的解体似乎都真正是悲剧性的。而这确实是悲剧。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: He has taken at least as much as he gave, and there were sly and secret ways in which the father repaid him. Yet here we have further conflict, because indeed the present father loves the present son. It is not the son that he would wound. It is the man that son once was.
quotes.translation: 他至少已经得到了与他所给予的同样多的东西，而且父亲以隐秘而巧妙的方式回报了他。然而，这里我们看到了进一步的冲突，因为确实，当下的父亲爱着当下的儿子。他想要伤害的并不是这个儿子，而是儿子曾经是的那个男人。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: At the levels with which we are concerned, the body must primarily react to present, immediate, primary existence in space and time. At other levels it is equipped to handle many kinds of data, in that I have mentioned before the precognition of cells. But the body depends on the conscious mind to give it a clear assessment of precise conditions of the space and time it occupies. It depends upon that knowledge.
quotes.translation: 在我们所关注的层面上，身体必须主要对当下、直接、首要的时空存在做出反应。在其他层面上，它具备处理多种数据的能力，因为我之前提到过细胞的预知能力。但身体依赖意识心，来对它占据的时空的具体状况做出清晰的评估。它依赖那种知识。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The effect of any thought is a quite precise and definite one, that is set into motion specifically because of the nature of its own electromagnetic identity. The physical system operates best within certain electromagnetic patterns, and is adversely affected by others. These effects change the actual molecular structure of the physical cells of the organism, for better or for worse, and because of certain laws of attraction a habitual pattern will operate. A destructive type of thought, then, is dangerous not only for the present state of the organism, but dangerous in terms of the future.
quotes.translation: 任何思想的效果都是相当精确而明确的，它之所以被启动，正是由于其自身电磁身份的本质。物理系统在特定的电磁模式中运作最佳，而受到其他模式的负面影响。这些影响会改变生物体物理细胞的实际分子结构，无论好坏，并且由于某些吸引法则，一种习惯性的模式会运作起来。因此，一种破坏性的思想不仅对生物体的当下状态是危险的，而且对未来也是危险的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Some who wanted to travel from the Old World to the New, may be reborn in the new one. You must remember also that abilities from past lives are at your disposal for your present use. You reap your own rewards. Information concerning these is often given to you in the sleep state, and there is a kind of gestalt type of dream, a root dream, by which those who have known each other in past lives now communicate.
quotes.translation: 一些想要从旧世界旅行到新世界的人，可能会在新世界中重生。你还必须记住，来自过去世的能力可供你在当下使用。你收获你自己的奖赏。关于这些的信息常常在睡眠状态中给予你，并且有一种格式塔式的梦，一种根源之梦，通过它，那些在过去世中相识的人现在得以沟通。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: When man realizes that he creates his own image now, he will not find it so startling to believe that he creates other images in other times. Only after such a basis will the idea of reincarnation achieve its natural validity, and only when it is understood that the subconscious, certain layers of it, is a link between the present personality and past ones, will the theory of reincarnation be accepted as fact.
quotes.translation: 当人类明白自己此刻正在创造自身的形象时，就不会觉得相信自己在其他时间创造其他形象是件令人震惊的事了。只有建立在此基础之上，转世的概念才能获得其自然的有效性；只有当人们理解潜意识（其特定层面）是当前人格与过去人格之间的纽带时，转世理论才会被接受为事实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: So the inner senses and the subconscious can do the same thing as far as inner space, and what you would call inner time, is concerned. But this is not amazing, far from it. It only seems strange because you are so familiar with your precious camouflage patterns. Time and space, dear friends, are both camouflage patterns, therefore the fact that the inner senses can conquer time and space is not, after all, so surprising. To the mind with its subconscious, and to the inner senses, there is no time and space, and therefore to them nothing is conquered. The camouflage is simply not present.
quotes.translation: 因此，就内在空间及你们所谓的内在时间而言，内在感官与潜意识也能做到同样的事。但这并不惊人，远非如此。它之所以显得奇怪，仅仅是因为你们太熟悉自己珍贵的伪装模式了。时间与空间，亲爱的朋友们，都是伪装模式，因此内在感官能超越时间与空间这一事实，终究并不令人惊讶。对于拥有潜意识的意识及内在感官而言，并不存在时间与空间，因此对它们来说，也并无所谓"超越"。伪装根本不存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Past experience does not cause present experience. You are forming both past, present and future experience simultaneously. Events appear to you however in sequence, therefore it is difficult to explain many matters to you, because they must be given in bits and pieces.
quotes.translation: 过去的经验并不导致现在的经验。你们正在同时形成过去、现在与未来的经验。然而，事件对你们而言是以序列方式呈现的，因此许多事情很难向你们解释，因为它们必须被零碎地传达。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The next adjacent level now would be A-1-c, which is an extension of the one just given, in which there is greater freedom of action, mobility and experience. Here to some extent there is some participation in the events perceived. There is no need to go deeply into any of these beyond this point, because ordinarily you will not be involved with them, and they lead into realities that have little reference to your own. They are states of consciousness too divorced, and under usual circumstances, this is as far as your present consciousness is able to go in that particular direction.
quotes.translation: 下一个相邻的层面是A-1-c，这是对刚刚所述层面的延伸，在此有更大的行动自由、移动性与经验。在此，某种程度上能参与所感知的事件。没有必要深入探讨这些层面，因为通常你们不会涉足其中，它们会导向与你们自身现实几乎无关的实相。这些意识状态过于疏离，在一般情况下，你们当前的意识在特定方向上所能达到的极限就是如此。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: For example, in a dream of 20 minutes, events that would ordinarily take years can be experienced. The body ages its 20 minutes of time, and that is all. In dreams, experience is peripheral, in that it dips into your time and touches it, leaving ripples; but the dream events themselves exist largely out of time. Dream experience is ordered in a circular fashion. Sometimes it never touches the hub of your present moment at all, as you think of it, as far as your memory is concerned; yet the dream is, and it is registered at all other levels of your existence, including the cellular.
quotes.translation: 例如，在一场二十分钟的梦境中，可以体验到通常需要数年才能经历的事件。身体只老化二十分钟的时间，仅此而已。在梦中，经验是边缘性的，它浸入你们的时间并触及它，留下涟漪；但梦境事件本身大多存在于时间之外。梦境经验以循环方式组织。有时它根本不会触及你们当下时刻的核心——就你们所认为的当下，以及你们的记忆而言；然而梦境确实存在，并在你们存在的所有其他层面（包括细胞层面）都被记录。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The excitement however is counterfeit at present. The questioner hunts out an object, another personality, when she basically believes the personality is unattainable. The other personality is not sought for because of any inherent qualities of his own. He serves, instead, as a substitute in a quest that the questioner has not yet begun.
quotes.translation: 然而，目前这种兴奋是虚假的。提问者追寻一个对象、另一个人格，而她本质上相信这个人格是无法企及的。她追寻另一个人格，并非因其自身固有的特质。相反，他充当了提问者尚未开始的探索中的替代品。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: This predictive picture is then set against two models. First it is checked against the body's ideal standard of health in its individual case -- its own greatest fulfillment. Then it is checked against the image of the body sent to it by the conscious self. Correlations are made instantaneously. In an organizational framework that would certainly be envied by the most advanced technological concern, communications spring back and forth with great rapidity. The body makes whatever changes are necessary in order to bring the two images in line with the present corporeal condition.
quotes.translation: 这个预测图像随后与两个模型进行比对。首先，它对照身体在个体情况下的理想健康标准——即其自身的最大圆满状态。其次，它对照意识自我传递给身体的形象。这些关联是瞬间完成的。在一个连最先进科技企业都会艳羡的组织架构中，信息以极快的速度来回传递。身体会做出任何必要的调整，以使这两个形象与当下的身体状态保持一致。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Just before the experience of death, timelessness, or the spacious present, begins to be perceived. It is because the ego is tied to its past that it sees the past seemingly rise up. It has the ability to see what is coming, so to speak, but while the frightened ego is still in control it chooses to see only a portion of what is possible, and before the point of death it usually chooses to hide in the past.
quotes.translation: 就在死亡体验之前，无时间性，或者说广阔当下，开始被感知。这是因为自我与它的过去紧密相连，所以它看到过去似乎浮现出来。可以说，它有能力看到即将发生的事情，但当受惊的自我仍处于掌控状态时，它选择只看到可能性中的一部分，而在死亡点之前，它通常选择躲藏在过去之中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The Christ drama did splash over into historical reality. Man's fears of not achieving brotherhood, of not achieving a secure state of consciousness, or a workable morality, result in his dreams of destruction, however they are expressed. And indeed, the present physical event as it exists now at the energy plant near Harrisburg can easily be likened to -- and is -- a warning dream to change man's actions.
quotes.translation: 基督的戏剧确实波及了历史现实。人类对无法实现手足情谊、无法达到稳定的意识状态或可行的道德规范的恐惧，导致了他们的毁灭之梦，无论这些梦以何种方式表达。事实上，当前在哈里斯堡附近能源厂存在的物质事件，很容易被比作——并且确实是——一个警告人类改变行为的梦。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 844, APRIL 1, 1979
4:01 P.M. SUNDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: This is not a case of a hose looking like a snake. This is a failure of a different sort, according to whether or not the constructor of the hose is present or still constructing his object. There is something here that I will explain. I have briefly mentioned before, I believe, what I will term an afterimage. When you cease active construction of an object, the pattern begins to fade but remains inactive.
quotes.translation: 这不是一个水管看起来像蛇的情况。根据水管的建造者是否在场或仍在建造他的物体，这是一种不同类型的失败。这里有些东西我会解释。我相信我之前曾简要提到过，我将称之为余像。当你停止对一个物体的主动构建时，模式开始消退但保持不活跃状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Those of you who believe in reincarnation in more or less conventional terms, can make the error of using or blaming "past" lives, organizing them through your current beliefs. It is bad enough to believe that you are at the mercy of one past, but to consider yourself helpless before innumerable previous errors from other lives puts you in an impossible situation; the conscious will is robbed of its power to act. Such lives exist simultaneously. They are other expressions of yourself, interacting, but with each conscious self possessing the point of power in its own present.
quotes.translation: 那些或多或少以传统方式相信转世的人，可能会犯下利用或指责"前世"的错误，通过你当前的信念来组织它们。相信受制于一个过去已经够糟了，但认为自己面对来自其他生命的无数先前错误而无能为力，会让你陷入不可能的境地；意识意志被剥夺了行动的力量。这样的生命是同时存在的。它们是你自己的其他表达，相互影响，但每个有意识的自我在其自身的当下都拥有力量点。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

related_concepts.name_en: The point of power is in the present

quotes.text: If there are strongly negative characteristics present in your most intimate thoughts, if these actually form bars between you and a more full life, still you often look through the bars, not seeing them. Until they are recognized they are impediments. Even obstacles have a reason for being. If they are your own, then it is up to you to recognize them and discover the circumstances behind their existence.
quotes.translation: 如果你最私密的思想中存在强烈的负面特质，如果这些特质实际上在你和更充实的生活之间形成了栅栏，你仍然常常透过栅栏看出去，却看不见它们。直到它们被认出，它们才是障碍。即使障碍也有存在的理由。如果它们是你自己的，那么由你来认出它们，并发现它们存在背后的情况。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The number one time cannot contain other times but the consciousness, with help, can to some extent perceive these other times. And this perception then allows consciousness to escape some of the confinements of that one time. Our spacious present of which I have spoken contains all times, but it is not a thing apart from them, nor precisely their sum. It is ever unfolding and mobile, and changing itself.
quotes.translation: 首要时间无法容纳其他时间，但意识在协助下能在某种程度上感知这些其他时间。这种感知随后使意识得以摆脱那个单一时间的某些束缚。我所说的广阔当下包含所有时间，但它并非独立于这些时间之外的存在，也不完全是它们的总和。它始终在展开、流动，并不断自我改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: You normally organize your experience in terms of time. Your usual stream of consciousness is also highly associative, however. Certain events in the present will remind you of past ones, for example, and sometimes your memory of the past will color present events.
quotes.translation: 你通常以时间为基准组织经验。然而，你惯常的意识流也具有高度联想性。例如，当下的某些事件会令你想起过往，有时你对过去的记忆会为当下事件染上色彩。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The school and the store were not in the infant's experience, for in that probability the family moved away. The blur of activity earlier was the result of neurological confusion, and Ruburt switched over unknowingly to an environment still in the same physical block that was meaningful to him, but not shared by the future experience of that infant. You must understand that your own past exists as vitally as does your present -- but your probable pasts and presents exist in the same manner. You simply do not accept them in the strands of experience that "you" recognize.5
quotes.translation: 学校与商店并不存在于那个婴儿的经验中，因为在那条可能性里，那家人已经搬走了。先前的活动模糊是神经混乱的结果，而鲁柏不知不觉切换到了同一物理街区中对他有意义的环境——但这个环境并未被那个婴儿的未来经验所共享。你必须明白，你自己的过去与当下同样鲜活地存在着——而你的可能过去与可能当下也以同样方式存在。你只是没有将它们纳入"你"所认知的经验脉络中。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 686
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: If you will consider the projection of a thought, that is intangible, so that it affects another individual, and hence both directly and indirectly affects the action of physical matter, then you may consider the possibility of other such projections. We have here a rather delicate point. I have said that there are no duplicates. Yet you may say, are not some thoughts duplicates? The variations may indeed be slight, but the variations are always present. A thought transmitted knowingly or unknowingly by "A" is not precisely the same thought when it reaches receiver "B".
quotes.translation: 若你思考无形思想的投射——它能影响他人，从而直接间接地影响物质实相的行动——那么你便能考虑其他类似投射的可能性。这里有个相当微妙之处。我曾说过不存在复制品。但你可能质疑：难道有些思想不是复制品吗？差异或许确实细微，但差异始终存在。由"A"有意或无意传递的思想，当抵达接收者"B"时，已不再是完全相同的那个思想。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Usually you will project from the physical body into the first form, and then perhaps into the second form. Occasionally this will happen and you will not know it, despite all your attempts to ascertain your circumstances. There are indeed however ways and signs that tell you when you switch from one form to the other, and we shall indeed see that you know these. You should both--this is Joseph and Ruburt now--you should both have several examples of projections within the first and second forms in the following months, if your development continues at its present rate.
quotes.translation: 通常你会从物质身体投射到第一形态，继而可能进入第二形态。偶尔这种情况会发生而你却浑然不觉，尽管你竭尽全力确认自身处境。然而确实存在某些方式与迹象，能告知你何时从一种形态切换至另一种形态，我们终将发现你本就知晓这些。你们两位——此处指约瑟与鲁柏——若以目前速率持续发展，未来数月内应能获得若干第一形态与第二形态内的投射实例。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Nor does the receiver receive the thought in the same condition. The thought, the original thought, is retained by A. A, however, forms a thought as nearly identical as his possibilities allow it to be. This he transmits to B. But B can't receive the thought in its present condition, for the act of receiving a thought also changes it. He forms a thought as nearly identical as possible, and interprets it.
quotes.translation: 接收者接收思想时，其状态也已改变。原始思想仍保留在A处。但A会尽其可能形成近乎相同的思想，并将其传递给B。然而B无法以原始状态接收该思想，因为接收行为本身也会改变思想。他会尽可能形成近乎相同的思想，并加以诠释。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Yet as you can see, what it was when we spoke of it is still present in what it will by now have become. The ego, through its own nature and characteristics, attempts to limit such change, but it succeeds only in limiting itself by limiting its perceptions. It still must change, as is obvious. But it changes along certain lines, moving within certain patterns of perception which are characteristic of it.
quotes.translation: 然而如你所见，当我们谈论它时它是什么，在它现在已变成什么之中仍然存在。自我通过其本性和特性试图限制这种变化，但它只成功地通过限制其感知而限制了自身。它仍然必须改变，这是显而易见的。但它沿着特定路线改变，在其特有的感知模式中移动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You can within them often perceive both your past and present simultaneously, but this has always been a characteristic of the whole self in any case. The whole self is not bound by any system. At various times more of the abilities of the whole self intrude, so to speak, upon the ego system. You then become conscious of action that escaped you earlier. This often occurs with the help of the dream state.
quotes.translation: 你可以在这些模式中同时感知过去和现在，但这本来就是全我始终具有的特性。全我不受任何系统的束缚。在不同时刻，全我的更多能力会侵入自我系统，可以说。然后你便意识到先前被你忽略的行动。这通常借助梦境状态发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: To this end, through Ruburt, I am producing the continuing body of the Seth material, and books, each in a different way geared to these goals. In my present book, The Nature of Personal Reality: A Seth Book, I am including techniques that will allow you and thousands of others to use these ideas in normal daily living, to enrich the life that you know and to help you understand and solve your problems.
quotes.translation: 为此，通过鲁柏，我正在持续创作赛斯资料和书籍，每本书都以不同方式针对这些目标。在我目前的著作《个人实相的本质：赛斯书》中，我包含了让你和其他成千上万人在日常正常生活中运用这些理念的技巧，以丰富你所知的生命，并帮助你理解和解决你的问题。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: "At once" does not imply a finished state of perfection nor a cosmic situation in which all things have been done, for all things are still happening. You are still happening -- but both present and future selves; and your past self is still undergoing what you think is done. Moreover, it is experiencing events that you do not recall, that your linear-attuned consciousness cannot perceive on that level.
quotes.translation: "同时"并不意味着一种完成的完美状态，也不意味着所有事情都已完成的宇宙情境，因为所有事情仍在发生。你仍在发生——但包括现在和未来的自己；而你的过去自我仍在经历你认为已经完成的事情。此外，它正在经历你不记得的事件，你那线性调谐的意识在那个层面上无法感知这些事件。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: To those who ask concerning the origin of that inward energy you may say that the inwardness came from itself. In the spacious present there simply is no past. There can be no point of origin in time as you conceive it. It is only within your camouflage perspective that this remark appears illogical, but this does not mean that you still cannot grasp some of its meaning, using your own inner experience.
quotes.translation: 对于那些询问内在能量起源的人，你可以说内在性来自自身。在广阔当下中根本没有过去。在你所构想的时间中不可能有起源点。只有在你的伪装视角中，这句话才显得不合逻辑，但这并不意味着你仍然无法利用自己的内在经验来把握其部分含义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You do experience time, but not time as it is bound by your camouflage patterns. As I have mentioned you can in a dream or daydream or through conscious use of psychological time experience many hours in a few clock minutes. This experience comes very close to the third inner sense. If you will remember again our imaginary experience through the inner senses as we looked down at the street, you will remember that I spoke of sensing not only the present essence of the living consciousness within a certain scope, but I also mentioned sensing their past and futures.
quotes.translation: 你确实经历时间，但不是被你的伪装模式所束缚的时间。如我所提，你可以在梦境或白日梦中，或通过有意识地使用心理时间，在几分钟的时钟时间内经历许多小时。这种体验非常接近第三内在感官。如果你再次回想我们通过内在感官向下看街道的想象体验，你会记得我曾提到不仅感知到一定范围内活意识的当下本质，还提到感知到它们的过去和未来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The spacious present is much more a vivid reality to those outside of your system. Your time seems marked, individually, by birth and death. When these are known for what they are, when the personality can change form at will, such quote "timing" is meaningless.
quotes.translation: 对你们系统之外的人来说，广袤的当下是远为生动的实相。你们的时间似乎以出生与死亡为个人标记。当这些现象被认清其本质，当人格能随意改变形态时，这种所谓的"定时"便毫无意义了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It is this basic feeling about the book and Saratoga that suddenly activated past associations and brought on some identification with his mother. He should remember here that he is not the person who lived in Saratoga now, unless he chooses in a self limiting way to be so. The book itself, oddly enough, provides a certain protection for it informs others of his basic strength. It shocked him to know that people of the past were reading the book in his present, and seemed to draw him closer to those original associations that caused him to leave Saratoga.
quotes.translation: 正是这种对书和萨拉托加的基本感受，突然激活了过去的联想，并引发了对母亲的部分认同。他应当记住，此刻他并非那个曾住在萨拉托加的人，除非他选择以自我设限的方式成为那个人。这本书本身，说来奇怪，提供了某种保护——因为它向他人昭示了他基本的力量。得知过去的人正在他当下的时刻阅读这本书，这令他震惊，似乎将他拉近那些最初导致他离开萨拉托加的关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: In sleep and dream states you are involved in the same dimension of existence in which you will have your after-death experiences. You do not remember the most important part of these nightly adventures, and so those you do recall seem bizarre or chaotic as a rule. This is simply because in your present state of development you are not able to manipulate consciously within more than one environment.
quotes.translation: 在睡眠与梦境状态中，你涉入的是与死后经验相同的存在维度。你记不得这些夜间冒险中最关键的部分，因此你所忆起的那些通常显得怪异或混乱。这仅仅是因为在你当前的发展阶段，你尚无法在超过一个环境中有意识地运作。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I am going to go out rather far on the limb right here. Remembering what you now know about the nature of time, you should know that the apparent boundaries between past, present and future are only illusions, caused by the amount of action you can physically perceive. Therefore, it is more than possible to react in the past to an event that has not yet occurred, to be influenced by your own future.
quotes.translation: 我此刻要冒昧直言了。记住你现已了解的时间本质，你应当明白过去、现在与未来之间的表面界限只是幻相，是由你肉体所能感知的行动量所造成。因此，完全有可能在过去对尚未发生的事件做出反应，被你自己的未来所影响。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: (From the 49th session for April 29, 1964:) It is much better in the long run to quietly and cautiously advance [in these sessions]. I am not the Holy Ghost. I do not require or demand the vows of poverty, obedience, and certainly not chastity. I will at all times demand integrity, and perhaps when all is said and done that is my only requirement. (Then to a friend of a friend of ours -- both were present, and among the few to witness a session up to that time:) Excess enthusiasm can lead to fanaticism, and this at all costs must be avoided.
quotes.translation: （摘自1964年4月29日第49节课：）从长远来看，[在这些课程中]安静而谨慎地前进要好得多。我不是圣灵。我不要求或索取贫穷、服从的誓言，当然更不要求贞洁。我始终要求的是正直，或许当一切尘埃落定时，这就是我唯一的要求。（然后对我们一位朋友的朋友说——两人当时都在场，是少数见证过课程的人之一：）过度的热情会导致狂热，这一点必须不惜一切代价避免。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Because there are bleed-throughs and interconnections, it is possible for you to tune into a "future event," say of an unfortunate nature, an event for which you are headed if you continue on your present course. A dream about it, for instance, may so frighten you that you avoid the event and do not experience it. If so, such a dream is a message from a probable self who did experience the event.
quotes.translation: 由于存在渗透与互联，你有可能调频到某个"未来事件"——比如说一个不幸性质的事件，一个若你继续当前路线就会遭遇的事件。例如，关于它的一个梦可能让你如此恐惧，以至于你避开该事件而不去经历它。若是如此，这样的梦就是来自某个确实经历过该事件的可能自我的讯息。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In your present system of beliefs, and with the dubious light in which the unconscious is considered, a fear of the emotions is often generated. Not only are they often hindered in waking life, then, but censored as much as possible in dreams. Their expression becomes very difficult; great blockages of energy occur, which in your terms can result in neurotic or even stronger, psychotic, behavior.
quotes.translation: 在你们目前的信念体系中，加上潜意识被视为可疑之光，往往会产生对情感的恐惧。不仅在清醒生活中常被阻碍，在梦境中也尽可能受到审查。情感的表达变得极其困难；大量能量阻塞发生，以你们的说法可能导致神经质甚至更严重的精神病行为。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Beneath these root assumptions however portions of the self perceive physical reality in an entirely different fashion, free of the tyranny of objects and material form. Here you experience concepts directly, without the need for symbolisms. Here you experience the spacious present directly. Here you have knowledge of your past personalities, and know that they exist simultaneously with your own.
quotes.translation: 然而在这些根本假设之下，自我的部分以完全不同的方式感知物质实相，不受物体和物质形态的暴政所束缚。在此你直接体验概念，无需象征符号。在此你直接体验广阔当下。在此你了解自己过去的人格，并知晓它们与你的当下同时存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Raindrop patterns in a puddle follow certain laws having to do with the contours of the land, the weather, the nature of the rain, of the clouds, the height from which the raindrops fall, and the conditions operating in the nearby and far portions of the world. If you could properly understand all of that, then by looking into a single puddle you could tell the past and present weather conditions for the entire planet, and follow the probabilities in terms of storms, or volcanic eruptions. You cannot do this, of course, yet it is possible.
quotes.translation: 水坑中的雨滴图案遵循某些法则，与地形、天气、雨的性质、云的性质、雨滴下落的高度以及世界远近区域运作的条件有关。如果你能完全理解这一切，那么只需观察一个水坑，就能说出整个星球过去和现在的天气状况，并追踪风暴或火山喷发方面的可能性。当然你做不到，但这却是可能的。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: But beyond this life, and before this life, and forming this life, there are identities and there are realities and these are not dead. Identity as experience is intimate. It is a psychic reality but it exists electromagnetically. Identity, the self that you are, is made up of the selves that you were and, my dear friends, the selves that you shall be. The selves that you were still exist. The selves that you shall be already exist. The lives that you have lived, in your terms, are still being lived. There is no past, present or future.
quotes.translation: 但超越此生、在此生之前、并形成此生的，存在着身份和实相，而这些并非死寂。作为经验的身份是亲密的。它是心灵实相，却以电磁方式存在。身份，即你所是的自己，由你曾是的自己和我亲爱的朋友们，以及你将成为的自己组成。你曾是的自己依然存在。你将成为的自己已经存在。以你们的说法，你活过的生命仍在被活出。没有过去、现在或未来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Action may show itself as motion, but it is much more than motion in the terms which you usually use, and motion is but one small dimension within actions realm. All types of consciousness represent a different focus of energy's perception within itself. There is no past or future to action. All action is simultaneous. Identities, some identities and some forms of consciousness, particularly the ego, perceive a past or a present, but this is merely the result of the manner in which such identities and consciousness view available data.
quotes.translation: 行动可能表现为运动，但以你们通常使用的术语而言，它远不止是运动，而运动只是行动领域内一个微小的维度。所有类型的意识都代表能量在其自身内部感知的不同焦点。行动没有过去或未来。所有行动都是同时的。身份，某些身份和某些形式的意识，特别是自我，会感知过去或现在，但这仅仅是这些身份和意识审视可用数据的方式所导致的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There are space-time coordinates that operate from your viewpoint -- and space travel from the standpoint of your time, made along the axis of your space, will be a relatively sterile procedure. (In parentheses: Some reported instances of UFO's happened in the past as far as the visitors were concerned, but appeared as images or realities in your present. This involves craft sightings only.* )
quotes.translation: 从你们的视角来看，存在时空坐标——而从你们的时间立场沿你们空间轴进行的太空旅行，将是一个相对贫瘠的过程。（括号内：就访客而言，一些报道的UFO案例发生在过去，但以图像或实相的形式出现在你们的当下。这仅涉及飞行器目击事件。）
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 713
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: In The Nature of Personal Reality I stated that the point of action occurs in the present.10 In Adventures in Consciousness Ruburt said, quite properly, that time experience actually splashed out from the present to form an apparent past and future.11
quotes.translation: 在《个人实相的本质》中，我曾指出行动的发生点就在当下。10 在《意识探险》中，鲁柏恰当地指出，时间体验实际上是从当下向外迸溅，形成看似存在的过去与未来。11
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 741
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: In your dreams, in other words, you are familiar with images like the mammals and reptiles, that would seem not to belong to the present. These however would seem to belong to the future rather than to the past, and these you forget almost instantly, as a rule. This does not mean that some individuals do not recall them.
quotes.translation: 换言之，在你们的梦境中，你们熟悉那些看似不属于当下的意象，比如哺乳动物和爬行动物。然而这些意象似乎更属于未来而非过去，通常你们会几乎瞬间遗忘它们。但这并不意味着某些人无法忆起它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: (12:21.) In other terms, the self that you have projected into the future is sending you back encouragement from a probable reality that you still can create. That focused self operates from its present, however, and some day in your own future you may find yourself thinking nostalgically of a moment back in your own past, when you were indecisive and irresolute, but took the proper course.
quotes.translation: （12:21。）换个说法，你们投射到未来的那个自己，正从你们仍可创造的某个可能实相中，向你们发送回鼓励。那个聚焦的自我是从它的当下运作的，而在你们自己未来的某一天，你们可能会发现自己正怀旧地想起过去某个时刻——那时你们犹豫不决、优柔寡断，却最终选择了正确的道路。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: He tells us that our reincarnational selves explore the past, present, and future--but basically all at once, since time as he defines it is simultaneous. I've written before that as physical creatures we're always going to find the contradictory notion of "simultaneous time" hard to comprehend, intellectually at least.
quotes.translation: 他告诉我们，我们的转世自我探索着过去、现在与未来——但本质上这一切同时发生，因为他所定义的时间是同时性的。我曾写过，作为物质生物，我们始终会发现“同时性时间”这一矛盾概念难以理解，至少在理智层面如此。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Even in God of Jane, which was published in 1981, Jane presented some relatively late material from Seth to show that he doesn't independently communicate with others. The idea that he'd done so can be inspiring, however. In Chapter 20 of her book, see Session 876 for August 27, 1979. After explaining how a couple of women (among others) had recently claimed that he had been in contact with them, Seth stated: "Now, I did not communicate with those women--but their belief in me helped each of them use certain abilities."
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 6: Genetic Heritage and Reincarnational Predilections

quotes.text: In many ways this is a cozy concept, though to some it can be quite frightening with its connotations of eternal damnation. It is far too tidy an idea, however, to hint at the rich embellishments that are at the heart of divine creativity. The soul stands both within and without the fabric of physical life as you know it. You are not separated from the animals and the rest of existence by virtue of possessing an eternal inner consciousness. Such a consciousness is present within all living beings, and in all forms.
quotes.translation: 从许多方面来看，这是一个舒适的概念，尽管对某些人而言，其永恒诅咒的隐含意义可能相当可怕。然而，这个想法过于简洁，无法暗示神性创造力核心中那些丰富的装饰。灵魂既存在于你们所知物质生命结构的内部，也存在于其外部。你们并非因拥有永恒的内在意识而与动物及其他存在分离。这种意识存在于所有生灵及一切形态之中。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In our past sessions I have explained time distortions, and you are familiar with the spacious present. So it should be no surprise to realize that basically the future is in existence now, and the past has never been swept away. In your physical field you merely look away, or turn your focus from one point to another.
quotes.translation: 在过去的课程中，我曾解释过时间扭曲，你们也熟悉“广袤当下”的概念。因此，认识到未来本质上此刻就已存在，而过去从未被抹去，这不应令你们惊讶。在你们的物质场域中，你们只是转移视线，或将焦点从一点转向另一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The cell's comprehension leaps its present form. The reality, the physical reality of a given cell, is the focused result of its existence before and after itself in time; and from its knowledge of past and future it receives its present structure.
quotes.translation: 细胞的领悟超越了它当前的形式。一个特定细胞的实相，即其物质实相，是它在时间中前后存在的聚焦结果；它从对过去和未来的认知中，获得了当前的结构。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 690
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: This should lead you to understand why physical time is basically meaningless to the subconscious, and why the inner self has at its command a knowledge of past lives and past endeavors; for the inner self, dear friends, these lives are not in the past, nor is the life of the ego necessarily present to the whole self.
quotes.translation: 这应该能让你们理解，为何物质时间对潜意识而言基本毫无意义，以及为何内在自我能够掌握过去世和过去努力的认知；因为对内在自我而言，亲爱的朋友们，这些生命并非存在于过去，而自我的人生也未必是全体自我所认知的"当下"。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: （ I then remembered that in the 232nd session Seth had said I was in a light trance myself during sessions, as I made ",certain automatic adjustments in order to perceive what little of my presence that you do perceive. And I also have a calming effect on you, which is most beneficial to you." See Volume 5, page 277. Recalling this, I wondered if I was not making a strong effort to perceive Seth, perhaps in apparition form, this evening; which meant that possibly he was present to a stronger degree than usual.
quotes.translation: （当时我记起，在第232节中赛斯曾说过，我在课程期间自己也处于轻度出神状态，因为我做了"某些自动调整，以便感知到你们所感知到的我那极少的存在。而且我对你们也有镇定效果，这对你们极为有益。"见第五卷第277页。回想起这点，我不禁怀疑自己今晚是否正强烈努力去感知赛斯，或许是以显灵的形式；这意味着他可能比平时更强烈地临在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Your people learned them from their elders, and they were called Speakers. You were a Speaker. This is why you find it so easy to call others your brothers. Now: Three men in particular who are under you (in the manufacturing plant where Ron holds a supervisor's position), were part of that original band of men. Your wife, your daughter-in-law and your son (all present this evening) were also members of that band. Your wife and your daughter-in-law, however, were brothers. Now give us a moment here. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 你们的人民从长辈那里学到这些，他们被称为"代言人"。你曾是一位代言人。这就是为什么你如此轻易地称他人为兄弟。现在：在你手下（在罗恩担任主管的制造厂里）的三个人，正是那个原始群体的一部分。你的妻子、儿媳和儿子（今晚都在场）也是那个群体的成员。不过你的妻子和儿媳曾是兄弟。现在请给我们一点时间。（停顿。）
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I have endeavored to study rather thoroughly the condition of the other male present in the room, yourself excluded, Joseph, because we find here an almost classic example of the manner in which the individual subconsciously creates physical matter, and the manner in which the psychological and psychic problems of the individual conspire so that the organic perfection becomes disturbed.
quotes.translation: 我努力相当彻底地研究了房间里另一位在场男性的状况，约瑟，不包括你本人，因为我们在这里发现了一个近乎经典的例子，展示了个人潜意识创造物质实相的方式，以及个人心理与心灵问题如何共同作用，导致有机体的完美状态受到干扰。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: "3. Our experience of the present is enriched by our memory of past perceptions. In some systems it works the other way: Inhabitants are aware of the future as we are of the past. On the other hand their 'memory' of the past fades almost at once.
quotes.translation: "3. 我们对当下的体验，因我们对过去感知的记忆而丰富。在某些系统中，情况正好相反：居民对未来有觉知，就像我们对过去有觉知一样。另一方面，他们对过去的'记忆'几乎立刻消退。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 711
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: I said that there were different kinds of knowledge; so will these exercises bring you in contact with knowledge in another way. Done over a period of time, they will open up alternate modes of perception, so that you can view your experience from more than one standpoint. This means that your experience will itself change in quality. Sometimes when you are awake, and it is convenient, imagine that your present experience of the moment is a dream, and is highly symbolic. Then try to interpret it as such.
quotes.translation: 我说过知识有不同的种类；这些练习将以另一种方式让你接触知识。经过一段时间练习，它们会开启交替的感知模式，使你能够从多个角度审视自己的经验。这意味着你的经验本身在性质上会发生变化。有时当你清醒且方便时，想象你此刻当下的经验是一场梦，且高度象征性。然后试着像解梦那样去诠释它。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The fact is, that even in your own universe all of your camouflage forms are not perceived by any one species, your own included. At best your scientists will only discover more of these camouflage patterns, but the entire system will simply not be perceived by any one species, and you will never perceive camouflage patterns outside of your own patterns. You are simply blocked in the pursuit of knowledge beyond a certain point as long as your scientists persist in the lines of their present development.
quotes.translation: 事实是，即使在你们自己的宇宙中，所有伪装形态也并非被任何单一物种（包括你们人类）所感知。科学家们最多只能发现更多这些伪装模式，但整个系统根本不会被任何单一物种完全感知，而你们永远无法感知自身模式之外的伪装模式。只要你们的科学家坚持目前的发展路线，你们在追求知识的过程中就会被阻挡在某个临界点之外。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The ego can perceive only certain portions of any given moment point or present instant, and it sees the moment point indeed as if it were one of a series of lights that approaches the ego from one side, and passes him by on the other side. The ego perceives this moment point, then, very much as if it were a flat cardboard-like object which comes, is flashed before him, and disappears.
quotes.translation: 自我只能感知任何特定时间点或当下瞬间的特定部分，它看待时间点的方式，确实就像看待一系列从一侧接近自我、又从另一侧经过自我的灯光。自我感知这个时间点的方式，非常像看待一个扁平的纸板状物体——它出现、在自我面前闪过、然后消失。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: You will not find yourself by running from teacher to teacher, from book to book. You will not meet yourself through following any particular specialized method of meditation. Only by looking quietly within the self that you know can your own reality be experienced, with those connections that exist between the present or immediate self and the inner identity that is multidimensional.
quotes.translation: 你不会通过从一个老师跑到另一个老师、从一本书跑到另一本书来找到自己。你不会通过遵循任何特定的冥想方法来遇见自己。只有通过安静地审视你所认识的自我内部，你才能体验到自己的实相，以及存在于当下或直接自我与多维内在身份之间的那些联系。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: （Seth also told John that the data given on Searle Drug, its financial and personal entanglements, plus John 's own promising prospects if he remained with the firm through its present crises, still applied. Some of this information goes back well over a year. It is scattered through the following sessions that John has witnessed: 37, 54, 63, 70, 95, 135, 166, in Volumes I through 3.）
quotes.translation: （赛斯还告诉约翰，关于希尔药厂的数据——其财务与人事纠葛，以及约翰若在当下危机中留在公司所能拥有的光明前景——仍然有效。这些信息有些可追溯到一年多以前。它们分散在约翰见证的以下课程中：第一卷至第三卷的第37、54、63、70、95、135、166节。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Some of this is extremely complicated. You may for example request before sleep that you project into your own future, to see what occurs there. This is legitimate enough, if you are willing to accept the results of your projections. For what you see will influence what you do in the present. You will be projecting of course into the probable future as it exists for you at this point.
quotes.translation: 其中一些内容极其复杂。例如，你可以在睡前请求投射到自己的未来，去看看那里会发生什么。只要你愿意接受投射的结果，这完全合理。因为你所看到的将影响你在当下所做的选择。当然，你投射的是此刻对你而言存在的可能性未来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: There will also be suggestions given as to needed adjustments on the part of the personality during his business hours. In other words, there are small but important adjustments that can be made within the framework of his present working life. Also perhaps an adjustment here on the woman's part that will aid him.
quotes.translation: 也会针对他在工作时间的人格所需调整提出建议。换言之，在他当前工作生活的框架内，可以做出一些微小但重要的调整。或许女性一方也需要做出调整来帮助他。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I believe that you are far enough along so that you could work with an observer present, providing the observer was someone with whom you felt comfortable. This is as you wish. That is, it makes no difference to me. If Ruburt becomes uncomfortable, then of course you would not have a good session. Since I make no effort to control Ruburt in any way, I have no idea how he would react.
quotes.translation: 我相信你们已经进展到足够程度，可以在有观察者在场的情况下工作，只要这位观察者是你感到自在的人。这完全取决于你的意愿。也就是说，对我来说并无区别。如果鲁柏感到不适，自然就不会有好的课。由于我从不以任何方式控制鲁柏，我无法预知他会如何反应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I will continue for a moment in this state, to tell you about yet another method, the one that is used in Ruburt's projections from a session. In this case I keep his physical system going while training him to describe what he has seen in his projections. This present state is challenging to Ruburt, for he can feel the interplay between us in a way not possible in the other states.
quotes.translation: 我将在此状态中继续片刻，告诉你们另一种方法——即鲁柏在课中投射时所用的方法。在这种情况下，我维持他的物质系统运作，同时训练他描述在投射中所见。当前这种状态对鲁柏颇具挑战性，因为他能感受到我们之间的互动，这是其他状态无法实现的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: What you call suggestion, to return to our present subject matter, is but a projection into the physical universe of data that operates constantly, as a basis for, and within, action. It is basically a psychic manifestation that gives direction to action, and to the various manifestations which action may take.
quotes.translation: 回到我们当前的主题，你们所谓的暗示，不过是持续运作的数据向物质宇宙的投射，作为行动的基础并存在于行动之中。它本质上是一种心灵显化，为行动及行动可能采取的各种显化形式指引方向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: Space travel, in your terms, will develop in a seemingly extravagant and startling fashion, only to be dumped as such when your scientists discover that space as you know it is a distortion, and that journeying from one so-called galaxy to another is done by divesting the physical body from camouflage. The vehicle of so-called space travel is mental and psychic mobility, in terms of psychic transformation of energy, enabling spontaneous and instantaneous mobility through the spacious present.
quotes.translation: 用你们的话来说，太空旅行将以看似铺张惊人的方式发展，最终却会被抛弃——当你们的科学家发现你们所认知的太空是一种扭曲，而从一个所谓星系到另一个星系的旅行，是通过剥离物质身体的伪装来实现的。所谓太空旅行的载具是心灵与精神的流动性，以能量的心灵转化为基础，实现通过广袤当下的自发即时移动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now I am giving all of this material here because it will help you understand and use your present abilities. You are asking too much of normal waking consciousness, smoothing out the valleys and peaks of its activity, demanding in some cases that it go full blast ahead when it is actually at a minimal period, denying yourself the great mobility of consciousness that is possible.
quotes.translation: 现在我提供所有这些资料，是因为它们将帮助你们理解并运用当前的能力。你们对正常清醒意识要求过多，试图抹平其活动的低谷与高峰，在某些情况下要求它在实际处于最低潮时全速运转，从而剥夺了意识本可拥有的巨大流动性。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Association or no, physically you will remember events in time, with present moments neatly following past ones. The psyche deals largely with associative processes, however, as it organizes events through association. Time as such has little meaning in that framework. Associations are tied together, so to speak, by emotional experience. In a large manner, the emotions defy time.
quotes.translation: 无论是否有关联，在肉体上你会按时间顺序记住事件，当下时刻整齐地紧随过去之后。然而，心灵主要处理联想性过程，通过联想来组织事件。时间本身在那个架构中几乎没有意义。可以说，联想是由情感体验联结在一起的。从广义上讲，情感超越了时间。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Time does not have certain characteristics when you view it as past, or when you view it as future, or when you view it as present. Any seeming difference between the past and the future is simply due to your own perception. Much of the material that I have given you concerning the nature of physical matter will be helpful when considered in connection with this material on time.
quotes.translation: 当你把时间视为过去、未来或当下时，它并不具有某些特定特性。过去与未来之间的任何表面差异，仅仅源于你自身的感知。我之前给你的关于物质本质的许多资料，若与这份关于时间的资料联系起来考虑，将会很有帮助。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Using this third form, there would be a tendency for you not to recognize your own physical situation. It would be difficult to carry the memories of the present ego personality with you. This third form is the vehicle of the inner self. The disorientation that it feels is the disorientation, you see, that it will feel when the physical body is deserted, or at the point of death.
quotes.translation: 使用这第三种形式时，你可能会倾向于无法认出自己的肉体状况。带着当下自我人格的记忆会很困难。这第三种形式是内在自我的载具。它所感受到的迷失方向，你看，正是当肉体被舍弃时，或在死亡之际，它将会感受到的那种迷失方向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The next brief chapter will be devoted to methods that will allow you to take advantage of greater options, to bring into your daily experience events and experiences that have so far remained "latent." In each individual case the options will be different, of course, yet you can draw into your present life some knowledge and intimate connection with your own probable realities.
quotes.translation: 下一章将简短地致力于一些方法，让你能够利用更大的可能性，将迄今仍"潜伏"的事件和体验带入你的日常经验中。当然，在每个人的个案中，可能性会有所不同，然而你可以将一些关于你自身可能实相的知识和亲密联系，带入你当下的生活中。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The disability of the present mother is a result of that personality's own problems, and Ruburt does not have to fear such a circumstance in his own condition. However a relaxed attitude is extremely important to counteract other tendencies. His fear of relaxation is actually rather simply based and superficial, in that it does not have its source in a past life but in this one.
quotes.translation: 当前这位母亲的残疾，是那个人格自身问题的结果，而鲁柏不必担心自己的状况会出现类似情况。然而，放松的态度对于抵消其他倾向极为重要。他对放松的恐惧实际上相当简单且肤浅，因为它并非源于过去世，而是源于这一世。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Full and uninhibited use of even the outer senses would lead you to inner reality. Usually only a strong and disciplined self, a well-structured identity, can perceive in this manner, and then only occasionally. Full operation of inner and outer senses, you see, in your present stage of development as a race, would be blinding, as you can see in your reading of drug experiences.
quotes.translation: 即使是外在感官的充分且无拘束的运用，也会引导你进入内在实相。通常只有强大而自律的自我、结构良好的身份，才能以这种方式感知，而且只是偶尔为之。你看，在你们种族目前的发展阶段，内在与外在感官的全面运作会是令人目眩的，正如你们在阅读药物体验时所能看到的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Before you see the whole form you may try to mentally communicate with it however, asking it questions. This is one approach. You may for example end up using this as the main method of communication between your present and your past one. Otherwise will your consciousness as mentioned earlier into the image, then ask yourself: Who am I? Where was I born? What memories are mine?
quotes.translation: 在你看到完整形相之前，你可以试着在心灵上与它沟通，向它提问。这是一种方法。举例来说，你最终可能会将此作为你当前自我与过去自我之间的主要沟通方式。否则，如先前所述，你的意识会进入影像中，然后问自己：我是谁？我出生在哪里？哪些记忆是属于我的？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: We have to some extent touched upon the various ways by which this process is carried out. The process is carried out so quickly as to seem simultaneous on your plane, but the pause and resulting pulsation is always present. This mental enclosure is arbitrary, necessary again, a device used by the self. It would seem to limit the extension of consciousness, and yet it does not.
quotes.translation: 我们已在某种程度上触及了这个过程得以进行的各种方式。这个过程进行得如此迅速，以至于在你的层面上看似是同时发生的，但停顿及由此产生的脉动始终存在。这种心灵上的围限是任意的，也是必要的，是自我使用的一种装置。它看似限制了意识的扩展，但实际上并没有。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There are then, obviously, probable futures and probable presents. I am trying to discuss this in your terms, since basically, you must understand, the words "past," "present," and "future" are no more meaningful as far as true experience is concerned than are the words "ego," "conscious," or "unconscious."
quotes.translation: 因此，显然存在着可能的未来和可能的当下。我试图用你们的术语来讨论这一点，因为从根本上说，你们必须明白，就真实体验而言，"过去"、"现在"和"未来"这些词与"自我"、"意识"或"潜意识"这些词一样，都没有什么意义。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The knees, incidentally, I can help him here: in Saint Vincent's punishment took the form of having the child kneel straight upward, and doing so Ruburt's knees often became sore. The knee symptoms were a later development in this present series of symptoms, his way of punishing himself for his previous lack of understanding. This knowledge should greatly relieve the symptoms.
quotes.translation: 顺便提一下，膝盖的问题，我可以在这里帮助他：在圣文森特，惩罚的形式是让孩子笔直地跪着，这样做使得鲁柏的膝盖经常酸痛。在当前这一系列症状中，膝盖症状是后来才出现的，这是他对自己先前缺乏理解的一种自我惩罚方式。这个认知应该能大大缓解这些症状。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: If cause and effect were an absolute law, then continuity would also have to be an absolute law, and all or any evidences of clairvoyance, or viewing the future, would be absolutely impossible, even in your universe, and this simply is not so. It is only because there is basically no cause and effect, but merely apparent cause and effect, and no past, present and future, that clairvoyance is possible in your universe.
quotes.translation: 如果因果是绝对法则，那么连续性也必须是绝对法则，而所有或任何千里眼或预见未来的证据，即使在你们的宇宙中，也绝对不可能存在，但事实并非如此。正是因为基本上没有因果，只有表面上的因果，也没有过去、现在和未来，千里眼才可能在你们的宇宙中存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Neither of you have a need for children in your present personalities. You are almost finished with incarnations on the earth, so much so that the physical bodies will return completely and unfragmented upon your physical death. This is always the case in the final earth life. The physical property is left behind, no portion of it being carried on that plane through children.
quotes.translation: 你们两人在当前的个性中都不需要孩子。你们几乎完成了地球上的转世，以至于在你们肉体死亡时，身体将完全且完整地回归。这在最后的地球生命中总是如此。物质属性被留在身后，没有任何一部分通过孩子延续到那个层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is even difficult for me to answer that, since you are partly on the track and partly way off. The emotional aspect of course would be the personality- essence. However it also has a structure that is very simple, but to you would appear complicated to the extreme. This is because of your present habit of thinking in word patterns rather than energy transferral complexes.
quotes.translation: 我甚至很难回答这个问题，因为你部分正确，部分偏离。情感层面当然是人格-本质。然而它也有一个非常简单的结构，但在你看来却极其复杂。这是因为你目前习惯于以文字模式而非能量传递复合体来思考。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The situation here can be eased, and it is within the ability of the present personality to do so. There is an inner generosity and a psychic, if you will forgive the word, sensitivity, that will be of great benefit to the personality. There is also, and I believe always has been, the desire on the part of the personality to untie or dissolve this knot of immobilized energy.
quotes.translation: 这里的情况可以缓解，而且目前的人格有能力做到这一点。有一种内在的慷慨和心灵上的敏感——请原谅我用这个词——将对人格大有裨益。此外，我相信一直存在的是，人格方面有解开或化解这个凝固能量结的愿望。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You may see an automobile for example with your eyes, and hear its sound through your ears, but it is also within the human capacity, ideally speaking, to hear the sight of the car, and to see the sound of the car. Practically speaking these capacities have been overlooked in human development simply because the ego hit upon the present method of perception, and clung to it.
quotes.translation: 例如，你可以用眼睛看到一辆汽车，用耳朵听到它的声音，但从理想角度来说，人类也有能力听到汽车的视觉形象，看到汽车的声音。实际上，这些能力在人类发展中被忽视了，仅仅因为自我采用了当前的感知方式并固守不放。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: During his life within the physical system attractions with it are of course maintained. At physical death this connection is severed. Polarities are changed in reverse fashion. The individual identity, composed of its electrically and magnetically coded experiences, is therefore intact. I say intact, for to all purposes this is so. When the polarities are changed however in reverse fashion, the present ego follows its attraction to the subconscious, and the two are more or less united.
quotes.translation: 在物质系统内的生命期间，与它的吸引力当然得以维持。在物质死亡时，这种连接被切断。极性以相反的方式改变。由电性和磁性编码经验组成的个体身份因此完好无损。我说完好无损，因为从各方面来看确实如此。然而当极性以相反方式改变时，当前的自我会跟随其吸引力进入潜意识，两者或多或少地合一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now: This is difficult to explain, and for our present purposes it is not entirely necessary that you understand the reasons for this pulsing; but even physically, you are "not here" as often as you are. Your emotional intensity and focus create forms beside your physical body, however their duration and degree are dependent upon the intensity of any given emotional origin.
quotes.translation: 现在：这很难解释，就我们当前的目的而言，你并不完全需要理解这种脉动的原因；但即使在物质层面，你"不在这里"的时间也和你"在这里"的时间一样多。你的情感强度和专注会在你的物质身体旁边创造形态，然而它们的持续时间和程度取决于任何特定情感起源的强度。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Your help, Joseph, has been most beneficial to him, and it is difficult naturally for him to manage this sort of data; but if he could not manage it he would not have received it, since we are developing an integration here. And I have protected him from a vulnerability to experiences that would be, or that would present, a danger to the overall balance of the personality.
quotes.translation: 约瑟夫，你的帮助对他最为有益，他自然很难处理这类数据；但如果他无法处理，他就不会接收到它，因为我们正在这里发展一种整合。我保护他免受那些会对人格整体平衡构成危险的体验的影响。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The present medical profession is sadly hampered because of its own beliefs. Often it operates as a framework in which poor health and disease are not only accepted as normal, but the concepts behind them strengthened. Here you have again, as in psychoanalysis, a hide-and-seek arrangement in which both doctor and patient take part. (See the 616th session in Chapter Two.)
quotes.translation: 可悲的是，当前的医学界因其自身信念而受到阻碍。它常常运作于一个框架中，不仅将健康不佳和疾病视为常态，还强化了其背后的概念。这里你再次看到，如同精神分析学一样，一种医生和患者都参与其中的捉迷藏式安排。（参见第二章第616节。）
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: There are several points I would like to make concerning psychological identity. For the sake of analogy only now, imagine your present self at the center of a circle of endless spirals. You are yourself, and yet one of the spirals that form the circle. You are a vortex for the circle. You do not have to contact it nor its other spirals, in that you already belong to it.
quotes.translation: 关于心理身份，我想提出几点。仅以类比而言，现在想象你当下的自我处于无尽螺旋圆环的中心。你既是自己，又是构成圆环的螺旋之一。你是这个圆环的涡旋中心。你无需接触它或它的其他螺旋，因为你本就属于它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: A portion is always connected to the whole of which it is part. From the torn section, then, to me the whole was present, the entire page; and from portions of the whole, the whole can be read or understood. And with enough freedom on the one hand, and training on the other, Ruburt, speaking for me, could give you the entire copy of The New York Times from a torn corner.
quotes.translation: 部分始终与它所从属的整体相连。因此，从撕裂的碎片中，我看到了完整的整体——整页纸张；从整体的碎片中，可以解读或理解整体。只要一方面有足够的自由，另一方面有足够的训练，鲁柏以我之名，就能从一张撕碎的角落为你呈现整份《纽约时报》。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json
