quotes.text: In some ways you see, your dream world is actually much closer to the direct experience of reality than is your waking world, where the operation of the inner senses is shielded so from your own awareness. This is not to say that the dream world is more important to you in your present situation, merely that it contains more truth about the source of your own existence.
quotes.translation: 从某些方面看，你的梦境世界实际上比清醒世界更接近现实的直接体验——在清醒世界中，内在感官的运作被屏蔽于你的觉知之外。这并非说梦境世界在你当前处境中更重要，只是它蕴含更多关于你自身存在源头的真相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Cellular memory can be changed at any point. Present beliefs can insert into the past new memory, both psychologically and physically. The future is in no way predetermined on basic levels. This does not mean that the future cannot be predicted sometimes, for in practical terms you will often continue with certain lines of probability which can be seen "ahead of time."
quotes.translation: 细胞记忆可在任何时刻被改变。当下的信念能将新记忆植入过去，无论是心理层面还是生理层面。未来在基本层面上绝非预先注定。这并不意味着未来有时无法预测，因为在实际层面上，你常会延续某些可被"提前"看见的概率路线。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: There is however an inner communication, and the knowledge of one is available to any -- not after physical death, but now in your present moment. Now the soul itself, as mentioned earlier, is not static. It grows and develops even through the experience of those personalities that compose it, and it is, to put it as simply as possible, more than the sum of its parts.
quotes.translation: 然而存在一种内在沟通，任何个体都能获得其中任一者的知识——并非在肉体死亡之后，而是在你当下的此刻。如前所述，灵魂本身并非静止。它甚至通过构成它的那些人格的体验而成长发展，简而言之，它大于其各部分的总和。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Within this context, subsidiary groupings will be included that involve the therapist's own ideas. In your society regression is often involved; the patient will remember and relive a traumatic experience from the past. This will then appear to be the cause of the present difficulty. If hypnotist and subject both accept this, then at that level there will be progress.
quotes.translation: 在此脉络下，将包含涉及治疗师自身想法的附属分组。在你们的社会中，回溯常被涉及；患者会忆起并重新经历过去的创伤经验。这看起来似乎是当前困境的成因。若催眠师与受试者都接受此观点，那么在该层面将会有进展。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: I have been speaking of your present system only, yet there is always progression to other systems. The growth of each(underlined) seed requires a separate act of creation. There is no mass creative act, for all portions of consciousness have their part to play in creativity. This is the meaning of action, of consciousness, and of individuality: the freedom to create.
quotes.translation: 我一直在谈论你们当前的系统，但始终存在向其他系统的演进。每颗种子的成长都需要独立的创造行为。没有大规模的集体创造行为，因为所有意识部分都在创造力中扮演着各自的角色。这就是行动、意识与个体性的意义：创造的自由。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Any such physical clues can help you differentiate between this state of consciousness and the usual predominating one. You have only to recognize it, learn to hold it, and then proceed to experiment in its use. As a rule, it is still physically oriented, in that the abilities are usually directed toward the inner perception and manipulation of matter or physical environment. You can therefore perceive the present moment from a variety of unique standpoints not usually available.
quotes.translation: 任何此类物理线索都能帮助你区分这种意识状态与通常的主导意识状态。你只需识别它，学习保持它，然后着手实验其运用。通常而言，它仍以物质为导向，因为其能力通常指向对物质或物理环境的内在感知与操控。因此，你能从通常无法获得的多种独特视角来感知当下时刻。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Seth's material largely opposes science's mechanistic model of the body wearing down within certain age limits, abetted as that model is by the power of the beliefs that say it will. He had much to say about how the out-of-place stresses we impose upon ourselves through our fearful projections into the future adversely affect our body consciousnesses, which are focused in the present. Telepathy, "molecular mentality," and cellular consciousness are deeply involved in all of this.
quotes.translation: 赛斯资料在很大程度上反对科学界关于身体会在特定年龄范围内磨损的机械论模型——该模型因相信它会发生而获得信念力量的支持。他详细论述了我们通过恐惧投射到未来而强加于自身的错位压力，如何对聚焦于当下的身体意识产生不利影响。心电感应、"分子心智"与细胞意识都深深涉入其中。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Before we close I want to mention the importance of the third inner sense with the experience of concept patterns. The third inner sense, involving what you would call perception of past, present and future, is the sense that enables the inner ego and entities to experience direct concept-patterns, and free them therefore from successive cause and effect limitations.
quotes.translation: 在结束之前，我想提及第三内在感官在体验概念模式时的重要性。第三内在感官涉及你们所谓的对过去、现在与未来的感知，它使内在自我与存有能够直接体验概念模式，从而使其摆脱连续因果关系的限制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: And here you see an example of my sly nature, for Ruburt （louder） will present my material for me. Regardless of its source, the material speaks loud and clear. It is largely disregarded, the sort of personality which is required in this endeavor. It simply happens that because of past relationships I know Ruburt well, and Ruburt knows me far better than he imagines.
quotes.translation: 在此你可见我狡黠本性的一例，因为鲁柏（提高音量）将呈现我的资料。无论其来源为何，这些资料都清晰响亮地表达着。它很大程度上被忽视，而这项努力所需的人格特质正是如此。只因过去的关系，我深知鲁柏，而鲁柏对我的了解远比他想象的更深。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I am speaking to you both individually and for the book here: Any point in your present is a potential point of great creative change, but because of the rhythms spoken of, it is easier for changes to occur in certain cycles.
quotes.translation: 我在此对你们两位以及这本书说话：你们当下的任何一点都是巨大创造性改变的潜在点，但由于所提及的节奏，某些周期更容易发生改变。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Again, by looking where nothing seems to be, you will find much. And by exploring that which you cannot touch, you will discover that which is even closer to you than touch, for the outer sense of touch is one of the most close counterparts of direct experience that you have. And it contains dimensions and gradations and varieties that cannot be recorded by scientific instruments, and this comes near in its own way to the infinite varieties present within one electrical action.
quotes.translation: 再说一次，通过观察看似空无之处，你们会发现许多。通过探索你们无法触及之物，你们会发现比触觉更贴近你们的东西，因为外在的触觉是你们拥有的最接近直接体验的对应物之一。它包含科学仪器无法记录的维度、层次和变化，并以自己的方式接近单一电性作用中存在的无限多样性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You understand the concept of the spacious present. It appears to you of course that this room and everything within it is more or less in constant existence, between the limitations of its creation or manufacture, and death or material decay. Within the time structure of your perception, this chair for example has been in constant existence since you purchased it.
quotes.translation: 你们理解"广袤的当下"这个概念。当然，在你们看来，这个房间及其中的一切，在其创造或制造与死亡或物质衰败的界限之间，或多或少是持续存在的。在你们感知的时间结构内，例如这把椅子，自你们购买以来就一直持续存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: They exist now, however, as certainly as do, say, the dinosaurs. You only choose to focus your attention upon a highly specific field of space-time coordinates, accepting these as present reality, and closing yourselves off from all others. Specifically, complicated physical forms are not the result of previous simpler ones. They all exist in larger terms at once.
quotes.translation: 然而，它们现在存在的确定性，正如恐龙一样。你们只是选择将注意力聚焦在一个高度特定的时空坐标场上，接受这些为当下实相，并把自己与所有其他可能性隔绝开来。具体来说，复杂的物理形态并非先前简单形态的结果。从更大的角度来看，它们同时存在。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Such predictions can affect the probabilities, of course, and reinforce a present line of belief. Physicians often wonder whether they should tell terminal patients of their impending deaths. There is great controversy. In some cases such a prediction can make death a fact -- while its opposite can regenerate the patient's belief in his or her own ability to live.
quotes.translation: 当然，这类预测会影响可能性，并强化当下的信念体系。医生们常常困惑是否应该告诉绝症患者他们即将死亡。这存在巨大争议。在某些情况下，这样的预测可能使死亡成为事实——而其反面则能重燃患者对自己生存能力的信念。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Your own science has led you to its logical conclusion. It is not enough, and some suspect that its methods and attitudes have a built-in disadvantage. Physicists are going beyond themselves, so to speak, where even their own instruments cannot follow and where all rules do not apply. Even the prophet Einstein did not lead them far enough. You cannot stand apart from a reality and do any more than present diagrams of it. You will not understand its living heart or its nature.
quotes.translation: 你们自己的科学已将其引向逻辑结论。这还不够，有些人怀疑其方法和态度存在内在缺陷。可以说，物理学家正在超越自身，甚至到了他们自己的仪器无法跟随、所有规则都不适用的地步。即使是先知爱因斯坦，也未能引导他们走得更远。你们无法脱离实相，只能呈现它的图表。你们将无法理解它活生生的核心或本质。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 702
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: You are paying in advance for illness that you are certain will come your way. You are making all preparations in the present for a future of illness. You are betting upon disease and not health. This is the worst kind of natural hypnosis, and yet within your system insurance is indeed a necessity, because the belief in illness so pervades your mental atmosphere.
quotes.translation: 你正在为确信会降临的疾病预先付出代价。你在当下为未来的疾病做好一切准备。你赌的是疾病而非健康。这是最糟糕的自然催眠，但在你们的体系内，保险确实是必需品，因为对疾病的信念如此弥漫于你们的精神氛围中。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You can travel anywhere within your solar system however with it. In the first form it is possible to perceive the past, present and future on a limited basis. In the second form this perception is on a larger scale, the scope of consciousness being further opened. Now this is the form that you will use if you meet appointments with others within the dream state.
quotes.translation: 然而你可以借助它游历太阳系内的任何地方。在第一种形态中，你可以在有限基础上感知过去、现在和未来。在第二种形态中，这种感知范围更广，意识领域进一步敞开。如果你在梦境状态中与他人有约，就会使用这种形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: There are traces in your present experience of your probable selves, even as there are signs in each individual of all the great talents shown and developed so flamboyantly by a few. These traces can be brought into your experience to enrich it. They do so in any case on unconscious levels, where they form the basis from which you choose your current experience.
quotes.translation: 你们当下的经验中留有可能性自我的痕迹，正如每个人身上都存在着少数人如此绚烂展现并发展的所有伟大天赋的迹象。这些痕迹可以被带入你的经验中使其丰富。它们在无意识层面始终如此运作，构成你选择当前经验的基础。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: (Still quietly:) It is true that you create your own dreams, but it is also true that you only focus upon certain portions of your dream creations. Even in the dream state, any present expands into its own version of past and future; so in those terms the dream possesses its own background, its own kind (underlined) of historic past, the moment you construct it.
quotes.translation: （依然轻声说：）你确实创造自己的梦境，但你也确实只聚焦于梦境创造的某些部分。即使在梦境状态中，任何当下都会扩展成它自己的过去与未来版本；因此从这些角度而言，当你构建梦境的瞬间，它就拥有了自己的背景、自己那种（划线强调）历史性的过去。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 722
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Such an exercise is not some theoretical, esoteric, impractical method, but a very precise, volatile, and dynamic way of helping the present self by calming the fears of a past self. That past self is not hypothetical, either, but still exists, capable of being reached and of changing its reactions. You do not need a time machine to alter the past or the future.
quotes.translation: 这样的练习并非某种理论性、深奥、不切实际的方法，而是通过安抚过去自我的恐惧来帮助当下自我的非常精准、活跃且动态的方式。那个过去的自我也并非假设性的，它依然存在，可以被触及并改变其反应。你不需要时光机来改变过去或未来。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (First, after holding session 805 we took a six-week break from sessions of any kind. We didn't plan to do this; it just developed, and we eventually realized that it did so through Jane's simple need for a change in routine. We had plenty of other things to do: I was still occupied daily with writing notes and appendixes for Volume 2 of "Unknown" Reality; on June 4 Jane received the page proofs for Cézanne, and began correcting them for the printer; on the 14th of the month "our" contractor began converting half of our garage into a writing room for Jane, and adding a large back porch [see the end of Note 2 for Session 801]. All of that building activity was much noisier and more disruptive than the work had been for the front porch, and forced some changes in our schedules, including more night work, as we manipulated around those distractions.
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: (Slowly at 4:44.) Give us a moment ... When I am "present," this also places Ruburt within a different kind of framework in relation to himself, in which most negativity simply takes no hold. It is as if you set up a small healing station, or platform and from that vantage point the body is then able to use its healing abilities far more effectively than usual.
quotes.translation: （4:44缓慢地）给我们一点时间……当我"临在"时，这也将鲁柏置于与自身相关的不同框架中，在此框架内大多数负面性根本无法附着。这就像你设立了一个小型疗愈站或平台，从这个有利位置，身体便能比平时更有效地运用其疗愈能力。
quotes.book: The Way Toward Health
quotes.source_file: 10-10-10-10The Way Toward Health - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Your question about transmigration (in Session 903 in Dreams) was an excellent one, and did indeed make the matter clear. It is a temptation at times to use more specific scientific terms, but these would be as confusing as the various definitions and classifications (with humor) that you read in the dictionary, so overall we try to hit a "happy medium." (With more humor.)

quotes.text: The atoms that compose the fetus have their own kind of consciousness. The volatile awareness-consciousnesses that exist independently of matter, form matter according to their ability and degree. The fetus, therefore, has its own consciousness, the simple component consciousness made up of the atoms that compose it. This exists before any reincarnating personality enters it. The consciousness of matter is present in any matter -- a fetus, a rock, a blade of grass, a nail.
quotes.translation: 构成胎儿的原子拥有其自身的意识。独立于物质而存在的变动觉知-意识，按其能力与程度形成物质。因此胎儿拥有其自身的意识，即由构成它的原子所组成的简单成分意识。这存在于任何转世人格进入之前。物质的意识存在于任何物质之中——胎儿、岩石、草叶、钉子。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The moment it occurs, it begins to change as it is filtered through all of those other ingredients, and it is minutely altered furthermore by each succeeding event. The memory of an event, then, is shaped as much by the present as it is by the past. Association triggers memories, of course, and organizes memory events. It also helps color and form such events.
quotes.translation: 事件发生的瞬间，它便开始改变，因为要经过所有其他成分的过滤，并且还会被后续的每个事件进一步细微地改变。因此，对事件的记忆既受过去塑造，也同样受当下塑造。联想自然会触发记忆并组织记忆事件，同时也帮助着色和形成这些事件。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (First, after holding session 805 we took a six-week break from sessions of any kind. We didn't plan to do this; it just developed, and we eventually realized that it did so through Jane's simple need for a change in routine. We had plenty of other things to do: I was still occupied daily with writing notes and appendixes for Volume 2 of "Unknown" Reality; on June 4 Jane received the page proofs for Cézanne, and began correcting them for the printer; on the 14th of the month "our" contractor began converting half of our garage into a writing room for Jane, and adding a large back porch [see the end of Note 2 for Session 801]. All of that building activity was much noisier and more disruptive than the work had been for the front porch, and forced some changes in our schedules, including more night work, as we manipulated around those distractions.
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: You are doing so now. Ruburt is doing so now. Your lack of success lately with psychological time has been to a large measure caused by too great a conscious concentration upon the task. An emotional acceptance, distasteful as this may seem to Ruburt, is the answer here, and again a sensual immersion in the spacious present and in nature will refresh you here.
quotes.translation: 你们此刻正在这样做。鲁柏此刻正在这样做。你们近来在心理时间方面的进展不佳，很大程度上是由于对任务有过于刻意的意识专注。情感上的接纳——尽管这对鲁柏来说可能令人反感——才是解决之道，再次强调，沉浸于广袤当下与自然界的感官体验将使你们在此获得更新。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: （See the 4lst session for Seth's first long dissertation on the spacious present. This was delivered April 6. The 44th session includes much on the basic laws of the inner universe also, as do the other sessions received during this period. As this material continues to expand it becomes more difficult to pinpoint references on a subject to a given few pages.）
quotes.translation: （参见第41节赛斯首次关于广袤当下的长篇论述，该节于4月6日进行。第44节也包含大量关于内在宇宙基本法则的内容，此期间的其他课程同样如此。随着这些资料持续扩展，要将某个主题的参考内容精确锁定在特定几页上变得越来越困难。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now if you wish, Quality-depth operates within the value climate of psychological reality, and gives truly amazing dimension to the spacious present, which is contained within the value climate of psychological reality.
quotes.translation: 现在，若你愿意，品质-深度在心理实相的价值气候中运作，为包含于心理实相价值气候中的广袤当下赋予真正惊人的维度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: (From the 82nd session for August 27, 1964:) When man realizes that he creates his own image now, he will not find it so startling to believe that he creates other images in other times. Only after such a basis [is established] will the idea of reincarnation achieve its natural validity, and only when it is understood that the subconscious, certain layers of it, is a link between the present personality and past ones, will the theory of reincarnation be accepted as fact.
quotes.translation: （摘自1964年8月27日第82节：）当人类认识到自己此刻正在创造自身形象时，就不会对相信自己在其他时间创造其他形象感到如此震惊。只有在此基础[建立]之后，转世的概念才能获得其自然的有效性；只有当人们理解潜意识——其特定层面——是当前人格与过去人格之间的纽带时，转世理论才会被接受为事实。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Since past, present, and future do not exist, this is a level of crystal clear communication of consciousness. Those involved have an excellent knowledge of their own backgrounds and histories, of course, but in this state possess also a much larger perspective, in which private and historical backgrounds are seen as a portion of a greater perceivable whole.
quotes.translation: 由于过去、现在与未来并不存在，这是一个意识水晶般清晰沟通的层面。参与者当然对自己背景与历史了如指掌，但在此状态中也拥有更广阔的视角，将个人与历史背景视为更大可感知整体的一部分。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This does not mean that it cannot be seen on occasion, but it cannot be perceived through use of the unaided physical senses. It is that indeed which contains the memories and experiences, in codified units, of the present individual. It is that part which survives physical death. It is that part which in physical life is intertwined with the physical image.
quotes.translation: 这并非意味着它无法被偶尔看见，但无法通过未受辅助的肉体感官来感知。它确实以编码单元的形式，包含着当前个体的记忆与经验。它是肉体死亡后幸存的部分。它是在肉体生命中与肉体形象交织的部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: He was indeed involved in scientific endeavors, both in Atlantis and in Egypt, but he had no desire to continue those pursuits in this present existence. He had gone quite beyond them. As his uncle, the father was also involved with him in two past lives in the same relationship, and as priests they were also interested in the inner workings of the universe.
quotes.translation: 他确实在亚特兰蒂斯和埃及都参与过科学事业，但在此生中他无意继续那些追求。他已远远超越了它们。作为他的叔父，父亲在两次前世中也以相同关系与他共事，作为祭司，他们同样对宇宙的内在运作感兴趣。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Your present is the result of your own poised consciousness, choosing its perception and the nature of its life from a field that is at all predictable only because of the greater area of organization available to it.
quotes.translation: 你的当下是你平衡的觉知的结果，它从一个可预测的场域中选择其感知与生命本质——这个场域之所以可预测，仅因它拥有更广阔的组织领域可供利用。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 684
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: All existence is present, as you know. What you term past incarnations take place in the present. You simply invented a continual time system as a vehicle of perception for the ego, and it operates at that level only.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，所有存在都是当下的。你所谓的过去转世发生在当下。你只是发明了一个连续的时间系统作为自我感知的载体，它仅在该层面运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Whether or not you realize it, you have pursued your present course with determination, using many resources, for ends or reasons that at one time made sense to you. You may say, "Poor health makes no sense to me," or, "A fractured relationship with my mate is hardly what I was after," or, "I certainly have not been pursuing poverty after all my hard work."
quotes.translation: 无论你是否意识到，你一直以决心运用诸多资源追求当前的道路，为了那些曾对你有意义的目的或理由。你可能会说："糟糕的健康对我毫无意义"，或"与伴侣破裂的关系并非我所追求"，或"我辛苦工作后当然不是在追求贫穷"。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You visit with travelers from other systems. You plant thought forms in other systems, and you tend them. You hold congregation with the many segments of your own reality. Your world is like a thought form in my experience. Your physical system exists in many intensities, and can be perceived. Probable selves can be viewed by myself and others like me, for we see your reality in all of its dimensions, and you view it from the small present forms that you know. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 你拜访来自其他系统的旅者。你在其他系统中栽种思想形态，并照料它们。你与自己实相的众多片段举行集会。你的世界在我体验中就像一个思想形态。你们的物质系统存在于许多强度中，并且可以被感知。可能的自己可以被我和像我这样的存在所看见，因为我们看到你们实相的所有维度，而你们则从你们所知的微小当下形态中观看它。（停顿。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Walter Zeh was your wife's sister. I have decided to tell you this. Walter Zeh was tubercular, and also as a woman extremely fleshy, as indeed your wife was. When Walter met Ruburt's mother they also disliked each other instantly in this life, since they quarreled over the same man, and you were that man. You wanted the sister that you did not get. In other words you wanted Ruburt's present mother.
quotes.translation: 沃尔特·泽是你妻子的妹妹。我决定告诉你这件事。沃尔特·泽患有肺结核，而且作为一个女人，她极其丰满，正如你妻子一样。当沃尔特遇到鲁柏的母亲时，她们在这一生中也立即彼此厌恶，因为她们为同一个男人争吵，而那个男人就是你。你想要的是你没有得到的那个妹妹。换句话说，你想要的是鲁柏现在的母亲。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It is also the reason for many of his problems in the past, and to a much lesser degree in the present. His mother, representing authority to him as a child, was frightening, threatening, sometimes cruel, and capricious. The child took literally the mothers statements that though a cripple, she could walk at night, would turn on the gas jets, and so forth.
quotes.translation: 这也是他过去许多问题的原因，在现在则程度小得多。他的母亲在他童年时代表着权威，是可怕、威胁、有时残忍且反复无常的。孩子当真相信了母亲的话，说她虽然是个跛子，却能在夜里行走，会打开煤气喷嘴等等。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: His present desire for expression will certainly not change. It is therefore the fear of expression that must be erased. Nor can this erasure occur without the realization by this personality that he can indeed trust himself. For both the fear and the anxiety is based simply upon a resulting distrust of his ability to handle eloquence or verbal expression.
quotes.translation: 他现在表达的欲望当然不会改变。因此，必须消除的是对表达的恐惧。而这种消除不可能发生，除非这个人格意识到他确实可以信任自己。因为恐惧和焦虑都仅仅基于他对自己处理口才或言语表达能力的怀疑。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Your present personalities need sexual fulfillment, but the main energy of your life is in other directions. This is why you did not marry young, Joseph, and why Ruburt first chose a man in whom he was not sexually interested. Your deep attraction in this life has strong sexual connotations that must and will be satisfied, but it goes beyond this. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 你们现在的人格需要性满足，但你们生命的主要能量在其他方向。这就是为什么你没有早婚，约瑟，也是为什么鲁柏最初选择了一个他在性方面不感兴趣的男人。你们在这一生中的深层吸引有强烈的性含义，这些必须且将会得到满足，但它超越了这一点。（停顿。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: So, using the psychological bridge at such times, Ruburt can have a session. I have made what I think clear and specific. Now: Work he does with impressions is an entirely different thing. He is not pulling in the same kind of energy. It is not a matter of a session taking something out of Ruburt. It is a matter of tuning into the kind of energy that he does in our sessions, and simply because of present circumstances and development, three times a week is sufficient.
quotes.translation: 所以，在这样的时刻使用心理桥梁，鲁柏可以进行一节课。我已经把我认为清楚和具体的内容说清楚了。现在：他对印象所做的工作完全是另一回事。他并没有拉入同一种能量。这不是一节课从鲁柏身上拿走什么的问题。而是调频到我们在课中所使用的那种能量的问题，而仅仅因为现在的情况和发展，每周三次就足够了。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now I mean this literally. Reality is on the one hand the product of perception. On the other hand that which is, is always present as the basis for any perception. That which is perceives itself, you see. The unitary self is basically an illusions and yet individuality is no illusion.
quotes.translation: 我这句话是字面意思。实相一方面是感知的产物，另一方面，"存在本身"始终作为任何感知的基础而存在。存在本身感知自身，你明白吗？单一自体本质上是个幻相，但个体性绝非幻相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Let us begin with the normal waking consciousness that you know. But one step away from this is another level of consciousness into which you all slip without knowing. We will call it "A-l." It is adjacent to your normal consciousness, separated from it very slightly; and yet in it very definite effects can appear that are not present in your usual state.
quotes.translation: 让我们从你所知的正常清醒意识开始。但离此仅一步之遥，便是另一种意识层次，你们所有人都会不知不觉滑入其中。我们称之为"A-1层"。它紧邻你的正常意识，与之仅有细微差别；然而在其中，某些明确的效果可能出现，这些效果在你平常状态中并不存在。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The state into which Ruburt fell as a rule allows no such focus in either reality, but a suspension. It is necessary only as a transition. I will again suggest that for the present psychological time experiments be carried on once a day. There is no reason to give further time to it, in the evening, at this time. This is aimed at Ruburt. We want contrast.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏通常陷入的状态，不允许在任一实相中聚焦，而是一种悬浮状态。它仅作为过渡所需。我再次建议，目前心理时间实验每天进行一次。现阶段晚间无需再投入更多时间。这是针对鲁柏的。我们需要对比。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I will want to continue along the present lines of our session discussions but you are ready, or Ruburt is, so that any information on reincarnation should come through very well now. It is simply a matter of getting to it, to the subject that is. Any questions concerning your own individual lives or historical information, we will do our best to deliver.
quotes.translation: 我希望继续沿着目前课程讨论的路线进行，但你们——或者说鲁柏——已经准备好了，所以任何关于转世的信息现在都应该能顺利传达。这不过是着手处理这个主题的问题。任何关于你们个人生活或历史信息的问题，我们都会尽力解答。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: As you know yourselves, you only accept those suggestions, ideas and hang-ups that suit your purposes at this time. You are not, therefore, at the mercy of any neurosis from a past life, nor are there any fears from your present lives that you cannot conquer. I have not said that you will necessarily conquer them, but it is within your ability to do so.
quotes.translation: 正如你们自己所知，你们只接受那些符合当前目的的建议、想法和执念。因此，你们既不受制于任何前世的神经症，也无法被今生任何无法克服的恐惧所左右。我并未说你们必定能克服它们，但你们确实具备这种能力。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Like the mountain, therefore, you have a history in terms of the present that is yours, and yet not yours. It does not control you, for you alter it with each thought and action, even as each motion at the mountain's top affects its base. The layers at the bottom, however, are also constantly changing, so that the whole area is a gestalt of relatedness.
quotes.translation: 因此，如同山岳一般，你们拥有一个属于你们、却又非你们所有的"当下"历史。它并不控制你们，因为你们用每个念头和行动改变它，正如山顶的每个动作都会影响山基。然而，底层的岩层也在不断变化，使得整个区域成为一个关联性的完形。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 727
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: （At this time also, while trying to visualize a method of diagramming the spacious present, I saw an animated graph consisting of long black jointed sticks thrusting up from a common base, at various angles. Then I saw the angled pieces eventually lay themselves down upon the base line so that I couldn't tell one from another, or beginning from the end.
quotes.translation: 就在此时，当我试图想象一种图解"广袤当下"的方法时，我看到一幅动态图表：许多黑色长节棍从共同基座以不同角度向上刺出。随后这些倾斜的棍节最终平躺于基线之上，令我无法分辨彼此，亦分不清起点与终点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I will try to put this as simply as possible. There are presently invisible layers within the body, the topmost layer that you see representing, of course, the present physical form. But enmeshed within this there are what amount to invisible layers, "shadow," latent layers that represent previous physical images that have belonged to the personality.
quotes.translation: 我将尽可能简明地阐述。身体内部存在当前不可见的层次，你们所见的最表层自然代表当下的物质形态。但在此之中交织着相当于隐形层、"阴影"层、潜在层的存在，它们代表着曾属于该人格的过往物质形象。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There is also here connected only with his present personality an ego image of the writer with a cigarette. In this case the cigarette represents independence and even individuality, and even female emancipation. So it is all bound up together in a rather mazelike web. I hope that when Ruburt understands this it will make the situation easier for him.
quotes.translation: 此处还关联着作家当前人格的自我形象——手持香烟的意象。在此情境中，香烟象征着独立乃至个性，甚至女性解放。这一切都交织在迷宫般的网络之中。希望当鲁柏理解这点后，能让他更从容面对现状。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I see this composite image myself. It is not registered by Ruburt's eyes (pause), which do not have the multidimensional depth perception necessary. I see the composite image clearly, whether or not I am looking through Ruburt's eyes. I use his eyes because they narrow down the focus for me, to the one "present" self of which the individual is aware.
quotes.translation: 我自身能看见这个复合意象。鲁柏的眼睛（停顿）无法记录它，因其缺乏必要的多维深度感知。无论是否透过鲁柏的眼睛观察，我都能清晰看见这个复合意象。我使用他的眼睛，是因为这能为我收窄焦点，聚焦于个体所觉察的那个"当下"自我。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In some instances this happens despite the personality's attempt to hide the weight of the past. Also on many occasions the personality escapes the problems entirely. What happens here is that the subconscious communicates with the entity through the inner senses, to the effect that the present personality is not strong enough to handle the problem.
quotes.translation: 某些情况下，即便人格试图隐藏过往的重量，这种现象仍会发生。同时，许多时候人格会完全逃避问题。此时发生的是：潜意识通过内在感官与存有沟通，传达出当前人格尚不足以处理该问题的讯息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is true that as a rule you are not aware of your whole entity, which as a rule does not reside within your boundaries. But there is no reason why you must be blind to the whole self of your present personality, which is part of your entity, and which can be glimpsed on your plane in terms of the breathing and dreaming self of which I have spoken.
quotes.translation: 诚然，你们通常无法觉察完整的存有——它通常并不栖居于你们的界限之内。但你们没有理由必须对当前人格的完整自我视而不见，这个自我正是存有的一部分，且能通过我提及的呼吸与做梦之自我，在你们的层面上被瞥见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is of course because of your highly distorted ideas of time that you persist in projecting antiquated concepts of past, present and future outward into explorations of your universe. While the quasars appear to be filled with more energy than man can conceive of, still the quasars that are now perceived are but shadows of the reality behind them.
quotes.translation: 当然，正是由于你们对时间高度扭曲的观念，才导致你们持续将过去、现在与未来的陈旧概念投射到对宇宙的探索中。虽然类星体看似蕴含着人类无法想象的巨大能量，但此刻被观测到的类星体，不过是其背后实相投射出的幻影。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Now I come from a long way to speak. You do not have to come a like distance to listen. When through Ruburt's open eyes I observe you, I observe more than the person that you realize that you are, for it is difficult for me to pinpoint you in your time. In your terms therefore, I see both your present and future selves, though probabilities operate.
quotes.translation: 此刻我跨越漫长时空前来言说，你们无需跋涉同等距离来聆听。当透过鲁柏睁开的双眼注视你们时，我看见的远不止你们自认所是的那个存在——因为要将你定位在你们的时间框架中实属不易。用你们的话来说，尽管概率运作不息，我仍能同时看见你此刻与未来的自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: ("Also with a past war connection." This is not as definite, but we think it applies to Bill Gallagher more than Don and me. All three of us have had military service, Bill and me in World War Two on active duty. Bill is quite a historian on the subject of war, and often discusses it. We believe the subject is almost always mentioned when we are together. The connection with the envelope objects being that Bill was of course present last Friday, October 7,1966.
quotes.translation: （"还与某场过往战争有关联。"这点尚不明确，但我们认为对比尔·加拉格尔的适用性高于唐与我。我们三人都曾服役，比尔与我在二战期间担任现役。比尔堪称战争史专家，常就此展开讨论。我们相聚时几乎总会提及这个话题。与信封物件的关联在于：比尔自然出席了1966年10月7日上周五的测试。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: This is one of the reasons why breathing seems automatic, and why dreaming seems to confound your physical camouflage idea of time. It is perfectly within your present capabilities to understand that time, to your dreaming self, is very much like time to your waking inner self. But you must first disconnect the physical concept of time and watches.
quotes.translation: 这正是呼吸看似自动运行、梦境似乎混淆你们对时间物质化认知的原因之一。你们完全有能力理解：对做梦的自我而言，时间体验与清醒内在自我对时间的感知极为相似。但你们必须先破除钟表与时间的物质概念。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Ruburt is still rather nervous in our tests; even with his good friends present, oh he is so frightened! However we are making headway in this respect, and he will learn with experience. He is hardheaded. In many ways this is to our benefit. In the overall we will want more specific information. It must come in a more clear manner, and so it shall.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏在我们的测试中仍显紧张；即便有挚友在场，噢，他竟如此惊惧！不过我们在这方面已取得进展，他将通过经验学会应对。他生性固执，这在许多方面对我们有利。总体而言，我们需要更具体的信息，这些信息必须以更清晰的方式呈现，而它终将如此显现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （Tracing of the photographic negative used in the 7th envelope test, in Session 187, September 13,1965.）

quotes.text: I wish you then a hearty good evening, and to your friend, our present beloved young wom an, Ruburt's Pat Norelli, my best wishes for a beginning now, of vitality and joy, as you throw aside all conditions, and accept your life for what it is and will (underlined) be--a joy, an exaltation to yourself, and a help to all those you will still contact.
quotes.translation: 谨此向诸位致以诚挚的晚安祝福，并向你们的朋友——我们此刻挚爱的年轻女子，鲁柏的帕特·诺雷利——致以最美好的祝愿：愿你们此刻开始，抛却所有条件束缚，接纳生命本然与必将成为的样貌——那将是喜悦，是自我的升华，更是对你们仍将接触之人的助益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The energy generated by some such experiences is enough to change a life in a matter of moments, and to affect the understanding and behavior of others. These are intrusions of knowledge from one dimension of activity to another. They are highly charged and volatile. Unknowingly, the individual who receives such information is himself a part of it. The entire feeling-tone of his present personality is changed -- and directly -- by the information he receives.
quotes.translation: 某些此类体验所产生的能量，足以在瞬间改变一个人的生命，并影响他人的理解与行为。这些是从一个活动维度向另一个活动维度的知识侵入。它们高度带电且不稳定。不知不觉中，接收此类信息的个体本身已成为它的一部分。他当前人格的整个感受基调——直接地——被他所接收的信息所改变。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: n the 82nd session, which was held on the evening of August 27, 1964, Seth said: "When man realizes that he, himself, creates his personal and universal environment in concrete terms, then he can begin to create a private and universal environment much superior to the [present] one, that is the result of haphazard and unenlightened constructions.
quotes.translation: 在1964年8月27日晚举行的第82节课上，赛斯说："当人类认识到自己具体地创造了个人及宇宙环境时，他才能开始创造远优于[当前]环境的私人及宇宙环境，而当前环境正是偶然与未启蒙建构的结果。"
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: 7. In Session 692 for Volume 1 of "Unknown" Reality see the material on Sue's double dreams in the opening notes and in Note 2. Personally, at least, I see strong connections between the idea of double dreams and the kind of conscious reincarnational memory -- or knowledge -- detailed by Sue in this appendix.

quotes.text: "Four: I will realize that the future is a probability. In terms of ordinary experience, nothing exists there yet. It is virgin territory, planted by my feelings and thoughts in the present. Therefore I will plant accomplishments and successes, and I will do this by remembering that nothing can exist in the future that I do not want to be there."
quotes.translation: "第四：我将认识到未来是一种可能性。就普通经验而言，那里尚不存在任何事物。它是处女地，由我当下的感受与思想所播种。因此我将播种成就与成功，我将通过记住这一点来做到：未来不可能存在任何我不希望它存在的事物。"
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I am deliberately being deliberate. And for the present I am using Ruburt's voice, making no effort to superimpose my own. And for good reason. I do not want this material to be considered any sort of mumbo jumbo. It is not a cult in the terms that people often consider material that seems to come from a source beyond the individual who gives it.
quotes.translation: 我刻意保持审慎。目前我正使用鲁柏的声音，并不试图叠加我自己的声音。这有其充分理由。我不希望这份材料被视为某种胡言乱语。它并非人们通常认为的那种来自超越传递者个体之源的邪教材料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You find difficulty in escaping from time, as a rule, and therefore you are also imprisoned by past, present and future, in such a way that they appear to be walls which never can be climbed. Not only is it difficult for you to conceive of a large concept for these reasons, but also it is well nigh impossible to communicate such a concept to you.
quotes.translation: 通常你很难逃离时间，因此你也被过去、现在与未来所囚禁，以至于它们看似永远无法攀越的高墙。不仅由于这些原因你难以构想一个宏大的概念，而且几乎不可能将这样的概念传达给你。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You have no fear of them. All of this is a progression, I will say for simplicity's sake. Now in such an environment, time as you know it does not exist. This is one of the reasons why some projections are so confusing, particularly when the ego is taken along for the ride. (Humorously.) It is used to past, present and future, kept nicely apart.
quotes.translation: 你并不畏惧它们。为简化起见，我将说这一切都是渐进过程。现在，在这样的环境中，你所认知的时间并不存在。这也是某些投射如此令人困惑的原因之一，尤其是当自我也随行其中时。（幽默地）它习惯了被妥善区隔的过去、现在与未来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: She said things at that time that wounded Miss Healy, and her message is that she regrets the words deeply, particularly now. (Pause.) I believe the incident occurred near the supper hour, and in a dining room or restaurant. A man, indirectly or directly, provoked the argument. Either the man was Blanche's father, or related to her rather than to Anne, regardless of the relationship. He may or may not have been present, but he was the cause of the argument.
quotes.translation: 她当时说了一些伤害希利小姐的话，她的讯息是，她深深后悔那些言语，尤其是现在。（停顿）我相信那件事发生在晚餐时间前后，地点在餐厅或餐馆。有个男人直接或间接引发了这场争执。那个男人要么是布兰奇的父亲，要么是与她而非安妮有亲戚关系，不论关系如何。他可能在场也可能不在场，但他是这场争执的起因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: There are strange benefits that can result. Some cases are on record where individuals are suddenly propelled out of the path of danger. This involves instantaneous projection. The fear and panic that could make the body vulnerable is not present, and the body escapes danger precisely because consciousness is not there to cause panic reactions.
quotes.translation: 可能产生奇特的好处。有些案例记载，个体突然被弹离危险路径。这涉及瞬间投射。使身体脆弱的恐惧和惊慌并不存在，身体之所以能逃脱危险，正是因为意识不在场，不会引发恐慌反应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: It is not so much a matter of Ruburt's vocabulary, incidentally, since even a specialized scientific one would only present these ideas in its own distorted fashion. It is more a problem of basic language itself, as you are acquainted with it. Words do not exist, for example, for some of the ideas I hope to convey. We will, at any rate, begin.
quotes.translation: 顺便说，这主要不是鲁柏词汇量的问题，因为即使专业的科学词汇也只能以扭曲的方式呈现这些观念。更根本的问题在于你们所熟悉的语言本身。例如，我希望传达的某些观念根本不存在对应的词汇。无论如何，我们开始吧。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 681
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: This of course involves considerations of race, and you must realize that your present race is the one into which you were born, in your terms, in this place and time. Each of you have been members of different races, and so each of you have shared in both the advantages and ignominies attached, in historic terms, to such conditions of birth.
quotes.translation: 这当然涉及种族考量，你们必须明白，你们当前的种族是你们在此时此地投生的种族。你们每个人都曾属于不同种族，因此都分享过历史上与这些出生条件相关的优势与耻辱。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now. Looking from your planet, outward as you think, at the quasars, your scientists believe that they look backward in space, in your terms. This is erroneous. It is true enough within the present framework of your knowledge, and the idea will work in the same wav that the cause and effect theory works, which is only up to a certain point.
quotes.translation: 现在。从你们星球向外观察类星体时，你们的科学家认为他们在空间上回溯过去——以你们的说法。这是错误的。在你们当前知识框架内这确实成立，这个观念就像因果理论一样有效，但只到某个程度为止。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: What is required of them both in their daily working lives is in many respects precisely the same. They are both excellent salesmen. They are both intimately familiar with the use of energy, in that they are able to use their own energy to affect the minds of other individuals. But their reactions are entirely different, and Philip's past life experiences prepared him for the nature of his present occupation, where he is dealing with medicinal matters.
quotes.translation: 他们日常工作中所需的能力在许多方面完全相同。两人都是出色的推销员。他们都深谙能量运用之道，能用自己的能量影响他人心智。但他们的反应截然不同，菲利普的前世经历为他当前从事医药相关职业的本质做好了准备。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: You are always receiving data from the inner senses. It is sifted through the subconscious, and when you receive it directly, or more or less directly for the first time, it can be frightening merely because of the unfamiliarity, and because of the unusual vividness. This is why I have said that the inner senses present their own evidence.
quotes.translation: 你始终在接收内在感官传来的资料。这些资料经由潜意识筛选，当你首次直接或近乎直接接收时，因其陌生感与异常鲜明的特质，可能令人惊惧。正因如此，我曾说过内在感官会呈现其自身的证据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now that you know something about the nature of matter, you will see that all matter is objectified mental action, and that basically such action happens simultaneously in the spacious present, formed by individualized energy through the formation of mental enclosures.
quotes.translation: 既然你已对物质本质有所了解，便会明白所有物质都是客体化的心智活动，而这类活动本质上在广袤当下同步发生——由个体化能量通过构建心智围场而形成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You perceive, however, but a very small portion of these images which you have yourselves created. You simply cannot bring them back into the limited perspectives of your own present field, and are left with but glimpses and flimsy glimmerings of images which are actually as actual, vivid, and more mobile than those in the physical field.
quotes.translation: 然而你仅能感知自身创造的意象中极小部分。你无法将这些意象带回当前场域的有限视角中，只能捕捉到些微残影与朦胧微光——这些意象实则比物理场域中的影像更真实、更鲜活、更具流动性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is only because your present existence is so highly focused in one narrow area that you put such stern limits upon your definitions and the self, and then project these upon your concepts of the soul. You worry for your physical identity and limit the extent of your perceptions for fear you cannot handle more and retain your selfhood.
quotes.translation: 正因你当前存在如此高度聚焦于狭窄领域，才会对定义与自我施加严苛限制，并将这些限制投射到灵魂概念上。你为物理身份忧心忡忡，限制感知范围，唯恐无法承载更多而丧失自我本质。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: At later times with your present rate of development the distortions themselves will be held to a minimum. And now Joseph you will see, I am sure, in which direction I am leading you. The more personal and the more direct the bearing of a question upon your daily life, the greater the distortion is likely to be. What more can you expect?
quotes.translation: 以你当前发展速率，未来阶段这些扭曲将降至最低。约瑟，我相信你已看出我正引领你走向何方。问题与日常生活的关联越个人化、越直接，扭曲程度往往越大。你还能期待什么呢？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I always delight, if you will forgive me, in astounding the present personalities of acquaintances by letting them know that I have known them before. It is a failing of mine but I enjoy it. And you, Philip, were twice a woman and once a Moor of some considerable stature, as well as the personality in Boston which I have already related.
quotes.translation: 请恕我直言，我始终乐于让相识者当下的个性惊愕——通过让他们知晓我早已认识他们。这是我的小癖好，但我乐在其中。菲利普，你曾两次为女性，一次为颇具地位的摩尔人，此外还有我提过的波士顿人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is very close to the entity. Largely due to its abilities are the creative processes used, but hardly understood by the ego. In many cases this supraselfis already, so to speak, moving into completely new systems. It is, of course, aware of your reincarnations on the individual's part, but these are not present nor future to the self.
quotes.translation: 它非常接近本体。很大程度上，正是由于它的能力，创造过程才得以运用，但自我几乎无法理解。在许多情况下，这个超我可以说已经进入了全新的系统。当然，它知道个体层面的转世，但这些转世对自我而言既非现在也非未来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It is true that what will occur, in your terms, has already occurred in other terms, and that it is possible to perceive beyond your now into your so-called future. But here I am very careful of tampering, for tampering with "your" present tampers with "your" future. I suggest that in the last sentence you place the word your in quotes.
quotes.translation: 确实，用你们的说法将会发生的事，用其他说法已经发生了，并且有可能超越你们的"当下"感知到所谓的未来。但我在这里非常谨慎地避免干预，因为干预"你们的"现在就会干预"你们的"未来。我建议在最后一句中把"你们的"这个词加上引号。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Which you? Which world? These questions are to be answered in the "now," as you understand it, through the realization that your power of action is in the present and not in the past. Your only effective point of changing any aspect of your world lies in that miraculous instant connection of spirit and self through neurological impact.
quotes.translation: 哪一个你？哪一个世界？这些问题要在"当下"中回答，正如你所理解的，通过认识到你的行动力量在于现在而非过去。你改变世界任何面向的唯一有效点，就在于那个通过神经冲击实现的精神与自我奇迹般的瞬间连接。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: There are times when expectation suddenly shifts. It has been in the process of changing, but it suddenly shows the change as it suddenly becomes obvious through physical construction. When it finally manages to change constructions, bringing them into line with present alterations, the individual realizes that something has happened.
quotes.translation: 有时期待会突然转变。它一直在改变的过程中，但突然通过物质建构显现出变化，变得显而易见。当它最终成功改变建构，使其与当前的改变保持一致时，个体就会意识到某些事情发生了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The realities, of course, exist whether or not you perceive them. Actually "time," in quotes, exists as the pulses leap the nerve ends. It is not a simultaneous procedure. You must then experience lapses. Past, present and future appear highly convincing and logical when there must be a lapse of time between each perceived experience.
quotes.translation: 当然，无论你是否感知到，实相都存在。实际上，"时间"（加引号）存在于脉冲跃过神经末梢的过程中。这不是一个同时发生的过程。你必然要经历间隙。当每个被感知的经验之间必须存在时间间隙时，过去、现在和未来就显得极具说服力和逻辑性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: I will let you take your break, out of the goodness of my heart, and also so that I might have the benefit of your brilliant conversation between any material. I regret, and deeply, that we must still deal with concepts in terms of words strung out one before the other, for this method serves to reinforce your idea of continuity, cause and effect, past and present, and all such camouflages that I am completely determined to put into proper place.
quotes.translation: 出于我的好心，我会让你休息一下，同时也让我能受益于你在任何资料之间精彩的对话。我深感遗憾，我们仍然必须用前后排列的词语来讨论概念，因为这种方法会强化你们对连续性、因果、过去和现在的观念，以及所有我决心要正确定位的伪装。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The next chapter will deal with your physical reality as it appears to me and others like me. This chapter will contain some rather fascinating points, for not only do you form the physical reality that you know, but you are also forming other quite valid environments in other realities by your present thoughts, desires and emotions.
quotes.translation: 下一章将讨论你们所知的物质实相，以及它在我和像我这样的存有眼中的样貌。本章将包含一些相当引人入胜的观点，因为你们不仅构建了所知的物质实相，还通过当下的思想、欲望和情感，在其他实相中构建了同样有效的环境。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Here is a copy of that outline, which was given to us in Session 510, January 19, 1970. As you'll see here, Seth calls me Ruburt, and Rob, Joseph. These names represent our entire personalities as distinguished from our present physically oriented selves.

quotes.text: Action can never be considered apart from that which is seemingly acted upon, for action becomes a part of structure. Action begins from within, and is a result of inner vitality inherent within all realities. Some action is always present. Action itself is not a thing alone. It is not an identity. Action is a dimension of existence.
quotes.translation: 行动绝不能与看似被作用的对象分开考虑，因为行动会成为结构的一部分。行动始于内在，是所有实相内在活力的结果。某种行动始终存在。行动本身并非孤立之物，它不是一个身份。行动是存在的一个维度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In many situations, the main personifications are instead of a ritual nature, taking advantage of psychological patterns already present in the culture's art or religion or science. You end up with Christs, spacemen, various saints or spirits, or other personality fabrications whose characteristics and abilities are already known.
quotes.translation: 在许多情况下，主要的人格化表现具有仪式性质，利用了文化、艺术、宗教或科学中已存在的心理模式。最终你们得到基督、太空人、各种圣灵或神灵，以及其他已知其特质与能力的人格虚构。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Your intense specialized focus within a highly limited present shields these other activities from you. You are bound by an entire spectrum of events, some that have already grown dim in your memory, and others that have not yet occurred in your time. You also affect these same events, shaping and altering them, and then reacting.
quotes.translation: 你们在高度受限的当下中进行的强烈专注聚焦，遮蔽了这些其他活动。你们被整个事件光谱所束缚，有些已在记忆中褪色，有些尚未在你们的时间中发生。你们也影响着这些相同的事件，塑造并改变它们，然后做出反应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The truth as far as it can be stated is this: YOU FORM YOUR REALITY NOW, in capital letters, through the intersection of soul in flesh, and in your terms the present is your point of power.
quotes.translation: 尽可能陈述的真相是：你们在当下构建实相——大写字母强调——通过灵魂与肉身的交汇，以你们的说法，当下就是你们的力量点。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

related_concepts.name_en: The point of power is in the present

quotes.text: Three-dimensional experience is an invaluable place of training. Your personality as you now know it will indeed persevere, and with its memories, but it is only a part of your entire identity, even as your childhood in this life is an extremely important part of your present personality, though now you are far more than a child.
quotes.translation: 三维体验是无价的训练场。你们目前所知的人格确实会持续存在，并带着它的记忆，但它只是你们整体身份的一部分，正如这一生的童年是你们当下人格极为重要的一部分，尽管你们现在远不止是一个孩子。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is as if you were reading a history book that was devoted only to the failures, cruelties and errors of the race, ignoring all of its accomplishments. Such practices can lead you to use your own "history" so that it gives a very distorted picture of who and what you are -- a picture that then paints your present circumstances.
quotes.translation: 这就像你在读一本只关注人类失败、残酷和错误的历史书，却忽略了所有成就。这种做法会让你利用自己的"历史"，从而对自己是谁、是什么产生严重扭曲的画面——这幅画面进而渲染了你当下的处境。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The window of each day can be opened or closed, but it is framed by your current psychological experience. Even when it is shut light shines through it, illuminating your daily life. In miniature form each day contains, in its own way, clues to all of your own simultaneous existences. The present self does not exist in isolation.
quotes.translation: 每一天的窗户可以打开或关闭，但它由你当前的心理体验所框定。即使窗户关上，光线仍会透进来，照亮你的日常生活。每一天都以自己的方式，以缩影形式包含着你所有同时存在状态的线索。当下的自我并非孤立存在。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: I spoke in a recent session concerning the connection between distance and emotions. The true reality of distance as you know it is dependent upon the intensity of emotion, and has nothing to do with your idea of space. The emotion which is intense is felt at its peak as present in time, and immediately here in terms of distance.
quotes.translation: 在最近的一次课中，我谈到了距离与情感之间的联系。你所知的距离的真实实相取决于情感的强度，与你的空间概念毫无关系。强烈的情感在其巅峰时被感知为时间上的当下，在距离上则被感知为即刻在此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （Tracing of the photographic negative used in the 7th envelope test, in Session 187, September 13,1965.）

quotes.text: Natural therapy, therefore, is difficult to achieve to its fullest benefit in your society, because it is constantly interfered with from the time of your birth. Yet it operates regardless of interference, and is always at your command to give health and vitality to the living sculpture in which you have your present experience.
quotes.translation: 因此，自然疗法在你的社会中很难达到最大效益，因为从你出生之时起它就不断受到干扰。然而，无论干扰如何，它始终在运作，并随时听候你的调遣，为你当下体验所寄居的活雕塑赋予健康与活力。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: As your present situation with all of its challenges, joys and problems is contained in condensed form within each of your days, so the same applies to your life. Each night's dreams then provide you with a rich bed of creativity. Spread out before you in great profusion, you will find not only any problems but their solutions.
quotes.translation: 正如你当下的处境——带着所有挑战、喜悦和问题——以浓缩形式包含在每一天中，同样的情况也适用于你的一生。于是，每晚的梦境为你提供了丰饶的创造力沃土。在你面前大量铺展开来，你不仅会发现所有问题，还会找到它们的解决方案。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The durability is achieved because of constant expansion in terms of value fulfillment. Your camouflage physical universe does, necessarily, lead you to suppose that time exists in terms of past, present and future, simply because the idea or energy constructed into physical reality therefore operates under physical properties.
quotes.translation: 这种持久性是通过价值完成的持续扩展而实现的。你的伪装物质宇宙必然导致你假设时间以过去、现在和未来的形式存在，仅仅因为被构建成物质实相的观念或能量因此必须在物质属性下运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: You have noticed, I am sure, that at times visitors to a session are of definite value, for the psychic energy is pooled, and can be of value. The emotional impetus, when it is present, is also of benefit. Now in the same manner you can use and collect such energy when you are in a group, as in your Saturday evening excursions.
quotes.translation: 我相信你已经注意到，有时来访者参与课程具有明确价值，因为心灵能量得以汇聚并产生效用。当情感驱动力存在时，同样能带来益处。现在同理，当你们处于群体中时——比如周六晚间的远足活动——也可以运用并收集这类能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Ruburt's own experience, in maintaining his own identity independently, while also allowing me to speak through him, will be to his benefit. It is, you see, quite possible for an individual in his dream travels to visit other planetary systems, of the past, present or future. Such visits are usually spontaneous and fragmentary.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏在保持独立自我意识的同时，允许我通过他发声的体验，将对他有所裨益。要知道，个体在梦境旅行中完全可能探访其他行星系统——无论是过去、现在还是未来的系统。这类探访通常自发且零散。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Now. While the inner self is aware of this connection, the present self has been fooling itself to some degree, for it did not accept the intuitional knowledge. Regardless of what you thought consciously therefore, you still inwardly blamed yourself for letting the child go, and therefore the difficulty with the womanly organs.
quotes.translation: 现在。虽然内在自我知晓这种关联，但当前自我在某种程度上一直自欺欺人，因为它拒绝接受直觉知识。因此无论你意识层面作何想法，内心深处仍在为让那个孩子离开而自责，这便导致了女性器官的失调。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

source_raw.title: (Continuation of Session 458, January 20, 1969, after break at 9:47. This material is not included in the records.

quotes.text: The daughter of the present personality, however, was once a sister. There were difficulties between the sisters. Now this relationship is one that irons out old difficulties. The youngest son was once the personality's father. Is it any wonder that the conscious mind does not retain in one life memory of its other existences?
quotes.translation: 然而，当前人格的女儿曾是某世的姐妹。这对姐妹之间存在嫌隙。如今这段关系正是为了化解旧日纠葛。最小的儿子则曾是人格的父亲。意识心无法在一生中保留其他存在的记忆，这又何足为奇呢？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This communication, while taking place in your time, and in your present, is nevertheless partially responsible in other dimensions for what you would call future developments in your own personalities, which you can now in turn contact. This is partially what I am, far more than you are, or that Seth is as you thought of him.
quotes.translation: 这种沟通虽发生在你们的时间与当下，却在其他维度中部分促成了你们人格所谓的未来发展——这些发展你们现在反而可以与之接触。这正是我之所以存在的部分原因，远胜于你们自身，也超越你们所认知的赛斯。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Paul also represented the militant nature of man, that had to be taken into consideration in line with man's development at the time. That militant quality in man will completely change its nature, and be dispensed with as you know it, when the next Christ personality emerges. It is therefore appropriate that Paul be present.
quotes.translation: 保罗还代表了人类的好战本性，这种特质必须结合当时人类的发展阶段来考量。当下一任基督人格降临时，人类的好战特质将彻底改变性质，并以你们所知的方式被摒弃。因此保罗的出现恰如其分。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now. If you will recall our early sessions dealing with value fulfillment, let us now consider what I prefer to call a moment point. This moment point, as you know, refers to any given present instant. If you are thinking in terms of Dunnes theories, then start out with this moment point as it is seen in time one by self one.
quotes.translation: 现在。如果你们还记得我们早期关于价值完成的课程，那么现在让我们来探讨我称之为"瞬间点"的概念。这个瞬间点，如你们所知，指的是任何一个给定的当下瞬间。如果你们以邓恩的理论来思考，那么就从自我一在时间一中看到的这个瞬间点开始。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: You set upon this adventure, the two of you. It is meaningless to say that the books are Ruburt's. Your ideas of "perfection" and love of detail, or if you prefer, your feeling for the significance of detail that appears exteriorized in your notes, is as present in the inner consistency of the material itself as given by me.
quotes.translation: 你们两人踏上了这场冒险。说这些书是鲁柏的毫无意义。你们对"完美"和细节之爱的观念，或者如果你们愿意，你们对你们笔记中外显细节重要性的感受，与我给出的材料本身的内在一致性一样，都存在于当下。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Now I'll refer the reader to Note 6 for Session 711, which is the session for which I'm assembling this chronology to begin with. In that note I presented some material on ancient connections with the name, Seth, then quoted Seth on the subject of names from the ESP class session for April 17, 1973. For instance:)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: At some inconceivable point all of the threads would be in turn traversed. Self A, now on thread A, would not be aware in his present, of the quote "future" selves on the other threads. Only by meeting one of these other selves however can he become aware of the nature of this strange structure through which he is traveling.
quotes.translation: 在某个不可思议的点上，所有的线索都会被依次穿越。在线索A上的自我A，在其当下不会意识到其他线索上所谓的"未来"自我。只有通过遇见这些其他自我中的某一个，他才能意识到他正在穿越的这个奇特结构的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It must be understood that the personality is indeed an action within action, and that it is therefore never stationary. Indeed suggestions, being the directions in which action moves, represent the very impetus that constantly changes the action of any given personality. It goes without saying, once more, that all of these designations imply a separation which does not exist in fact, and imply definite boundaries which are not present.
quotes.translation: 必须理解，人格确实是行动中的行动，因此它从来不是静止的。事实上，暗示作为行动移动的方向，代表了不断改变任何给定人格行动的推动力。再次不言而喻的是，所有这些指称都暗示了一种实际上并不存在的分离，并暗示了并不存在的明确界限。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: For one thing the self is usually thought of in terms of existence only within one particular time sequence pattern. Its experience however is rooted in the past, as you think of the past. Since there is actually only a spacious present this means that the self is rooted both in the past and in the future, using your terms.
quotes.translation: 首先，自我通常被认为只存在于一个特定的时间序列模式中。然而，它的经验却根植于过去，如你们所认为的过去。由于实际上只有一个广阔当下，这意味着用你们的术语来说，自我既根植于过去，也根植于未来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: A thought can be intense, then partially fade and grow intense again. (Pause.) Its own nature regulates its intensity, rather than any rules inherent in the nature of intensity itself. Some of these concepts are difficult to explain to you. In your terms it would be as if you experienced a future event, then a distant past event, then a moment from the present. You would not understand what was going on, nor see the inner logic within.
quotes.translation: 一个思想可以很强烈，然后部分消退，再变得强烈。（停顿。）它自身的性质调节着它的强度，而不是强度本身性质中固有的任何规则。这些概念中的一些很难向你们解释。用你们的术语来说，就好像你们经历了一个未来事件，然后是一个遥远的过去事件，然后是一个当下的瞬间。你们不会明白发生了什么，也看不到其中的内在逻辑。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: If it were scientifically inclined, the body would know that such spontaneous performance was impossible, for science cannot explain the reality of life itself in its present form, much less its origins. Consciousness within the body knows that its existence is within the body's context, and apart from it at the same time.
quotes.translation: 身体若具有科学倾向，便会知道这种自发的表现是不可能的，因为科学无法解释生命本身在当下形态中的实相，更不用说其起源了。身体内的意识知道自己的存在既在身体的脉络中，又同时独立于身体之外。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 705)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: And later, with much humor: "I am willing to have longer sessions for as long as you put up with me. I will work on one book one night and another one the next, if you prefer, or discuss private material or other questions of a general nature, or work twice a week on our present material--whatever suits your fine fancies."
quotes.translation: 后来，带着极大的幽默感说："只要你受得了我，我愿意延长课程时间。如果你愿意，我可以一晚写一本书，隔晚写另一本，或者讨论私人资料或其他一般性质的问题，也可以每周两次继续我们目前的资料——随你喜欢。"
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
