quotes.text: You may if you wish consider the Quality-depth principle as blowing like a wind through the spacious present, it indeed being like a wind in that it is known by its effects; and if you must think of it visually it would, perhaps, have a funnel shape. All of these concepts are most difficult to translate into word patterns.
quotes.translation: 你若愿意，可将品质深度原则视为吹拂过广阔当下的一阵风，它确实像风一样，因其效果而被知晓；若你非要用视觉想象它，它或许呈漏斗形状。所有这些概念都极难转化为文字模式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Time, as you know it, is a distortion brought about by the operation of the physical senses. Direct experience has no need of physical time. You exist now, period. The past, the present and the future as you know them are illusion, and yet they exist now. You can influence the past today; you can have memory of the future.
quotes.translation: 你所认知的时间，是物质感官运作所导致的扭曲。直接体验不需要物理时间。你存在于当下，句号。你所知的过去、现在和未来都是幻象，然而它们都存在于当下。你今天可以影响过去；你可以拥有未来的记忆。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: In quite real personal and racial terms, the past is still happening. You create it from your present according to your beliefs. A removed appendix will not reappear physically. There are certain frameworks that are accepted, built into your creaturehood. There is far greater freedom, however, even on the cellular level.
quotes.translation: 就非常真实的个人和种族层面而言，过去仍在发生。你根据信念从当下创造过去。已切除的阑尾不会在身体上重新出现。有些框架是被接受的，已融入你的生物性中。然而，即使在细胞层面，也存在着远为更大的自由。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: I can, it is true, focus exclusively upon the present individual. This merely involves a change of focus on my part, and a narrowing of focus and concentration. There is much more that can be said here, but we shall save it for another occasion. The matter was in your mind, and I am giving you a simple and direct answer.
quotes.translation: 诚然，我可以完全聚焦于当下的个体。这仅涉及我这边焦点的转换，以及焦点和注意力的收窄。这里还有很多可以说的，但我们留待下次再谈。这问题在你心中，我给你一个简单直接的答案。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: For in my present in your terms, I am also the personality who is not speaking this evening, the Seth who does not have those characteristics with which you are so familiar. It is unfortunate that I must use terms of time to explain this to you, but as I told you many sessions ago, my time is not your time. (Humorously.)
quotes.translation: 因为以你们的时间而言，在我的当下，我也是那个今晚没有发言的人格，那个不具备你们如此熟悉的特征的赛斯。很遗憾我必须用时间术语向你们解释这一点，但正如我许多节前告诉你们的，我的时间不是你们的时间。（幽默地。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Dreams in which past and present are both involved are an example; also dreams in which the future and the past merge, and dreams in which time seems to be a changing ingredient.
quotes.translation: 涉及过去和现在两者的梦境就是一个例子；还有未来与过去融合的梦境，以及时间似乎是一种变化成分的梦境。

source_raw.title: (First, after holding session 805 we took a six-week break from sessions of any kind. We didn't plan to do this; it just developed, and we eventually realized that it did so through Jane's simple need for a change in routine. We had plenty of other things to do: I was still occupied daily with writing notes and appendixes for Volume 2 of "Unknown" Reality; on June 4 Jane received the page proofs for Cézanne, and began correcting them for the printer; on the 14th of the month "our" contractor began converting half of our garage into a writing room for Jane, and adding a large back porch [see the end of Note 2 for Session 801]. All of that building activity was much noisier and more disruptive than the work had been for the front porch, and forced some changes in our schedules, including more night work, as we manipulated around those distractions.
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: To say I am energy is no lie. It is actually truer than many designations that would sound more authentic and complicated. I am a personality in essence-energy form. This in no way implies that I am a spirit, nor does it imply that I am some weird sort of granddaddy longlegs of science fiction. What I am is difficult to explain because of the limits set not only by your own knowledge but by the present method of our communications.
quotes.translation: 说我是能量并非谎言。实际上，这比许多听起来更真实、更复杂的称谓要真实得多。我是本质-能量形式的人格。这绝不意味着我是灵体，也不意味着我是某种科幻小说中怪异的“长腿爷爷”。由于不仅受你们自身知识所限，还受我们当前沟通方式的限制，我的本质很难解释。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Your idea of one soul, one self, forms a significance and a selectivity that blinds you to these other realities that are as much "here and now" as your present self. The units of consciousness that compose your physical being alone are aware of those greater significances, to which your limited ideas make you opaque.
quotes.translation: 你们对单一灵魂、单一自我的观念形成了一种意义和选择性，使你们对这些同样“此时此地”的实相视而不见，就像你们当下的自我一样。构成你们物质存在的意识单位本身就知道那些更重大的意义，而你们有限的想法使你们对其变得迟钝。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: It is as if your present situation and all its physical phenomena were projected from within yourself outward, giving you a continuous running motion picture, forcing you to perceive only those images that were being transposed. These seem so real that you find yourself in the position of reacting to them constantly.
quotes.translation: 仿佛你们当下的处境及其所有物质现象都是从你们内在向外投射出来的，给你们一部连续播放的电影，迫使你们只感知那些正在转译的图像。这些图像看起来如此真实，以至于你们发现自己处于不断对其做出反应的位置。

quotes.text: In other words I am telling you that your present beliefs, in a manner of speaking, are like the directions given to the entire personality, simultaneously organizing and reorganizing past experience according to your current concepts of reality.
quotes.translation: 换句话说，我是在告诉你们，你们当下的信念，从某种意义上说，就像是对整个人格下达的指令，根据你们当前对实相的概念，同时组织和重组过去的经验。

quotes.text: In each case, however, the point of power is the present, and from that moment you choose which you, and which world. The experience of a country is the cumulative result of the choice of each individual in it, so as you choose your own circumstances you affect each other person within your country and your world.
quotes.translation: 然而在每种情况下，力量之点都在当下，从那一刻起你选择哪一个自己，以及哪一个世界。一个国家的经验是其每个个体选择累积的结果，因此当你选择自己的境遇时，你也会影响国家及世界中的其他每个人。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

related_concepts.name_en: The point of power is in the present

quotes.text: Also I mentioned that the spacious present knows no beginning or end, and that energy, of which everything is composed, can never be withdrawn. Nor can individualized energy ever lose its individuality, nor in a very actual sense can anything which has ever existed go out of existence, but merely change its form.
quotes.translation: 我还提到过，广袤的当下无始无终，构成万物的能量永不消逝。个体化的能量也永远不会失去其独特性，从非常实际的意义上说，任何存在过的事物都不会消失，只是改变了形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The situations had changed but the ego framework had grown rigid, rigid enough so that it could in a large degree dominate certain normally subconscious processes, bringing forth the physical symptoms. Now there is always an imprinting process within the personality, belonging to past experience. A previous inclination to gluttony had once led him to some slight gout, and in the present case there was a swelling of the feet.
quotes.translation: 情境已经改变，但自我框架变得僵化，僵化到足以在很大程度上支配某些通常属于潜意识的过程，从而引发身体症状。现在，人格内部始终存在一个印记过程，属于过去的经验。他过去贪食的倾向曾导致轻微痛风，而在当前案例中，出现了脚部肿胀。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The psyche knows itself and is aware of its parts. When ego consciousness reached a certain point of biological and mental competence, when experience in the present became extensive enough, then ego consciousness would be at the stage where it could begin to accept greater data. Indeed, it is now at that stage.
quotes.translation: 心灵认识自身并知晓其各个部分。当自我意识达到一定的生物与心智能力水平，当当下的经验变得足够广泛时，自我意识就会进入能够开始接受更大数据的阶段。事实上，它现在正处于那个阶段。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: There was no communication between the four of you in the past, and no linkage of your lives. There has been however, a telepathic sort of communication between you in the present, and it is no coincidence that you became acquainted. On a subconscious level you realized that many of your interests were the same.
quotes.translation: 过去你们四人之间没有交流，也没有生命关联。然而，在当下你们之间存在一种心灵感应式的交流，你们相识绝非偶然。在潜意识层面，你们意识到许多兴趣是相同的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

As stated, two sets of witnesses had been present. A fifth person had also appeared, causing the end of the session after one set of witnesses had left. See page 326.
quotes.translation: （赛斯正要探讨预测与概率之间的关系时，由于前述干扰，课程提前结束。如前所述，当时有两组见证人在场。第五个人的出现导致其中一组见证人离开后课程终止。参见第326页。）

quotes.text: The source and the power of your present consciousness is not and has never been physical, and where I am many are not even aware that such a physical system exists. You have chosen your own illusion, and so you must accept it, and from its viewpoint must you try to understand the realities that exist beyond it.
quotes.translation: 你当前意识的源头与力量并非源自物质世界，也从未如此，而我所在的领域，许多人甚至不知存在这样的物质系统。你选择了自己的幻象，因此必须接受它，并从这个视角出发，尝试理解超越其外的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In one way you are the steps leading up to yourself, or the spirals leading in to yourself. The painting spirals outward from your inner reality, and it brings forth energy and previous connections and interpretations. You form these anew, however, adding to them the knowledge and vitality of your present self.
quotes.translation: 从某种角度而言，你是通往自身的阶梯，或是螺旋深入自我的路径。这幅画从你的内在实相向外螺旋延伸，带出过往的能量、关联与诠释。然而，你以当下自我的知识与活力，将这些元素重新塑造。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: When you let your attention waver, however, you may often fall into a state in which you momentarily perceive glimpses of another alternate present. The whole self, the soul, knows of its reality in all such systems, and you, as a part of it, are working toward the same state of self-awareness and development.
quotes.translation: 然而，当你让注意力游移时，常会陷入一种状态，短暂瞥见另一个交替的当下。整体自性（灵魂）知晓自身在所有这类系统中的实相，而你作为它的一部分，正朝着相同的自我觉知与发展状态迈进。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The body and mind together do present a united, self regulating, healing, self-clearing system. Within it each problem contains its own solution if it is honestly faced. Each symptom, mental or physical, is a clue to the resolution of the conflict behind it, and contains within it the seeds of its own healing.
quotes.translation: 身体与心灵共同呈现出一个统一、自我调节、自我疗愈、自我净化的系统。在这个系统中，每个问题若被诚实面对，都包含其自身的解决方案。每个症状（无论是心理还是生理的）都是背后冲突的线索，并蕴含自我疗愈的种子。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You do not have to wonder at the small physical symptoms which have bothered both of you lately. Before our sessions began your reactions were, as you might recall, much more vehement. The interaction between body and mind is always present. It is only when adverse symptoms arise that you pay it any attention.
quotes.translation: 你们无需为近期困扰双方的轻微身体症状感到困惑。在我们课程开始前，你们的反应（若你记得）要激烈得多。身体与心灵的互动始终存在，只有当不良症状出现时，你们才会注意到它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I could not have explained moment points to you, for example, until I had clearly given the idea of the spacious present. It is not as simple a thing as it might seem, for there is no coercion involved, Ruburt always consenting to let me push concepts at him, which he interprets speech-wise with my assistance.
quotes.translation: 例如，若非先清晰阐述“广袤当下”的概念，我无法向你解释“瞬间点”。这并非表面看来那么简单，因为其中没有强迫性，鲁柏始终同意让我将概念推向他，而他在我的协助下以言语形式诠释这些概念。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: You are only aware of any such changes when your present conscious attention is directed at any object or event. Objects or events known to you in your past still exert their pressures upon you even as your own effect still changes them. The same holds true for what you would term future objects or events.
quotes.translation: 只有当你有意识的当下注意力指向某个物体或事件时，你才会意识到这类变化。你过去所知的物体或事件仍对你施加着压力，正如你自己的影响仍在改变它们一样。这同样适用于你所谓的未来物体或事件。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Art of any kind is extremely important as a way of paying off debts, that is psychological debts. When you were a woman, Mark, and wealthy, you gave away money. Now like Joseph and Ruburt, you give away parts of yourself, fragments of yourself, made more or less into living psychological forms that according to your ability are free from not only time, but free from many of the defects of your own present personality.
quotes.translation: 任何形式的艺术都极为重要，它是偿还债务——即心理债务——的一种方式。马克，当你曾是女性且富有时，你施舍金钱。如今，像约瑟夫和鲁柏一样，你付出自己的部分，自己的碎片，将它们或多或少塑造成活生生的心理形态，这些形态根据你的能力，不仅不受时间束缚，也免于你当前人格的许多缺陷。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now. Those within the system know this. Regardless of what you may think of their present performance at any given "time" in quotes, it is from this system that the greatest potentials emerge; for having dealt with it, consciousness undergoes one of the severest tests in learning to handle its own energy.
quotes.translation: 现在。系统内的存在知晓这一点。无论你如何评价他们在任何特定“时间”（带引号）的当前表现，最伟大的潜能正是从这个系统中涌现的；因为意识在处理它时，经历了学习掌控自身能量过程中最严峻的考验之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The panic itself will not be as severe as Ruburt faces it and realizes the connection with a gulping of air. I know about the book on autohypnosis, and believe that this will be a big help to Ruburt along these lines, as it will enable him to bypass many of the ego's objections. This habit for various reasons then is deeply rooted, and seemed to be a harmless answer to a number of past and present needs and problems.
quotes.translation: 恐慌本身不会像鲁柏面对它并意识到与急促呼吸的关联时那样严重。我知道那本关于自我催眠的书，相信这会在这些方面对鲁柏大有帮助，因为它能让他绕过自我许多的抗拒。这个习惯因各种原因而根深蒂固，似乎是对过去和当下诸多需求与问题的一个无害解答。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: As far as distance, physical distance, is concerned, this whole idea is subconsciously taken into consideration. That which appears ahead of you in distance, and has not yet been experienced, under usual circumstances has not yet entered the psychic space of inner environment. When you reach this imaginary physical experience, and if you are emotionally involved in it, then it becomes the PRESENT, in capital letters.
quotes.translation: 就距离——物理距离——而言，整个概念在潜意识中已被纳入考量。在通常状况下，距离上出现在你前方、尚未被经历的事物，尚未进入内在环境的心灵空间。当你抵达这段想象中的物理体验，并情感投入其中时，它便成为大写字母的“当下”。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: These choices however are based upon your changing perceptions of past and present. Because I have a larger scope of perception than you, I can with much greater facility predict what may happen. But this is dependent upon my prediction as to which choice you will make, and the choice is still your own.
quotes.translation: 然而，这些选择基于你对过去与当下不断变化的感知。由于我的感知范围比你更广，我能更轻易地预测可能发生之事。但这取决于我对你将做出何种选择的预测，而选择本身仍是你自己的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: You did not consider it refined, in terms of process, enough. Neither did you find yourself at home however with the acrylics, that you felt were over refined, and too far away from basics. Your problem being your overall attitude toward the Emotion from which your art springs, for your attitude is then projected outward upon your mediums. To some extent the present dilemma was initiated by your parents' condition.
quotes.translation: 你曾认为它在过程上不够精致。然而你同样觉得丙烯颜料过于精致，离基础太远，让你感到不自在。你的问题在于你对艺术所源自的情感整体态度，因为你的态度随后会投射到你的媒介上。某种程度上，当前的困境是由你父母的情况引发的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: You are discovering for yourself that basically there is no past, present and future, through your own experiments with psychological time, and you will also experience directly other material sometime before I have given it to you.
quotes.translation: 通过你自己对心理时间的实验，你正在发现过去、现在和未来本质上并不存在，而且在我告诉你某些资料之前，你也会直接体验到其他材料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Each physical cell is in its way a miniature brain, with memory of all of its personal experiences and of its relationship with other cells, and with the body as a whole. In your terms this means that each cell operates with an innate picture of the body's entire history -- past, present, and future.
quotes.translation: 每个物理细胞在它自己的方式上都是一个微型大脑，拥有它所有个人经历的记忆，以及它与其他细胞和整个身体关系的记忆。用你们的话来说，这意味着每个细胞都带着身体整个历史——过去、现在和未来——的固有图像运作。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: As I have mentioned earlier the senses change according to the plane of materialization. If you are speaking about my present form, I can be many forms. That is, within limits I can change my form, but in doing so I do not actually change my form so much as I choose to become part of something else.
quotes.translation: 正如我之前提到的，感官会根据物质化的层面而变化。如果你在谈论我现在的形态，我可以有许多形态。也就是说，在限制范围内我可以改变我的形态，但这样做时，我实际上并非改变形态，而是选择成为其他东西的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now. The inner self and the subconscious are not present in the physical universe, insofar as they take up no space within it. They exist within the electrical system. They affect the physical system and operate closely allied with it. Nevertheless they will not be found within the physical system.
quotes.translation: 现在。内在自我和潜意识并不存在于物质宇宙中，因为它们在其中不占据任何空间。它们存在于电气系统内。它们影响物质系统，并与它紧密合作运作。然而，它们不会在物质系统内被发现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: One takes up space in your universe and the other does not. The universe expands in the manner that a dream expands, taking up no camouflage space. This does not mean that there is no growth involved in the expansion of the universe. This does not imply that there is no movement. It simply implies an existence and an expansion of a qualitative manner, beyond your present measurements or complete comprehension.
quotes.translation: 一个在你们的宇宙中占据空间，另一个则不。宇宙以梦扩展的方式扩展，不占据任何伪装空间。这并不意味着宇宙的扩展中没有成长。这也不意味着没有运动。它仅仅意味着一种定性的存在和扩展，超出了你们当前的测量或完全理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: We will only concern ourselves with a few, those of which I am at least partially familiar. These planes of actuality, of course, all operate within the spacious present, and with a value climate. While portions of them may protrude into physical actuality, they will do so with varying proportion.
quotes.translation: 我们只关注其中少数几个，那些我至少部分熟悉的。这些实相层面当然都在广袤现在内运作，并带有价值气候。虽然它们的一部分可能伸入物质实相，但会以不同的比例进行。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In your present daily life the same process continues. Most of these dreams are very disconnected from the ego, and will seldom be recalled. The self who pursues these divergent paths is actual however. These are legitimate projections. They represent systems of reality of which you are not aware.
quotes.translation: 在你们当前的日常生活中，同样的过程仍在继续。这些梦大多与自我非常脱节，很少会被记起。然而，追寻这些分歧路径的自己是真实的。这些是合法的投射。它们代表了你们尚未意识到的实相系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Historical knowledge and verifications of identity--identities--may be achieved through communication with those layers of the subconscious dealing with past lives. But no information may be gathered here that was unknown to the particular previous personality as a rule. Some particularly girted may use one of these levels as a focus point, looking outward even to the present personality, but this is unusual.
quotes.translation: 通过处理过去世潜意识的那些层面进行沟通，可以获得历史知识和身份验证。但一般来说，无法在此收集到特定前世人格未知的任何信息。一些特别有天赋的人可能将这些层面之一作为焦点，向外甚至看向当前人格，但这并不常见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Give us a moment ... Your father's inventiveness would also be used in the same manner, as source material, by whichever self you chose to become. There are many choices. I am using here three only to show you how those primary aspects of your personality operate now in your present condition ...
quotes.translation: 给我们一点时间……你父亲的创造力也会以同样的方式被用作素材，无论你选择成为哪个自己。有许多选择。我在这里只用了三个，来向你们展示你人格的那些主要面向如何在你们当前状况下运作……
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: n mentioning my "sportsman self," Seth referred to information he'd given about three of my probable selves in a private session on January 30, 1974 -- just a few days before starting "Unknown" Reality. The session contains many personal insights that I now recognize as being quite true. But even without Seth's help, interesting results can flow from an awareness of the probable-self concept: The reader can begin to intuitively consider his or her own probable selves, or those of others who may be closely related psychically or physically. I'm not writing here about rationalizing the existence of one or more probable selves to account for personal shortcomings in this reality, however, but of simply using the idea to enlarge our basic notions of the human potential. See Note I for Session 679.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: You may be born into your present family for many reasons. You may find after death a much stronger relationship emotionally with a personality from a past life. If you are married, for example, and have no true rapport with your mate, you may instead find a past wife or husband waiting for you.
quotes.translation: 你可能因许多原因出生在现在的家庭。死后你可能会发现与过去世的人格有更强烈的情感联系。例如，如果你已婚，但与伴侣没有真正的默契，你可能会发现一个前世的妻子或丈夫在等你。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now, both of you have particularly strongly-developed latent abilities as far as the inner senses are concerned. Otherwise these sessions would not be possible. It is true that at the present time your abilities vary in direction, yet they complement each other in action and therefore in result.
quotes.translation: 现在，就内在感官而言，你们两人都有特别强烈发展的潜在能力。否则这些课是不可能的。确实，目前你们的能力方向各异，但在行动中它们相互补充，因此结果也互补。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Give us a moment ... We have been using Ruburt and Joseph's private experience here. For now, however, I would like each reader to consider the members of his or her family, so that in a more direct fashion the reader can find in private experience a realization of some ideas I want to present.
quotes.translation: 请稍等片刻……我们一直在利用鲁柏和约瑟的私人经验。不过现在，我希望每位读者都能思考自己家人的情况，这样读者就能以更直接的方式，在私人经验中领悟我想呈现的一些理念。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 695
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: As I said it also has to do with a panicky gobbling up of air as if he could never get enough. As a child at one time he died from suffocation, and this also has its bearings here in the present, the panicky gulping of air being a mechanism of subconscious memory. I do hope that this helps him.
quotes.translation: 正如我所说，这也与一种恐慌性的狼吞虎咽有关，仿佛他永远无法获得足够的空气。他小时候曾因窒息而死，这在当下也有其关联，那种恐慌性的吞咽空气是潜意识记忆的一种机制。我真心希望这能帮助他。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Then present these to me at our next session, or one at a time, or two, as you prefer, and I will answer them. You may organize the questions under headings, but you need not do so. If several happen to fall under one large subject heading, this would simply be a convenient way of handling it.
quotes.translation: 然后在下次课程中把这些呈现给我，或者按你的喜好一次一个或两个，我会回答它们。你可以按标题组织问题，但不必如此。如果几个问题恰好属于一个大主题，那只是处理它们的一种便捷方式。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This is your present line of development, and you have utilized it in the past through your portraits, faces of those that have appeared to you in telepathic images of which you were unaware. Closer attention should be paid to your dreams, the suggestion given by you that you will recall them.
quotes.translation: 这是你当前的发展路线，过去你通过肖像画——那些以你未曾察觉的心灵感应影像出现在你面前的面孔——已经运用了它。你应该更加关注你的梦境，以及你给出的会记住它们的暗示。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The material is quite legitimate, regardless of the ways in which I may choose to present it at various times. The basic principles of it will rest in our own sessions where those who are curious enough and gifted enough intellectually may find the arguments and reasons upon which it is built.
quotes.translation: 无论我在不同时间选择以何种方式呈现这些资料，它们都是完全正当的。其基本原则将存在于我们自己的课程中，那些足够好奇且智力天赋足够的人可以在其中找到构建这些资料所依据的论点和理由。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: (It must be emphasized that I did not know consciously that such an affair could even happen. I didn't know my abilities were that good, to tell the truth; and had no idea that there was any danger of acting as a medium without Seth. I used to worry that if Seth gave wrong data this would reflect on the legitimate nature of that personality. This time Seth was not present. Did this give me added freedom?
quotes.translation: （必须强调的是，我意识上并不知道这种事竟然可能发生。说实话，我不知道自己的能力有那么好；也完全没想过在没有赛斯的情况下充当灵媒会有任何危险。我以前担心，如果赛斯给出了错误数据，这会影响到那个性格的正当性。这次赛斯并不在场。这是否给了我额外的自由？）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: As I mentioned earlier, you will not become more spiritual by denying your flesh. (See Chapter Seven.) This is the life you are living! Trust the living that flows through you. By doing so, other realities will make themselves known. They will add dimension and depth to your present reality.
quotes.translation: 如我之前所说，你不会因否定肉体而变得更灵性。（见第七章。）这就是你正在活的人生！信任流经你的生命力。如此一来，其他实相将自行显现。它们会为你当前的实相增添维度与深度。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Realities merge, one into the other. Personalities, or any type of individualized energy, may pass through various realities. The appearance of energy in one form could be said to end in that form were it not for the existence of the spacious present, in which all realities are simultaneous.
quotes.translation: 实相彼此交融，相互渗透。人格或任何类型的个体化能量，可能穿越各种实相。若非存在一个所有实相同时发生的"广袤当下"，能量以某种形态显现时，便可说该形态终将消逝。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Before our break I will leave you with a few questions. （Smile, lighting cigarette.） Was there something your future self had forgotten? Did the future self request information, and did this request cause the present self, you see, to make an actual and legitimate projection into the future?
quotes.translation: 休息前我留几个问题给你们。（微笑，点燃香烟。）你未来的自己是否遗忘了什么？未来的自己是否曾请求信息，而此请求是否导致当下的自己——你看——对未来的实际且合法的投射？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The emotions belong to the personality, that is to the present personality, and are strongly connected both to the conscious ego and to the inner self, which is so often ignored. This is the rather difficult part for me to explain, I'm afraid. I'm not sure how to go about making this clear.
quotes.translation: 情绪属于人格，即当下的人格，且与意识自我及常被忽视的内我紧密相连。恐怕这部分对我而言相当难以解释。我不确定该如何阐明这一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In dreams the inner "I" changes its point of focus, and this is important. It is therefore able to view the self as a whole, with its past and present life. And because the focus brings it outside of camouflage time and space, it is also able to project itself into what you call the future.
quotes.translation: 在梦中，内在的"我"会改变其焦点，这很重要。因此它能将自我视为一个整体，连同其过去与现在的人生。而由于这焦点将它带出伪装的时间与空间，它也能投射到你们所谓的未来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I am speaking in your historical terms because before the historical system that you recognize, man had indeed experimented with these other directions, and with some success. This does not mean that man in the present has fallen from some higher spiritual achievement to his current state.
quotes.translation: 我用你们的历史术语来说，因为在你们所认知的历史系统之前，人类确实已实验过这些其他方向，并取得若干成就。这并不表示当下的人类是从某种更高的灵性成就堕落至当前状态。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 708
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The anima and the animus are closely connected with these interior body images. These body images are highly charged psychically, and also appear in the dream state. They operate as compensations and reminders to prevent you from over-identifying yourself with your present physical body.
quotes.translation: 阿尼玛与阿尼姆斯与这些内在身体意象紧密相连。这些身体意象在心灵层面高度活跃，也会出现在梦境状态中。它们作为补偿与提醒机制运作，防止你过度认同当下的物质身体。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Suppose you have a particular goal in mind as a youngster, toward which you work. Your intent, images, desires and determination form a psychic force that is projected out ahead of you, so to speak. You send the reality of yourself from your present into what you think of as the future.
quotes.translation: 假设你年轻时心中有一个特定目标，并为之努力。你的意图、意象、渴望与决心形成一股心灵力量，可以说被投射到你前方。你将当下的自我实相送入你认为的未来之中。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The psychological situations that give cause to Ruburt's mother's arthritis condition are not present in Ruburt, and once and for all, he does not have to fear such a dilemma. Quite simply arthritis, despite its being in his family, is not one of the diseases which will ever bother him.
quotes.translation: 导致鲁柏母亲关节炎的心理状况在鲁柏身上并不存在，他根本无需恐惧这种困境。简单来说，尽管关节炎有家族遗传倾向，但这绝不是会困扰他的疾病之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Time inversion would merely permit the recreation of a particular perception. The year for example 1943 was simply an artificial collection of events loosely agreed upon. The past exists to the same extent that the present or future exists, and it is only the perception that is limited.
quotes.translation: 时间倒转仅能允许特定感知的重现。例如1943年这个年份，不过是松散共识下人为集合的事件。过去存在的程度与当下或未来相同，受限的只是感知本身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: By then you will have discovered that your present theory of the expanding universe is in error; and this error will, nevertheless, affect your calculations as to the exact location in your space, of the intelligence that is contacted. The contact will be made, I believe, in Australia.
quotes.translation: 届时你们会发现当前宇宙膨胀理论存在谬误；而这一谬误将影响你们对空间中接触到的智慧体精确位置的测算。我相信，这次接触将在澳大利亚发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I admit to you reincarnation does seem to have such implications. This is simply because you insist upon considering reincarnation in the light of time theories that are themselves incorrect. You must instead consider reincarnation in the light of what you know of the spacious present.
quotes.translation: 我承认转世确实带有这种暗示。这仅仅是因为你们坚持用本身有误的时间理论来理解转世。相反，你们必须依据对广袤当下的认知来理解转世。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: It is the director of all the subsidiary psychological subpersonalities that form the acting-present primary personality. It gives and takes. It prevents unconstructed aspects from gaining control, unless of course there are strong reasons why such control is necessary in the long run.
quotes.translation: 它是所有构成行动当下主要人格的附属心理次人格的导演。它给予也索取。它阻止未建构的面向获得控制权——除非长期来看这种控制有充分的理由。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Dineen, denied the support of the framework she had chosen, would have to face the questions that she had projected there. But all of the inner difficulties can be resolved by understanding that you form your own reality, and that your point of power is in the present (with emphasis).
quotes.translation: 迪宁失去了她所选择框架的支持，将不得不面对她投射到那里的问题。但所有内在困境都可以通过理解"你创造自己的实相，而你的力量点就在当下"（强调语气）来化解。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

related_concepts.name_en: The point of power is in the present

quotes.text: The body mechanisms become highly disoriented. The signals to the body are very contradictory, so that after a while, if such conditions continue, you can no longer tell whether you are in actual danger or imagined danger. Your mind then forces your body to be in a state of constant alert -- but more unfortunately, you train yourself to ignore your direct, sensual feedback in the present moment.
quotes.translation: 身体机制会变得高度混乱。给身体的信号非常矛盾，以至于如果这种情况持续下去，你很快将无法分辨自己处于真实危险还是想象危险中。你的心智会迫使身体持续处于警戒状态——但更不幸的是，你会训练自己忽略当下时刻直接而感性的反馈。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The body is obviously continually created during your present lifetime, in your terms. It is not a mechanism once created, then left to fend for itself. You were not given a certain amount of "life force" at birth that you use up as you go along, contrary to many schools of thought.
quotes.translation: 身体显然是在你此生中持续被创造的，用你的说法。它并非一次创造完成就任其自生自灭的机制。与许多学派观点相反，你并非在出生时被赋予固定量的"生命力"然后逐渐消耗殆尽。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You may take your break. I realize that I've run on. You are such a beloved friend that I want to help you along these lines as much as possible. Even then it is difficult to keep all aspects in mind, particularly as far as the present personality and its relation to past lives.
quotes.translation: 你可以休息一下。我知道自己说得太多了。你是我如此珍爱的朋友，我想在这些方面尽可能帮助你。即便如此，要兼顾所有面向仍然困难，尤其是涉及当下人格与其过去世的关系时。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: A suggestion will be made, not by you or Ruburt, during this conversation, and it will be taken up by others. A plan for a book will evolve, and other plans. There is an H--Helena comes to mind, but it is probable that this Helena is merely connected to one of the women present.
quotes.translation: 在这次对话中，将有一个建议被提出——不是由你或鲁柏提出——而会被其他人采纳。一本书的计划会逐渐成形，还有其他计划。有个H——海伦娜浮现在脑海中，但这位海伦娜很可能只与在场某位女性有关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: I would like to discuss some material that we have left unfinished, making certain that you understand that there are chemical and electrical reactions resulting from mental enzymes, that are also present in the process of constructing psychic energy into physical construction.
quotes.translation: 我想讨论一些我们尚未完成的资料，确保你们明白：由心灵酵素产生的化学与电性反应，在将心灵能量建构为物质实相的过程中也同样存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: At some still rather far date, the present rigidity of our schedule may give way to a more spontaneous framework. Such a future framework, and a method whereby we take fuller advantage of high peaks would also tend to cut down distortions. This would obviously be most valuable.
quotes.translation: 在某个仍相当遥远的未来，我们目前刻板的时间表可能会让位于更自发性的架构。这种未来的架构，以及我们更充分利用高峰状态的方法，也将有助于减少扭曲。这显然极具价值。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: All of this is also connected with your beliefs about the waking and dreaming states, white being acquainted with the day, and black with the dreaming condition. Here again is the old connection between the God of Light and the Prince of Darkness, or Satan -- all distinctions made at various levels of development, and having to do with the nature of the origin of the present consciousness.
quotes.translation: 这一切也与你们对清醒与做梦状态的信念有关——白色对应白昼，黑色对应梦境。这里再次出现光明之神与黑暗王子（或撒旦）的古老关联——所有区分都在不同发展层次上产生，且与当前意识的起源本质相关。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In private life and on the world stage, action is occurring all the time. It is easy to look at yourselves or at the world, comma, to see yourself and become so hypnotized by your present state that all change or growth seems impossible, or to see the world in the same manner.
quotes.translation: 在私人生活与世界舞台上，行动无时无刻不在发生。你们很容易看着自己或世界——看着自己并被当前状态催眠，以致认为所有改变或成长皆不可能；或以同样方式看待世界。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: To some extent, such a child symbolizes what happens when an individual believes that he or she is unworthy, that he or she cannot trust impulses, that choices present more problems than advantages. That it is safer to hide abilities than it is to use them. Life is expression.
quotes.translation: 某种程度上，这样的孩子象征着当一个人相信自己毫无价值、无法信任冲动、选择带来的问题多于益处时会发生的情况。隐藏能力比运用能力更安全。生命即是表达。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (According to him, tonight's session after 9:52 isn't book material either, but Jane and I are presenting it here because in it Seth returns to questions I'd asked earlier in Mass Events: What about the roles played in human affairs by viruses like smallpox? As I quoted myself in the opening notes for the 840th session: "What is the real relationship between the host organism and disease?" See Session 840 itself, and certain parts of Session 841.
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: If you take The Three Faces of Eve, in which actually four egos were involved, and imagine each of these egos taking over, so to speak, in completely separate existences, in your past, present and future, then you may come somewhat closer to the true nature of reincarnation.
quotes.translation: 若你以《三面夏娃》为例（实际上涉及四个自我），并想象这些自我在你们过去、现在与未来的完全独立存在中轮流主导，那么你或许能更接近轮回的真实本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Learning is not simply passed on from living tissue to living tissue -- this your biologists have discovered -- but it is also passed on through the body's present corporeal reality, sometimes entirely changing the messages to past cells, that in your terms no longer exist.
quotes.translation: 学习并非简单地由活组织传递给活组织——你们的生物学家已发现这一点——它也会通过身体当前的具体实相传递，有时会完全改变传递给过去细胞的信息，而这些细胞在你们的时间概念中已不复存在。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: His present mother, remembering subconsciously past transgressions of his, now counts upon his impulsive nature and sensitivity to pay him back, this of course representing a mistake on her part, for which she will have to suffer the consequences in still another existence.
quotes.translation: 他今生的母亲，潜意识里记得他前世的过失，现在指望利用他冲动的天性和敏感来报复他，这当然是她自身的错误，为此她将在另一世承受后果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The answers to the nature of reality, the intimate knowledge of All That Is that you all seek, is within your present experience. It will not be found outside of yourselves, but through an inner journey into yourself, through yourself and through the world that you know.
quotes.translation: 关于实相本质的答案，你们所有人追寻的"一切万有"的亲密知识，就在你们当下的经验之中。它不会在你们自身之外被找到，而是要通过向内探索自我、穿越自我、穿越你们所认知的世界才能获得。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is the prime identity of the whole present personality. In many cases it is the I of your dreams. It is definitely the I of your creative activity. It is the I, you see, which survives physical existence, and the physical, physically-oriented ego is only a part of it.
quotes.translation: 这是整个当前人格的核心身份。在许多情况下，它是你梦境中的"我"。它无疑是你创造性活动中的"我"。你看，正是这个"我"超越了物质存在，而物质导向的自我只是它的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The use of psychological time will make the experience of death much less frightening. You will already have learned to recognize the spacious present for what it is, and the conscious ego will not be so bewildered and confused by the sudden perception that is involved.
quotes.translation: 运用心理时间将使死亡的体验不再那么可怕。你们将已经学会认出那广阔当下的本质，有意识的自我也不会因突然的感知而如此困惑和混乱。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: For it is the dream we are after, the dream experience itself in all the vividness that we can capture, and if you are going to get a watered-down version in any case, then you might as well continue with your present method of dream recording, and not lose any sleep.
quotes.translation: 因为我们追求的是梦境本身，是能捕捉到的一切鲜活的梦境体验，如果你无论如何都会得到稀释的版本，那还不如继续使用你目前的梦境记录方法，不必牺牲睡眠。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Now, you may or may not be greeted by friends or relatives immediately following death. This is a personal matter, as always. Overall, you may be far more interested in people that you have known in past lives than those close to you in the present one, for example.
quotes.translation: 现在，你死后可能立即受到亲友迎接，也可能不会。这始终是个人之事。举例来说，总体而言，你可能对前世认识的人远比对今生亲近的人更感兴趣。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now there are personalities developed enough to do this. And each act of leaping, so to speak, forms a new thread. Now following through with our analogy, imagine yourself A. We will start you off in physical reality at thread A, though you have already traversed many other threads to get where you are. We are merely beginning with thread A since this is your present situation.
quotes.translation: 有些人格已发展得足以做到这一点。可以说，每一次跳跃的动作都会形成一条新丝线。现在继续我们的类比，想象你自己是A。我们暂且从丝线A开始你在物质实相中的旅程，尽管你为了到达现在的位置已经穿越了许多其他丝线。我们仅以丝线A为起点，因为这是你当下的处境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The process is gradual, individual and determined by experience in other lives. It is particularly dependent upon emotional characteristics -- not necessarily of the last incarnated self, but the emotional tensions present as a result of a group of past existences.
quotes.translation: 这个过程是渐进的、个体化的，并由其他世的经验所决定。它尤其取决于情感特质——不一定是最后转世自我的特质，而是因一系列过去存在而产生的当下情感张力。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The excursions with form number one will be of your own system, and largely connected to the earth, although past, present and future may be involved. You may, for example, visit New York in the year 2,000. This is at least possible, you see, using form number one.
quotes.translation: 使用第一种形态的漫游将限于你自己的系统，且主要与地球相关，尽管可能涉及过去、现在和未来。例如，你可能造访公元2000年的纽约。你看，使用第一种形态至少是可能的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Your particular camouflage pattern is given to solids, among other things, and the idea of solids gives its alternative of something not solid or unfilled, which you call space. Your outer senses are themselves camouflages to deal with, and equipped to perceive, camouflages. On some other planes the camouflage pattern is so different as to be beyond your present comprehension.
quotes.translation: 你的特定伪装模式赋予固体以特性，而固体的概念又衍生出非固体或未填充之物——即你所谓的空间。你的外在感官本身就是用来处理并感知伪装的伪装。在其他某些层面上，伪装模式差异之大已超出你当前的理解范围。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: （A drawing is solidified action. In the process of drawing I am solidifying emotion or feeling. There is distortion present, but still I put down something that my obvious senses can perceive. It is an attempt to get to the heart, the mind's heart, of the matter.
quotes.translation: （绘画是固化的行动。在绘画过程中，我正将情绪或感受固化。虽然存在扭曲，但我仍将某些我的显意识感官能感知到的东西付诸笔端。这是试图触及事物的核心——心智的核心。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Physically therefore the house that you will live in within five years may not exist, in your terms, now. It may not have been built yet, therefore physically you do not perceive it. Such a house however does have form, and does exist within the spacious present.
quotes.translation: 因此，就物质层面而言，你五年后将要居住的房子，在你们的时间概念里，此刻可能并不存在。它或许尚未被建造，所以你们在物质层面无法感知它。然而，这样的房子确实具有形态，并且确实存在于广袤的当下之中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: He has reached a decision now, or very nearly, about the matters mentioned in our last session. There seems to be some connection with the Midwest here, or at least further west than his present location. Perhaps someone further west had to do with his decision.
quotes.translation: 关于我们上次课程中提及的那些事情，他现在已经做出了决定，或者说几乎已经做出了决定。这里似乎与中西部有些关联，或者至少比他目前所在地更靠西的地方。也许某个更靠西的人与他的决定有关。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

source_raw.title: （Once before, in the first and 18th envelope experiments, an object was used that was similar but not identical by any means. In the first experiment in the 179th session, Seth came through with one accurate impression. In the 18th experiment, held during the 212th session, a few more impressions were obtained; but overall the results were interfered with by other factors in a way that doesn't seem to happen these days. See Session 179 in Volume 4, and Session 212 in Volume 5.

quotes.text: In most cases however it is the future in which you are interested. The future changes. You change it, in the same manner that you have changed the past. In such cases it is necessary that the correct channel of probable events be perceived, correct meaning the channel which shall ultimately be chosen. And the choice is dependent upon your choices in both past and present.
quotes.translation: 然而，在大多数情况下，你们感兴趣的是未来。未来是变化的。你们改变它，方式与你们改变过去相同。在这种情况下，必须感知到可能事件的正确通道——所谓"正确"，指的是最终将被选中的那条通道。而这一选择取决于你们在过去和当下所做的选择。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Ruburt should drink no more than five cups of coffee daily at the most. If he is not giving up his cigarettes, then as you suggested moderation should be used. The present fifteen a day will do for now, but this should be reduced to ten when it is feasible.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏每天最多不应喝超过五杯咖啡。如果他还没有戒烟，那么如你所建议的，应当有所节制。目前每天十五支香烟暂时可以维持，但条件允许时应减少到十支。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This main issue is frequently overlooked, while emphasis is placed instead upon whether or not the information seems to be perceived from the present or future. When an individual--in quotes--"clairvoyantly sees"--end quotes--an event, this is what happens.
quotes.translation: 这个主要问题常常被忽视，而重点反而被放在信息似乎是从当下还是未来被感知的。当一个个体——引号——"以千里眼看到"——引号结束——某个事件时，实际发生的就是这个过程。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: It is training for fifth-dimensional existence, and you will be working with an odd kind of time, to you. You will be forming new gestalts of experience, using past, present and future as a painter chooses his colors, combining them into various paintings.
quotes.translation: 这是为第五维度的存在所做的训练，你们将处理一种对你们而言奇特的时间。你们将形成新的经验完形，如同画家选择颜料一般，将过去、当下和未来组合成各种画作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Now, separate impressions. An affair at which ten people were present. Or an affair that was held at ten. Some kind of lists discussed there. Also a specific connection with a kitchen, and with one tall man with a mustache, who has a child, a daughter.
quotes.translation: 现在，分开的意象。一场有十人出席的活动。或是一场在十点钟举行的活动。那里讨论了一些清单。还与厨房有特定关联，并与一位蓄胡子的高个子男人有关，他有一个孩子，是个女儿。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: This is extremely valuable information, particularly concerning the part played by expectation in the sifting of available data. Expectation is somewhat influenced also by past existences, and yet not enough to be binding upon the present personality.
quotes.translation: 这是极具价值的信息，特别是关于期望在筛选可用数据中所扮演的角色。期望也受到过去存在的影响，但不足以束缚当前人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now. Sooner or later we are going to have to discuss the ways in which what would appear to be sensual. Perception is made available to an individual when the physical body, with its senses, perceives an event at which it cannot be said to be present.
quotes.translation: 现在。迟早我们必须讨论，当肉体及其感官感知到一个不能说它“在场”的事件时，那些看似感官的知觉是如何提供给个体的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Concentrating upon your own camouflage universe, you are able to distinguish only the distortive pattern, and from this pattern you deduce your ideas of cause and effect, past, present and future, and ideas of an expanding universe that floats ...
quotes.translation: 专注于你们自己的伪装宇宙，你们只能辨别扭曲的模式，并从这个模式中推导出因果、过去、现在和未来的概念，以及一个漂浮的膨胀宇宙的概念……
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 690)

quotes.text: Give us a moment. A new product being developed by the company that affects the nervous system, a strong U, long U sound connected with it. And a revival here, a stock revival. The product is in the works, so to speak, but that is all at present.
quotes.translation: 给我们一点时间。一家公司正在开发一种影响神经系统的新产品，与它相关有一个强烈的“U”音，长“U”音。这里还有一次复苏，一次股票复苏。可以说，该产品正在开发中，但目前仅此而已。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: When you sleep the ego becomes unfocused, but still present, and its goals and attitudes to some extent do color dream experiences. The survival personality has somewhat the same relationship to the ego as the dreaming personality has to it now.
quotes.translation: 当你睡眠时，自我变得不聚焦，但仍然存在，其目标和态度在某种程度上确实会影响梦境体验。生存人格与自我的关系，类似于做梦人格与自我的关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: During your present life however the connection must be maintained. I will give you a break before our Instream material. I do want to mention however that all consciousness within your system has the same sort of freedom within certain degrees.
quotes.translation: 然而在你目前的人生中，这个连结必须维持。在我们的内在资料开始前，我会让你休息一下。不过我确实想提一下，你们系统内的所有意识在特定范围内都拥有同样的自由。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The other man was not involved with any of you in past lives, nor do I see him indeed at all in England in any era. Instead the Mediterranean area in the 1500's, and it is from this period that his present speech impediment indeed originated.
quotes.translation: 另一个人在前世与你们任何人都没有关联，我也看不到他在任何时代的英格兰出现过。相反，他是在16世纪的地中海地区，他目前的口吃障碍确实源自那个时期。

quotes.text: You do not understand the diversity of life-forms within your own reality. Their scope escapes you. You perceive them stuck like living specimens on the glass of present time, with no comprehension of their multitudinous expression elsewhere.
quotes.translation: 你们并不了解自己实相内生命形态的多样性。它们的范畴超出了你们的理解。你们把它们视为如同活标本般粘在当下时间的玻璃上，对它们在其他地方的多重表达毫无认知。

quotes.text: Weak vibrations are present and can be perceived. Here we will imagine the weak pattern--form of the hose, and an individual perceiving the generalized pattern. There is a lack of further data, no telepathic message being perceived perhaps.
quotes.translation: 微弱的振动确实存在且能被感知。在此我们将想象软管的微弱模式——形态，以及一个感知到这种概括模式的个体。由于缺乏进一步的数据，或许没有接收到任何心电感应讯息。

quotes.text: They exist in actuality, but not in a form with which ordinarily you would be familiar. The neutrality is protective, a duration within the spacious present, where nevertheless there is a certain acceleration in terms of value fulfillment.
quotes.translation: 它们确实存在，但并非以你们通常熟悉的形式存在。这种中立性是保护性的，是广阔当下中的一个持续时段，然而在价值完成方面却存在着某种加速。

quotes.text: There was however a telepathic connection. The present personality of our visitor was aware of the sessions before Philip mentioned them. I expect that the association will continue. The number fifteen is an important one to our visitor.
quotes.translation: 不过确实存在心电感应连结。在菲利普提及这些课程之前，我们访客的当前人格就已经知晓这些课程。我预计这个关联会持续下去。数字十五对我们的访客来说是一个重要的数字。

quotes.text: There can be order without a succession of moments. There can be order, believe it or not, without your cause and effect. There can be order, and there is order, in spontaneity, and in the simultaneous existence of the spacious present.
quotes.translation: 没有时刻的连续也能存在秩序。信不信由你，没有你们的因果也能存在秩序。在自发性中，在广阔当下的同时存在中，存在秩序，而且确实存在秩序。

quotes.translation: （马克是比尔·麦克唐纳的赛斯实体名。）当时有一个孩子在场，因此再次与妮娜产生关联。夏娃既代表夜晚，也是一个名字，这引出了一个未来的可能性，涉及莫斯曼先生的夏娃的一次小事故。

quotes.text: Now. The mind as opposed to the brain, perceives time in terms of the spacious present. It is true that the mind works on associative principles. Therefore these associations are drawn not only from the past, but also from the future.
quotes.translation: 现在。与大脑相对的心智，以广阔当下的方式感知时间。确实，心智基于联想原则运作。因此这些联想不仅来自过去，也来自未来。

quotes.text: The past existed in multitudinous ways. You only experienced one probable past. By changing this past in your mind, now, in your present, you can change not only its nature but its effect, and not only upon yourself but upon others.
quotes.translation: 过去以多种方式存在。你只体验了一个可能的过去。现在，在你的当下，通过在心中改变这个过去，你不仅能改变它的性质及其影响，而且这种改变不仅影响你自己，也影响他人。

quotes.text: In somewhat the same way, a strong belief in a particular ability generated in the present will reach into the past and effect whatever changes would have had to occur there (with gestures) in order to now make the ability apparent.
quotes.translation: 以类似的方式，当下对某种特定能力的强烈信念会触及过去，并促成任何本应在那里发生的变化（伴随手势），以便现在使该能力显现出来。

quotes.text: When you understand the construction of entities, then you will understand how this can be so. Ruburt is not myself now, in his present life; he is nevertheless an extension and materialization of the Seth that I was at one time.
quotes.translation: 当你们理解实体的构造时，就会明白这为何如此。鲁柏在他现在的一生中并非我本人；然而，他是我曾是的赛斯的一个延伸和物质化。

quotes.text: (Humorously.) My telepathic abilities must not be operating well this evening, for I took it for granted that this is what you meant by your question; knowing what I did of your use of the psychic knowledge in your present works.
quotes.translation: （幽默地）今晚我的心灵感应能力似乎不太灵光，因为我理所当然地以为这就是你提问的本意；毕竟我了解你在当前作品中运用灵性知识的方式。

quotes.text: Now the fetus utilizes these units. So does any consciousness, including that of a plant. Cells are not just responsive to light because this is the order of things, but because an emotional desire to perceive light is present.
quotes.translation: 胎儿利用这些单位。任何意识体皆如此，包括植物的意识。细胞不仅因事物固有秩序而对光产生反应，更因存在感知光的情感渴望。

quotes.text: On a further rather insignificant note, a doorway arrangement would be somewhat beneficial at your kitchen, if this is practical, and this is undistorted. Otherwise you have maximum benefit from your present living quarters.
quotes.translation: 另有一件微不足道的事：若条件允许，在厨房设置门廊布局会有所助益——此信息未受扭曲。否则你们已从现有居所获得最大效益。

quotes.text: It is similar to the fourth sense in that it is free of course from the arbitrary past, present and future, and it is also similar in that it involves an intimate becoming, or a transformation of self into something else.
quotes.translation: 这与第四感相似，因其自然脱离武断的过去、现在与未来；亦相似于它涉及亲密的生成过程，或自我向其他存在的转化。

quotes.text: There is an inherent knowledge within each individual of the supraself's existence, and its image is indelibly imprinted. It is the desired and sought-after model against which you psychically measure your present self.
quotes.translation: 每个个体内在都存有对超我存在的固有认知，其形象被不可磨灭地铭刻着。它是你们在心灵层面衡量当下自我时所渴望并追寻的典范。

quotes.text: The question, "What is wrong with me?" will only lead you to create further limitations, and to reinforce those that you do have, through exaggerating such activities in the present and projecting them into the future.
quotes.translation: "我哪里出了问题？"这个问题只会引导你制造更多限制，并通过在当下夸大此类行为并将其投射到未来，来强化你已有的限制。

quotes.text: When it is said that certain characteristics from a past life influence or cause present patterns of behavior, such statements, and I have made some of them, are grossly simplified simply to make certain points clear.
quotes.translation: 当有人说前世某些特质影响或导致当下的行为模式时，这类说法（包括我本人曾做过的某些陈述）只是为了阐明特定观点而过度简化的表述。

quotes.text: Let us first of all discuss the nature of hypnosis, quite natural hypnosis, and the ways in which you use it now. Then you will see how you can utilize it quite easily and deliberately in your present point of power.
quotes.translation: 让我们首先探讨催眠的本质——完全自然的催眠，以及你们现在运用它的方式。这样你们就会明白如何在当下的力量点轻松而刻意地运用它。

quotes.text: The present simply should not be negatively projected into the future. This is all-important here. He is afraid of hurting others through his thoughts, but the fear is overly inhibiting him. Do you understand this?
quotes.translation: 当下绝不应被消极地投射到未来。这一点至关重要。他害怕自己的思想会伤害他人，但这种恐惧过度抑制了他。你明白吗？

quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It is the present personality's desire to express himself, opposed by the subconscious memories of that past life, with its fear of the effects of eloquence used without discretion, that now cause his difficulty.
quotes.translation: 正是当前人格渴望表达自己，却受到前世潜意识记忆的阻碍——那前世对不加节制运用口才的后果心存恐惧——这才造成了他目前的困境。

quotes.text: I have also said that space travel, so-called, will of necessity deviate from its present concern with vehicles. It will be discovered that the inner senses represent your only longlasting method of such travel.
quotes.translation: 我也曾说过，所谓的太空旅行必然将偏离其当前对载具的关注。人们将会发现，内在感官才是此类旅行唯一持久的方式。

quotes.text: I see that we will have a private session once again. This is to our advantage; and it is also to our advantage, when witnesses are present, when those witnesses have the peculiar qualities which are of benefit.
quotes.translation: 我预见我们将再次进行私人课。这对我们有利；而当见证者在场时，若这些见证者具备有益的特殊品质，那对我们同样有利。

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: I may use the word future, but I use it only to express that which is beyond my present perceptive limits. It is almost impossible to speak of a single, simple action, though I may do so for conveniences sake.
quotes.translation: 我或许会使用"未来"这个词，但用它仅是为了表达超越我当前感知界限的事物。几乎不可能谈论单一、简单的行动，尽管为方便起见我可能这样做。

quotes.text: (Yma Sumac.) Any connection with past periods of productivity or joy have immediate reference to the present. As negative suggestions play their part, so do positive suggestions, and both in terms of symbols.
quotes.translation: （伊玛·苏玛克。）任何与过去创作力或喜悦时期的关联都直接与当下相关。正如负面暗示发挥作用，正面暗示亦然，两者皆以象征形式运作。

quotes.text: I suggest you speak his name, his present name, three times, and touch him. This is only a temporary procedure, and a mark of our progress. He will quickly learn the procedure, and then there will be no need.
quotes.translation: 我建议你呼唤他的名字——他现在的名字——三次，并触碰他。这只是临时程序，也是我们进展的标志。他将很快学会这个程序，届时便无需如此。

quotes.text: For one thing, association is not clearly understood by any means. It cannot be clearly understood simply because at present psychologists believe that association works only in connection with past events.
quotes.translation: 首先，联想作用绝非如人们所认为的那样清晰易懂。它之所以无法被清楚理解，纯粹是因为目前心理学家相信联想只与过去事件相关。

quotes.text: In your terms, if you believe that you chose illness to compensate for a past-life deficiency, then it will help you to realize that you form your reality now in your present, and can therefore change it.
quotes.translation: 用你们的话来说，若你相信自己选择疾病是为了弥补前世的缺失，那么这将有助于你认识到：你此刻正在当下创造自己的实相，因此也能改变它。

quotes.text: My consciousness does not normally operate at the same speeds as yours, either (see Note 9), so in my terms what I am saying has long ago been said, while in your present it is new, or just reaching you.
quotes.translation: 我的意识通常不以你们的速度运作（见注9），因此以我的说法，我所说的一切早已被道出，而在你们的当下，它却是崭新的，或刚刚抵达。

source_raw.title: (11:38. Now Jane came through with several pages of material for herself. Some of it was quite personal, but one part consisted of Seth's response to an assessment she'd written after supper tonight, wherein she examined her progress since the inauguration of her psychic abilities late in 1963. Seth, here, adds to our understanding of Jane's reactions to some of the challenges she took up 11 years ago. His material is also an extension of much that he gave in the 679th session for Volume 1 of "Unknown" Reality, when he discussed the early background of the probable Jane who chose to live in this physical reality, and how that Jane began to contend with her strongly mystical nature. See especially Note 8 for Session 679, and Appendix 1.)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: If it were scientifically inclined, the body would know that such spontaneous performance was impossible, for science cannot explain the reality of life itself in its present form, much less its origins.
quotes.translation: 若身体具有科学倾向，它便会明白这种自发表现是不可能的——因为科学无法解释生命本身在当下形态中的实相，更遑论其起源。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Yet this initial experience is not completed and it is not finished. And while it does not need expression through camouflage, it exists in a fuller and more vivid nature than you can at present imagine.
quotes.translation: 然而这初始体验尚未完成，也未被终结。虽然它无需通过伪装来表达，但它存在的本质比你们当下所能想象的更为饱满生动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You have put yourselves in a position where your consciousness must now become aware of the probable pasts and probable futures, in order to form for yourselves a sane, fulfilling, and creative present.
quotes.translation: 你们已将自己置于这样的境地：意识必须开始觉察可能的过去与可能的未来，才能为自身构建一个健全、充实且富有创造力的当下。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: In your terms, until now your consciousness has specialized in neurological patterning. As mentioned (in Session 682), this was extremely important while it learned the art of specialized focus. Now, however, it must begin to recognize that it can indeed expand, and bring into its awareness other quite legitimate realities. The nature of probabilities must be understood, for the time has come in the world as you experience it where the greatest wisdom and discrimination are needed. Your consciousness and neurological prejudice blind you to the full dimension of physical activity. The true implications of physical action are not as yet apparent to you.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Every action changes every other action. We return to our ABCs. Therefore every action in the present affects those actions which you call the past. Ripples from a thrown stone go out in all directions.
quotes.translation: 每个行动都会改变其他每个行动。我们回到最基本的原理。因此，现在的每个行动都会影响你所谓的过去那些行动。投石激起的涟漪会向四面八方扩散。
