source_raw.title: A disagreement here somewhere, in connection with two men. This is not the disagreement that Dr. Instream spoke of to you and Ruburt when you met. （Pause at 10:15. See Session 169 in Volume 4.）

quotes.text: He may read them when they are written up. I believe this will be of benefit, at least for the present. In fact, this is an excellent suggestion, and will aid in achieving greater spontaneity for us.
quotes.translation: 当这些内容写下来时，他可能会阅读。我相信这会有益处，至少目前如此。事实上，这是个极好的建议，将有助于我们达到更大的自发性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now it is important that you realize that we have used analogies rather freely in our last two sessions, for there was no other way to give you any clear concept of the material I wished to present.
quotes.translation: 现在重要的是，你们要明白，在最近两次课中，我们相当自由地使用了类比，因为别无他法能让你们对我想要呈现的资料有任何清晰的概念。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There is much yet to be covered dealing with a spontaneity that is nevertheless durable. I have also said that your own present existence occurs simultaneously. You only perceive it in slow motion.
quotes.translation: 关于一种持久却仍具自发性的特质，还有许多内容有待探讨。我也说过，你们现在的存在是同时发生的。你们只是以慢动作的方式感知它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: An occasion also at his home, where five were present. （Pause.） Another situation involving a young man and a family connection. He wears a robe with a large pocket, rather unusual pocket. （Pause.）
quotes.translation: 还有一次在他家中的场合，当时有五人在场。（停顿。）另一个涉及一位年轻人和家庭关系的情境。他穿着一件有大口袋的长袍，口袋相当不寻常。（停顿。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The very act of projecting will alter these probabilities. I am not saying that this future environment is not real, however. It is as real as your present environment indeed, you understand this.
quotes.translation: 投射的行为本身就会改变这些可能性。我并非说这个未来环境不真实，但它确实与你们当前的环境一样真实，这一点你们明白。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The third form we may call the true projection form. In it, it is possible to travel beyond your solar system, and to perceive the past, present and future of other systems as well as your own.
quotes.translation: 第三种形式我们可称之为真正的投射形式。在这种形式中，有可能穿越你们的太阳系，并感知其他系统以及你们自己系统的过去、现在和未来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: You have done much for them, and you will be able to do more in direct proportion to your ability to understand that their judgment of you is based upon their own present false conceptions.
quotes.translation: 你们为他们做了很多，而你们能做得更多，这直接取决于你们能否理解：他们对你们的评判是基于他们当前错误的观念。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Had he left the gallery when his novel was published, he would by now have one and a half times his present income from writing. That is, his yearly income would exceed what it is now.
quotes.translation: 如果他在小说出版时就离开画廊，那么他现在的写作收入将是他目前收入的一倍半。也就是说，他的年收入将超过现在的水平。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: ... You have a whole self, a multidimensional self of which your present personality is a small part. It is your responsibility to expand your awareness , to utilize these abilities...
quotes.translation: ……你们有一个完整的自己，一个多维度的自己，你们当前的人格只是其中的一小部分。扩展你们的意识、运用这些能力是你们的责任……
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Because of Ruburt's limited scientific vocabulary, this is somewhat difficult to explain. Also some of the theories I will present in this discussion will be quite unfamiliar to you.
quotes.translation: 由于鲁柏的科学词汇有限，这解释起来有些困难。此外，我在这次讨论中将要提出的一些理论对你们来说会相当陌生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: When we have a suitable period of time it would be most beneficial for us to discuss the various members of your present family, Joseph, in connection with their past experiences.
quotes.translation: 当我们有适当的一段时间时，讨论你目前家庭中的各个成员与他们的过去经历之间的联系，约瑟，将是非常有益的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: THE PRESENT IS THE POINT OF POWER.
quotes.translation: 当下即是力量之点。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

related_concepts.name_en: The point of power is in the present

quotes.text: When he is working his plunge into creativity is deep. It is not in his nature to go halfway. If he had taken more time off completely, he would not be in his present position.
quotes.translation: 当他工作时，他对创造力的投入是深沉的。半途而废并非他的本性。如果他完全抽出更多时间休息，他就不会处于目前的处境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Such dreams do not basically imply a return to a distant past, for to the cells all things are present.
quotes.translation: 这类梦境基本上并不暗示回到遥远的过去，因为对细胞而言，一切事物都是当下的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: （"A connection with three people, and a fourth who is not present." We thought this a too-vague reference to my brother and his wife, and their daughter, and the groom.
quotes.translation: （"与三个人有关联，还有第四个人不在场。"我们认为这对我兄弟及其妻子、他们的女儿以及新郎的指涉过于模糊。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

source_raw.title: A disagreement here somewhere, in connection with two men. This is not the disagreement that Dr. Instream spoke of to you and Ruburt when you met. （Pause at 10:15. See Session 169 in Volume 4.）

quotes.text: First of all, a formal affair of some kind. It has to do mainly with a group of men. It is their affair, or it is to honor them. But women I believe are also present.
quotes.translation: 首先，是某种正式场合。主要与一群男性有关。这是他们的活动，或是为了向他们致敬。但我相信女性也在场。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

source_raw.title: （Seth began talking about moment points in the I49th-152nd sessions. He began on the spacious present in session 44 in Volume 2.

quotes.text: In the current pivoting of its experience, therefore, your conscious mind directs not only the present, but future and past experience of deep neurological events.
quotes.translation: 因此，在其经验当前的转向中，你的意识心不仅指挥着当下，也指挥着深层神经事件的未来与过去经验。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: All That Is, therefore, is immersed within your world, present in each hypothetical point, and forms the very fabric from which each portion of matter is created.
quotes.translation: 因此，一切万有沉浸于你们的世界中，存在于每个假设性的点上，并构成了创造物质每一部分所凭借的织料。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now. The child does not stay in a neat psychological package, enclosed in the past and insulated from the present or the future. It is not as simple as all that.
quotes.translation: 现在。孩子并非停留在一个整洁的心理包裹里，被封闭于过去而与当下或未来隔绝。事情并非如此简单。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

source_raw.title: （Mark is Bill Macdonnel's entity name. See Session 68 in Volume 2.）

quotes.text: (It is also true that we don't want anything more added to our present schedule. If something urgent develops we try to accommodate it in some fashion however.
quotes.translation: （同样真实的是，我们也不希望当前日程上再增加任何事项。如果出现紧急情况，我们总会设法以某种方式加以应对。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The individual was also bewildered however because he was able to perceive you in what you would call both your future and your past, as well as your present.
quotes.translation: 然而，这个人也感到困惑，因为他能在你们所谓的未来和过去，以及当下中感知到你。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Now: Let me make it clear once again: Your present personality as you think of it is indeed "indelible," and continues after death to grow and develop.
quotes.translation: 现在：让我再次说明：你们所认为的当前人格确实是"不可磨灭的"，并在死后继续成长与发展。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: ("There's a connection with a lawsuit, or trouble along those lines. A guy who's a jokester. Two little kids. September, 1943. Then the present..."
quotes.translation: "与一场诉讼或类似麻烦有关联。一个爱开玩笑的家伙。两个小孩。1943年9月。然后是当下……"
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In this vision, the potential is seen as present, and the distance between the practical and the ideal forms no contradiction, since they coexist.
quotes.translation: 在此异象中，潜能被视为当下存在，而现实与理想之间的距离并不构成矛盾，因为它们同时并存。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: While it is true that any conceivable item can be used, it is indeed simpler at present if an item without so many associated impressions is used.
quotes.translation: 虽然任何可想象的事物都能被使用，但若使用一个不带那么多相关印象的物品，目前确实更为简便。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: You know the nature of personality now to some degree, and I am always to some degree present at your sessions. (Smile.) Now give us a moment.
quotes.translation: 你现在已在一定程度上了解人格的本质，而我在你们的课中始终以某种程度临在。（微笑。）现在请给我们片刻。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You have already traveled the way individuals like your present mother and father have traveled. All is a process of development therefore.
quotes.translation: 你早已走过像你今世父母那样的人所走过的路。因此，一切皆是发展的过程。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: A red car. I do not know if this is a present car, or a car the man owned as a boy--a toy car. But a red car is connected here. Or wagon.
quotes.translation: 一辆红色汽车。我不知道这是当下的车，还是那人童年拥有的车——一辆玩具车。但红色汽车与此有关。或是马车。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Then the integration will take place, and you will realize that the various incarnated selves were as but days in your present existence.
quotes.translation: 届时整合将会发生，你将明白各个转世的自己就如同你当前存在中的日子一般。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Give us a moment. You must not scatter your energies. If you dislike your present job, then it is up to you to find another. Do you see?
quotes.translation: 请稍等片刻。你不可分散精力。若你不喜欢当前的工作，那就由你自行另寻他职。明白吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: It is after all the you from which you spring, and the impetus within the present self. You may take your break and we shall continue.
quotes.translation: 毕竟那是你从中生发的本源，也是当前自我内的驱动力。你可以休息片刻，我们稍后继续。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There will be new openings as to products. All of this is dependent upon the initial triangle in the present, that I have described.
quotes.translation: 关于产品方面将出现新的契机。这一切都取决于我描述过的当前初始三角关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now I will say good evening, and give you both my best wishes. You can consider this session as your birthday present.
quotes.translation: 现在我要道声晚安，并献上我最美好的祝福。你可以将这次课程视为你的生日礼物。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: When you perceive merely the present personality, you are simply perceiving a small portion of action.
quotes.translation: 当你仅感知当前的人格时，你只是在感知行动的一小部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: A border. A top. Connection with an invitation. A house. Four vertical lines, and a present, or gift.
quotes.translation: 一个边界。一个顶端。与邀请的连接。一栋房子。四条垂直线，以及一份礼物或赠礼。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Now if you had been present. I could have formed a larger effect which you could have heard clearly.
quotes.translation: 现在，如果你当时在场，我本可以形成一个更大的效果，让你能清晰地听到。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json
